| | | **URGENT: Republicans could be on the verge of DEFEATING Senator Mark Kelly and flipping the Senate!**

We’ll cut to the chase, team: **Mark Kelly’s re-election could be in serious danger.**

Senator Kelly won his race in Arizona by only _2 points_ in 2020, and now he’s one of the GOP's top targets.

Donald Trump has already flown to Arizona to rally his MAGA base to _“kick Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate,”_ and a GOP dark money group just launched **MILLIONS of dollars worth of attack ads!**

**Recent polls show that Mark’s lead has DROPPED to only 4 points -- which means we can’t let attacks like these go unanswered!** This grassroots team must step up TODAY, or else we’ll hand power right back to Mitch McConnell.

[**We're still BEHIND on our $25,000 fundraising goal, and our records show you haven’t chipped in yet today. ---
* * *
**Germantown Team Meeting**
Washington County Republicans gathered in Germantown to strategize ahead of the election cycle.
**Trempealeau County Christmas Party**
Trempealeau County Republicans joined together for a great meal, fellowship, and a snapshot of 2022 as it heats up! They enjoyed great dinner discussions with State Representative Treig Pronschinske, 3rd Congressional District candidate Derrick Van Orden, and candidates for local offices.
**Monroe County Conservative Breakfast Club**
The Republican Party of Monroe County held their first Conservative Breakfast Club event of the year in Tomah. They were joined by candidates and elected officials for lively discussions with grassroots leaders!
**West Bend Team Meeting**
Washington County Republicans hosted local election candidates in West Bend for a team meeting.
****
**Columbia County Caucus**
Columbia County conservatives gathered for their annual County Caucus ahead of the WisGOP State Convention!
**Pierce County Training**
Pierce County Republicans learned new voter contact skills to help elect Republicans in 2022 elections.
**Wood County Rally**
Marshfield Republicans rallied in support of conservative ideas and candidates!
* * *
### Don’t miss the next big event in your community! Visit our website [here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3W9XFAkFywiSe_gHG6hiCtA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2022_01_17_v3&n=20) to stay up-to-date on the newest opportunities, or sign up to volunteer [here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3aCXxtdEYxug7BpyM8N6AZw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2022_01_17_v3&n=21).

Dean Heller is a threat to Nevada’s progress and we can’t let him flip this seat:
* In the U.S. Senate, Heller voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act.
* Heller says he liked “what Texas did” with their abortion ban and promised to copy them here in Nevada.
* He refused to acknowledge the results of the 2020 election, further inflaming the Big Lie that the 2020 election was stolen from Trump.
* He voted for Trump’s tax bill giving handouts to the ultra-wealthy and leaving the working class to fend for themselves.
* Now, he’s using far-right talking points to rile up the MAGA base and flip Nevada bright red.

**Steve Sisolak has been a champion of reproductive rights, labor unions, and passed a public health insurance option** – _and yet polls show Dean Heller within SINGLE DIGITS of Gov. Sisolak._

clean_body: | | | | | Team — if you’re wondering what Nevada will look like if Dean Heller wins this race, here’s a sneak peek: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Dean Heller is a threat to Nevada’s progress and we can’t let him flip this seat: In the U.S. Senate, Heller voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act. Heller says he liked “what Texas did” with their abortion ban and promised to copy them here in Nevada. He refused to acknowledge the results of the 2020 election, further inflaming the Big Lie that the 2020 election was stolen from Trump. He voted for Trump’s tax bill giving handouts to the ultra-wealthy and leaving the working class to fend for themselves. Now, he’s using far-right talking points to rile up the MAGA base and flip Nevada bright red. Steve Sisolak has been a champion of reproductive rights, labor unions, and passed a public health insurance option – and yet polls show Dean Heller within SINGLE DIGITS of Gov. Sisolak. The GOP has already spent over $2 million to unseat Gov. ---
| | Dear ,
I am proud, honored, and humbled to have been a part of President Trump’s FIRST 2022 rally in Arizona, and to have been a keynote speaker!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f617f56c58&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| And what a success!

**I took the stage along with many fellow patriots and leaders in the election integrity movement, including Kari Lake, Senator Sonny Borrelli, Senator Wendy Rogers, Mike Lindell, and, of course, President Trump.**

The crowd was massive. It proved that Arizona is a **_Trump State._** A **_Conservative State_**. A **_State that loves America!_**

We set up ourselves for success in 2022, and success in 2024! All I need is your support to win Secretary of State and to save our elections!

If you missed the rally, check out this transcript from an excerpt of my speech on Saturday:

Mark Finchem: _Thank you very much. Ladies and gentlemen I just want to take a few seconds. Turn around and look at the welcome that Donald Trump is getting from God. Is that not a beautiful Arizona sky?_

_Good evening. I did not know that a little over a year ago the act of standing up for you about a suspicious election that has since been proven to be irredeemably compromised would ignite a nationwide populist movement to regain control over our government and to trigger my pursuit to be your next Secretary of State._

_My focus has been on and always will continue to be on making it easy to vote, but hard to cheat. After all, elections belong to the people. They don’t belong to the government. _
_You know the Bible has a number of warnings in it about how to lead a good life, good advice. Try this one on for size. “Select capable men from the people. Men who fear God, trustworthy men who hate dishonest gain to lead the thousands, the hundreds, the fifties, the tens.” Is that who we have in office these days in Congress?_
_...._
_They attack Donald Trump because he messed with their cash flow. They attack Donald Trump because he exposed them and their evil deeds. They attack Donald Trump because he would not sit down and shut up._

_I want to say thank you, President Trump, for the leadership that you have shown – where so many others failed. No elected official that I can think of has taken more hits for his country than Mr. Trump._

_And, sir, that is why the people love you._

_When we strip away all the various ways that cheating showed up in the 2020 election, when we consider both the criminality and the incompetence, the margin of error exceeds the margin of victory._

_Ladies and gentlemen, we know it, and they know it. Donald Trump won._
_..._
_But we’re also talking about a regular audit process, not the Maricopa audit, but a systematic review of elections. When you give the consent to be governed, you do not give up the right to examine the result. We’re also talking about making ballot images a public record._

_Why wouldn’t they be? They’re yours. It’s your election. Election transparency in a very meaningful way. These are the responses to the Maricopa Audit._

_Well some folks would say nothing came out of that. Well I beg your pardon. We have a lot of good public policy that came out of that. But the Democrats are doing everything they can to stop it._

_So we are going to ask you to put pressure not just on Republicans. Light up Democrat phone numbers. Elections are a system run by the people. And they depend on your involvement. So I urge you, become a poll worker, become a PC. Be involved in the election system._

_Because when you are not involved in the election system, we will have election officials that will tell you we need to have electronic tabulation because we can’t get enough people. I see a lot of people out here that I think would like to be involved with elections. Yes?_

_From Maricopa County to Pima County, and yes even down to Yuma, we have a systematic problem. I’m not talking about voter fraud, I’m talking about election fraud. We’re always going to have voters that cheat. But we have systems that are broken and we need to repair those systems, take care of those systems, and maintain those systems._

_You deserve a Secretary of State that will put your interests first, who will diligently promote voter list clean-up, watermarks on ballots, a verifiable audit trail, and to refer criminality to the Attorney General’s office when it is found._
_We must take what we’ve learned in the audit and restore your confidence in your elections but I’m going to need your help. I look forward to the day that we set aside an irredeemably flawed election. That’s the election of 2020. _
---
|
---
| We are well on our way to a victory in 2022. We must win Secretary of State to protect our elections, secure our ballots, and refer criminal activity to the Attorney General’s office – none of which we have now.

**But I absolutely cannot do this without your help. Elections are critically and necessarily of the people and by the people and for the people. [This means I cannot do this without you. Help me help you.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fe4235fadd&e=44b8c466b0)**

[_Please help me keep up the good fight by donating today. I am fighting to have watermarked, currency grade, fool proof ballots instituted in Arizona and across the country, and I need you to help the cause!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0580f46eb6&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=23a5115a9a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0e9619e55e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. [Please contribute today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=98f1dda5a1&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=9d06fd8178) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=9d06fd8178).

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Can I tell you a story?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5064?t=6&akid=1131%2E878179%2EWeFKU5)

Hello,

I have a rare 15 minutes open in my schedule today, so I wanted to take the time to tell you about my very first run for office.

Growing up in Niles, Ohio I saw manufacturing plants shut down and jobs shipped overseas. My family, my neighbors—all these hardworking folks around me—were working their tails off, doing everything right, and still falling behind.

I didn’t see any politicians looking out for families like mine.

If I could do anything, even the smallest thing to help them, I’d do it—so I ran for state senate to make their lives better. **Because that’s what I thought elected office was (and still is) about: solving problems and improving people’s lives.**

I had very little campaign cash, so to get the biggest bang for my buck, I decided to go where the largest number of people would show up every day. My team and I got an Ohio Department of Transportation map and found the busiest intersections in my district.

Every morning and afternoon rush hour, in the rain, snow, sleet, or hail, we were there holding campaign signs. People appreciated our daily effort. Mostly I’d get smiles, and occasionally I got the finger. But if I was willing to work that hard to get the job, they felt they could trust me to work just as hard for them once in office.

I’ve worked every day since to prove them right, and to fight tooth and nail for hardworking Ohioans.

Now I’m running for U.S. Senate because Ohioans deserve two Senators looking out for them and their families.

**There’s a lot of ground to cover when you’re running statewide, and it will take a lot more than campaign signs to combat the mountains of cash the GOP is throwing at us. So, I’m reaching out directly to you:**

[**_I’m relying on you to help me get my workers-first message out to every corner of Ohio. Can I count on you to chip in any amount you can before my end-of-year deadline? I promise I’ll never stop working for you._**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5064?t=7&akid=1131%2E878179%2EWeFKU5) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5065?t=8&akid=1131%2E878179%2EWeFKU5)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5066?t=9&akid=1131%2E878179%2EWeFKU5)

[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5068?t=11&akid=1131%2E878179%2EWeFKU5)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5064?t=12&akid=1131%2E878179%2EWeFKU5)
Let’s do this!

— Tim
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1131%2E878179%2EWeFKU5). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1131%2E878179%2EWeFKU5).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1131%2E878179%2EWeFKU5) to request fewer emails. name: Patrick Witt for Congress
subject: Trump Legal Team Endorses Patrick Witt for GA-10
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PATRICK WITT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00161gOBEjN9S_Jsb-97eInNgWcHWHUea68g2k01v_Y92CEi1F0EdyQNWgIcddjTGHDgNQzS117IOzzDVGjyVIOvtWspnkoGvf3xMjlIAldwoaMEK3Ld8UcDwoeQiDuBMoveLSoaJoJu7U-QSRkVLj_zw==&c=C1Vv9xK15R-3Gi4raPXkTUDQXL1L5Lcoc8e2lUj4a8crd2crnL6n1Q==&ch=HDPuroqE0LBUY-Wchp7Xc4HyQP4m1PQOxIYjCt2EzHEPkqzsEop2wQ==)
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE For inquiries contact joe@patrickwitt.com January 18, 2022
Athens, Ga.--President Trump's Georgia Post-Election Legal Team has endorsed Republican Patrick Witt in the race for Georgia's 10th Congressional District.
---
|
---
| | | To the voters of GA-10,
As members of President Trump's post-election legal team in Georgia, we write to express our full endorsement of Patrick Witt's candidacy for U.S. Congress in Georgia's 10th District.
After the disastrous 2020 election, few were willing to stand up for President Trump and combat the alleged fraud, misconduct, and irregularities that occurred in the State of Georgia. In fact, most of the so-called "Republicans" who President Trump initially relied upon to fight for him in Georgia were complicit in weakening the safeguards that existed to protect election integrity like signature verification and voter registration requirements. That's why the Trump legal team was formed - an independent group of volunteers and lawyers dedicated to investigating what happened in the 2020 election - to fight for President Trump when others were ready to throw him overboard. Our team sought to challenge the election outcome in court not only to uphold election integrity in the 2020 election, but also to address numerous issues with Georgia's election system that needed to be cured in order to ensure fair and just future elections.
The task that stood before us was daunting, as we had to compile hundreds of affidavits, pore over millions of voter records, and draft a complete lawsuit in only a matter of weeks. It required someone who had the knowledge and experience with data analytics who could crunch the numbers and document with hard evidence what we saw take place with our own eyes the night of November 3rd. Patrick Witt was the man who stepped up and led that effort.
Without Patrick's skill set and tireless hard work (including several sleepless nights), President Trump's lawsuit - what has been called "[the best legal challenge mustered](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00161gOBEjN9S_Jsb-97eInNgWcHWHUea68g2k01v_Y92CEi1F0EdyQNWgIcddjTGHDa5pE5hICwEnoSv1Q6q1ixVgo8npj6DrtqaWkQOltz4og9n5Gy6xiEuH-97wQDYA9iSzqer8alVOWJXnVUC_2pWq8YDt7HyE7VDHjtpv_zRJYRo0bvZ1RdhABSlYCEfG-FgpW6_aAtcU8jKNOvNydJl5O950S1uF8J8deWru4lDzBuSUZB7kp8Aayw7uMYRB5OJ3FuYumXCc=&c=C1Vv9xK15R-3Gi4raPXkTUDQXL1L5Lcoc8e2lUj4a8crd2crnL6n1Q==&ch=HDPuroqE0LBUY-Wchp7Xc4HyQP4m1PQOxIYjCt2EzHEPkqzsEop2wQ==)" by the Trump campaign - would not have been possible.
Patrick understands the importance of defending the integrity of our elections, and he has the knowledge and experience to deliver results in Congress. It is our sincere hope that the voters of Georgia's 10th District send him to Washington to fight for this critically important issue.
In liberty,
President Trump's Georgia Post-Election Legal Team
Cleta Mitchell, Esq.
Kurt Hilbert, Esq.
Ray Smith, Esq.
Jenny Beth Martin
Courtney Kramer, Esq.

---
|
---
| "I am so grateful for the endorsement of the lawyers and volunteers of President Trump's Georgia post-election legal team," said Patrick Witt. "It was an honor to work with this dedicated team of men and women as we fought to expose the rampant fraud and misconduct that took place in Georgia's 2020 election. It is imperative that this country has free and fair elections, and that we defeat Democrat efforts to corrupt our voter rolls, permit illegal aliens to vote, and federalize our elections. I'm proud to have fought for election integrity as a member of President Trump's legal team, and as your next congressman, I will work tirelessly to ensure that our elections are secure, fair, and transparent."
---
| | PAID FOR BY PATRICK WITT FOR CONGRESS
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00161gOBEjN9S_Jsb-97eInNgWcHWHUea68g2k01v_Y92CEi1F0EdyQNcIrC45uYtbd6BwvpGtCAGGGS6S6PxZJ0luWJXVfuH8sZ7H3OVjlD2aCJi1i_r4eh2P7ibV_hwV3bUmajlQNau80H_IFZpHd0JV9Slz9ylE-3r1iTqO7urxZ6jSfdFzilw==&c=C1Vv9xK15R-3Gi4raPXkTUDQXL1L5Lcoc8e2lUj4a8crd2crnL6n1Q==&ch=HDPuroqE0LBUY-Wchp7Xc4HyQP4m1PQOxIYjCt2EzHEPkqzsEop2wQ==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00161gOBEjN9S_Jsb-97eInNgWcHWHUea68g2k01v_Y92CEi1F0EdyQNcIrC45uYtbdQXVLus6gwpteI_8SvLRZk8eQ_hy3puj-VQXnaNHeRDFI1eMhhl0uJ2nnq0HbQcCIZnGlSeMGL5E7ZQUp8nXPVrPU05BfdXGo&c=C1Vv9xK15R-3Gi4raPXkTUDQXL1L5Lcoc8e2lUj4a8crd2crnL6n1Q==&ch=HDPuroqE0LBUY-Wchp7Xc4HyQP4m1PQOxIYjCt2EzHEPkqzsEop2wQ==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00161gOBEjN9S_Jsb-97eInNgWcHWHUea68g2k01v_Y92CEi1F0EdyQNcIrC45uYtbdj-k4lC8A4AhfpKlcZ2vuGZWy_vflsPUbQOpRwP_9J3X4MH3AQV_eucGLzhQax1Y-DFFvmlVJtxvEqFDx5FSyuNCH0blQjThlcBY36bW6k7uKTgMZAL02gw==&c=C1Vv9xK15R-3Gi4raPXkTUDQXL1L5Lcoc8e2lUj4a8crd2crnL6n1Q==&ch=HDPuroqE0LBUY-Wchp7Xc4HyQP4m1PQOxIYjCt2EzHEPkqzsEop2wQ==)
---

I'm proud to have fought for election integrity as a member of President Trump's legal team, and as your next congressman, I will work tirelessly to ensure that our elections are secure, fair, and transparent." | | PAID FOR BY PATRICK WITT FOR CONGRESS | == == == | | | | | | | Patrick Witt for Congress | PO Box 89, Watkinsville, GA 30677 | | Sent by mailto:info@patrickwitt.com

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Twitter and we need your help
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59278180:6pwpd-EJN:m:1:3298722022:9717C4249D868EFC16FE8C528B3F2154:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush, we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties, _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59278180:6pwpd-EJN:m:1:3298722022:9717C4249D868EFC16FE8C528B3F2154:r)** Let me explain. Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59278180:6pwpd-EJN:m:1:3298722022:9717C4249D868EFC16FE8C528B3F2154:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59278180:6pwpd-EJN:m:1:3298722022:9717C4249D868EFC16FE8C528B3F2154:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59278180:6pwpd-EJN:m:1:3298722022:9717C4249D868EFC16FE8C528B3F2154:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _Hopefully, I don't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment._ But it gets much worse. When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate, and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59278180:6pwpd-EJN:m:1:3298722022:9717C4249D868EFC16FE8C528B3F2154:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59278180:6pwpd-EJN:m:1:3298722022:9717C4249D868EFC16FE8C528B3F2154:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59278180:6pwpd-EJN:m:1:3298722022:9717C4249D868EFC16FE8C528B3F2154:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today's left. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes, out of school, during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech.** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59278180:6pwpd-EJN:m:1:3298722022:9717C4249D868EFC16FE8C528B3F2154:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation, and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59278180:6pwpd-EJN:m:1:3298722022:9717C4249D868EFC16FE8C528B3F2154:r) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59278180:6pwpd-EJN:m:1:3298722022:9717C4249D868EFC16FE8C528B3F2154:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59278180:6pwpd-EJN:m:1:3298722022:9717C4249D868EFC16FE8C528B3F2154:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59278180:6pwpd-EJN:m:1:3298722022:9717C4249D868EFC16FE8C528B3F2154:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59278180:6pwpd-EJN:m:1:3298722022:9717C4249D868EFC16FE8C528B3F2154:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59278181:6pwpd-EJN:m:1:3298722022:9717C4249D868EFC16FE8C528B3F2154:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

name: Bo Snerdley
subject: Don’t Disrespect the Dream
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59275256:JPxid-ENE:m:1:3253819041:F23DC4907E17B26520E4D057F000C666:r "Biden") Peter: Joe Biden, the man who once referred to black men as "super predators" and refused to let his children ride segregated buses, wants us to believe that he's Black America's savior. By standing at the grave site of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., he's hoping to dupe Black Americans into believing that their votes won't count unless his election "reform" bills pass in Washington...and soon. To Joe and the Democrat Party, **EVERYTHING** is about race, and we are just stupid children who need to be told what to do and when to do it. It's an affront to Dr. King's Dream for America. **So, No Joe, I 'm not buying what you're selling!** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59275256:JPxid-ENE:m:1:3253819041:F23DC4907E17B26520E4D057F000C666:r "Rush")My name is James Golden, but you may know me as Mr. Snerdley, former call screener and producer for the late, great, radio legend Rush Limbaugh. I worked for Rush for almost 30 years, and I learned a lot sitting beside a great man like him every day. **[I started New Journey PAC to make Black America Conservative Again, and I URGENTLY need your help to expose lies Joe Biden and the Democrat Party are telling in an effort to win Black votes this coming November.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59275256:JPxid-ENE:m:1:3253819041:F23DC4907E17B26520E4D057F000C666:r "I started New Journey PAC to make Black America
Conservative Again, and I URGENTLY need your help to expose lies Joe Biden and the Democrat Party are telling in an effort to win Black votes this
coming November.")** Biden and the Democrats have been failing Black America for over 60 years and no one has held them accountable! That is, until now. **When Black Americans hear from our New Journey PAC team, they won 't fall prey to the lies any longer. They will know why they can't trust Joe Biden.** Today's Democrats don't care about content of character; they only care about the color of one's skin. It disrespects Dr. King's vision for America and that's why we need to get our message out far and wide. In 2022, we will flip seats, and polls show this isn't just wishful thinking. My staff has been crunching the numbers, and there is a MASSIVE opportunity for Republicans to win by targeting traditional Democrat Party voters in the Black community. **Black voters are 50% more likely to take political action after being contacted by an organization like ours. Black voters make up 32% of the entire American electorate, while at the same time, the white vote decreased by 9% in the 2020 election.** Our organization has proven to deliver results nationwide, and we need your help to keep it going in 2022 and beyond. | | [CONTRIBUTE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59275257:JPxid-ENE:m:1:3253819041:F23DC4907E17B26520E4D057F000C666:r "CONTRIBUTE $25")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59275258:JPxid-ENE:m:1:3253819041:F23DC4907E17B26520E4D057F000C666:r "CONTRIBUTE $50")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59275259:JPxid-ENE:m:1:3253819041:F23DC4907E17B26520E4D057F000C666:r "CONTRIBUTE $100")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $500](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59275260:JPxid-ENE:m:1:3253819041:F23DC4907E17B26520E4D057F000C666:r "CONTRIBUTE $500")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59275256:JPxid-ENE:m:1:3253819041:F23DC4907E17B26520E4D057F000C666:r "CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT")
---
**New Journey PAC is the ONLY organization with the credibility to tell the real story about the Biden record to Black America:**
* Police were defunded causing crime to skyrocket.
* COVID is spiking even though he promised to stop it.
* Mandates are keeping people out of work.
* Black children will lose scholarships because of his push to have biological boys play girls' sports.
* America's parents are being labeled "domestic terrorists" for demanding a quality education for their children.
* Food, gas, clothing and everything else is more expensive than ever!

**[Our efforts will work, and that's why we need every freedom-loving American to dig deep and do all they can to support our plans to win back Congress this November!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59275256:JPxid-ENE:m:1:3253819041:F23DC4907E17B26520E4D057F000C666:r "Our efforts will work, and that’s why we need every
freedom-loving American to dig deep and do all they can to support our plans to win back Congress this November!")**
Black Americans want more conservative leadership, freedom and the American Dream. The Democrats are so desperate to defeat our candidates, they'll tell them any lie and call us names for stepping out of line, but we're not going to back down and neither are the candidates we support.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59275256:JPxid-ENE:m:1:3253819041:F23DC4907E17B26520E4D057F000C666:r "Video")**_In 2022, we will take back Congress and our nation, and elect more leaders like Winsome Sears and Byron Donald by putting a grassroots army on the ground to spread this message._**
**Time is not on our side and that 's why I need your IMMEDIATE HELP.**
If you want to expose Biden's lies and transform America from a welfare state to a nation where people know they can achieve their goals without a government handout, then help us spread our message this year.
**[It's not always about race and when we tell our story to Black America, they'll know it too! Please do all you can to help us win this year!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59275256:JPxid-ENE:m:1:3253819041:F23DC4907E17B26520E4D057F000C666:r "It’s not always about race and when we tell our story to
Black America, they’ll know it too! Please do all you can to help us win this year!")**
For a New Journey,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59275256:JPxid-ENE:m:1:3253819041:F23DC4907E17B26520E4D057F000C666:r "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley
Founder, New Journey PAC
| **PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE**

subject: Volunteers Assemble!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan McKaughan for Texas
body:
It's time to mobilize Dan's army of volunteers. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1b6702fb867b/volunteers-assemble?e=82b2b364e3)
---
| |
---
| | **First, thank you for your support
of my congressional campaign!**
**Now, I need your help.**
The Primary Election is **_March 1st_** , and early voting starts on **_February 14th_**!

I'm calling you to action. It's time to get out there and spread the message of Freedom and Liberty.

We're in the eleventh hour, and the time is now to make sure our District has a Representative in DC who will fight the fight we all need fighting to save our Republic from the left's destructive and dangerous agenda.

We don't have time for status quo politicians. We need bold ideas and fearless leaders. **That's where you come in. ** There are many opportunities coming up to help me out. Besides hosting a meet and greet, telling friends about me, and donating your hard-earned money, I need you to help me man tables at events, walk blocks, put out signs.

Here are two of the big upcoming events: **TRUMP Rally - January 29th
Lake Conroe Boat Show - February 3-6** I'll be sending out more details on these and other opportunities later this week with an opportunity to sign up.

I appreciate your support. This campaign cannot be successful without the help of grassroots volunteers like you. So, thank you!!

Taking our country back,

Dan

---
|
---
---
| | | Paid for by Dan McKaughan for Texas

|

Taking our country back, Dan | | | | Paid for by Dan McKaughan for Texas | | Copyright © 2022 Dan McKaughan for Texas, All rights reserved.

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: What Tucker Carlson said

body:
Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you’re thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7180kc9qvl051e84nd76u5k4d2drbgqdjjacki0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clg6cpr0cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tblcmr33cpn6hqneor36eqj1phgmuqm1d77m9om8obl69ir3cr4cdo7dd72c2oefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup34phhmspmcc3ie1j32s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi7g7hsfjgscnslbbih1635pg6nkn0juc8rkjsl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clg6cpr0cth2bs) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you’re thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I’ll tell you why. I’ve seen what’s happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I’m sure you have too. All over the country, teachers are brainwashing children to hate themselves and hate their country. They tell students that if they’re white they’re evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they’re black they’re helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. _It’s state sanctioned racism, plain and simple._ **And it doesn’t matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race.** ** ** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help us fight the spread of Critical Race Theory and elect conservatives who care about the truth.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z38ubekq62amfhbvmrucrs9kplo17ql84vogoa5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clg6cpr0cth2bs)** Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won’t survive. _The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it._ They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. **They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back.** The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. **[But there’s something you can do.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbl76n8h7ehvic9mv9tftbj7jacl8v3vvoovjns8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clg6cpr0cth2bs)** That’s why I’m writing to you today. Because our fate isn’t sealed -- yet.__But we must act now.__ My name is Ryan Girdusky and I’ve made it my mission to make education sane again. I created the 1776 Project Political Action Committee to do what our politicians won’t and take back our schools. **I’m going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project.** But I don’t stand a chance without you. **[Please donate $35 or more to the 1776 Project PAC and save our schools from race-baiting, America-hating Marxists.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2a2oi70ikj5k3b2iu54tijb2ee07asogdbnmdg8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clg6cpr0cth2bs)** And make no mistake -- this isn’t just a California or New York problem. **Critical Race Theory is already being taught in EVERY SINGLE state.** It’s happening from coast to coast, in red, blue and purple states alike. And if we don’t take action, we’ll all pay the price. You and I have to take a stand NOW. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Ryan J. Girdusky [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjn639k5sb967genlrj0npvje60coidgb5cv1ahg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clg6cpr0cth2bs) [**DONATE**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z36jql7kc7ibqaahl419of2n1hvgb3uo9125i658_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clg6cpr0cth2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg8hdkq6sq5nhinmkhie9q9fogpk62sasiaqm51g_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clg6cpr0cth2bs) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z65fhvdhf3otjpk7b33joqc724tmeqift425u7q0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clg6cpr0cth2bs)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

name: John Papola
subject: State of public schools: K through Trainwreck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emergent Order Foundation
body:
Here's a real challenge: try learning something you didn’t want to or choose to learn, by being lectured about it for hours each day... Yeah, I didn’t think so. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8455%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=0TLNv7OkbmMk%2fHOUULX18w&sysid=1)

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12797%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UusNNCFM6F2uBSMtpYkvoQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

Here's a real challenge: try learning something you didn’t want to or choose to learn, by being lectured about it for hours each day...

Yeah, I didn’t think so.

This is why traditional K-12 school sucks. It's forced. It’s boring. It takes too much time for too few results. In fact, it was never really built to educate. It was built to train conformity. **And increasingly, our traditional school system is rigged against children, especially our sons, and shot-through with radical indoctrination.**

As a dad, I believe the most important choice we make for our kids is where and how they will get an education. Dads must play an active role in their kids’ education. Unfortunately, too many kids are being raised without a dad, and then going to a school where boys encounter very few male role models, or worse, an environment that actively denigrates boys and men.

Boys in particular need fathers figures in their lives to model what it means to grow up, be a good person and a good man. I see many of our country's problems stemming from the alarming number of fatherless homes, leaving our kids to be raised by a broken school system for much of their days.

Without men to help raise young boys, here’s what happens:
* Boys are now only half as likely as girls to graduate from college.
* Boys in their twenties are five times as likely as girls to commit suicide.
* Boys’ obesity is increasing; male life expectancy is decreasing--for three consecutive years.
* Dad-deprived boys are much more likely to drop out of high school, resulting in these boys’ unemployment rate exceeding 20% in their early 20's.

There’s only one way I see to solve this problem - make dads the heroes of our stories again.

**That’s why we're creating a brand new online channel called Dad Saves America.** I filmed this video to explain to you the idea behind this exciting project.

[**_Click here or below to watch and learn more about Dad Saves America >>_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12798%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6JYaaAkC7T%2fc%2fTrDakmQFA&sysid=1)

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12797%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UusNNCFM6F2uBSMtpYkvoQ&sysid=1)

I believe deep down many of our problems are festering because we as a society have abandoned fatherhood. And it’s through fatherhood that we can save America.

Dad Saves America will be a YouTube channel that will continuously publish great content which celebrates being a dad, engages expert guests to discuss important issues, and inspires dads to embrace the heroic nature of their role in their family, community, and our country.

**Friend, I am looking to raise $100,000 online to launch Dad Saves America.**

[_**Can you please join me in this journey by donating $10, $35, $100, or more today? Click here to join our fight >>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12799%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QYLC%2bqxrTDNAJirj9qZU%2fA&sysid=1)

What experience do I have? I’ve created viral videos online with MILLIONS of views.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12790%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qnc6N%2fyiVpwwsoBetHklUw&sysid=1)

I have a history of creating documentaries and working with some of the largest media networks.
* For over 10 years, my team and I have produced over $25 million in pro-liberty entertainment and educational content across every major platform for over 85 million viewers worldwide.
* I have worked with Nickelodeon, MTV, MTV2, Comedy Central, Spike, VH1, and Paramount. While serving as the Creative Director for Spike TV, I oversaw and was the creative architect behind the “True Dads” initiative.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12797%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UusNNCFM6F2uBSMtpYkvoQ&sysid=1)

What I’ve come to learn over the years the overwhelming fear-based narrative our country is exposed to is hurting America on a daily basis. It’s time to change the script. Together, we'll create new and heroic stories that embody classical virtues and inspire purposeful action.

Dad Saves America celebrates American freedom, fatherhood, and the potential we have in all of us.

Friend, I am counting on your support to kickstart this epic new story about America’s dads.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12797%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UusNNCFM6F2uBSMtpYkvoQ&sysid=1)

Thank you,

John Papola
Co-Founder & CEO
Emergent Order Foundation
Dad Saves America

Paid for by Emergent Order Foundation

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8455%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=0TLNv7OkbmMk%2fHOUULX18w&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8455%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=0TLNv7OkbmMk%2fHOUULX18w&sysid=1)

name: Team Kiggans
subject: Nonpartisan ethics watchdog calls for investigation into Elaine Luiria after evidence shows she violated federal law.
body:
TEXT "TEAM" to 70609

Good afternoon —

Renowned anti-school choice advocate Elaine Luria has been exposed for failing to disclose that she was once the head of a private school and failed to disclose her position on her 2018 candidate finance forms or her annual congressional reports in both 2019 and 2020.

Now, the nonpartisan watchdog group The Foundation for Accountability and Civic Trust (FACT) is calling for the Office of Congressional Ethics to open an investigation into Elaine Luria for demonstrating an “egregious lack of transparency that erodes public trust and leaves citizens unaware of potential conflicts of interest.”

Another day, another example of how Elaine Luria is just another all-talk, no action, flip-flopping career politician:

After vowing to oppose raising the minimum wage during her 2018 campaign, Elaine flip-flopped, sold her own small business [https://freebeacon.com/democrats/a-democratic-lawmaker-sold-her-small-business-now-she-favors-a-15-minimum-wage/] two weeks before voting with Nancy Pelosi to raise the federal minimum wage in 2019.

After promising to refuse any and all PAC donations during her 2018 campaign, Elaine flip-flopped [https://www.politifact.com/factchecks/2021/feb/05/elaine-luria/elaine-luria-reverses-pledge-refuse-corporate-pac-/] and accepted $34,000 in corporate PAC contributions to settle campaign debt in 2020.

And now, after railing against school-choice for years and refusing to ensure Virginia students of all backgrounds can access the highest quality education, Elaine Luria has been caught red-handed lying to constituents about her own position as President of Tidewater Montessori High School, Inc.

It’s time for Elaine Luria to be held accountable and for the taxpayers of the Second District to have honest representation from their Member of Congress.

In case you missed it...

Ethics Watchdog Calls For Investigation Into Luria’s Private School Ties [https://freebeacon.com/democrats/ethics-watchdog-calls-for-investigation-into-lurias-private-school-ties/]

Swing district Dem failed to disclose her position on financial disclosures

By: Alex Nester

January 14, 2022

A watchdog group is calling for an ethics investigation into a Virginia congresswoman who failed to disclose that she was once the head of private school.

The Foundation for Accountability and Civic Trust (FACT) on Thursday requested [https://65db7681-e755-4cff-abe7-1d9e373df4db.usrfiles.com/ugd/65db76_db4169c03cf94125b0b79855fb514844.pdf] the Office of Congressional Ethics look into Rep. Elaine Luria (D., Va.), whose financial disclosures omitted her role as president of Tidewater Montessori High School, Inc. Virginia corporation filings show [https://freebeacon.com/democrats/elaine-luria-rails-against-school-choice-she-once-was-president-of-a-private-school/] Luria served as president of the school from at least 2015 to 2019. The Washington Free Beacon reported in December that Luria did not list her position on financial disclosure forms in 2018 and 2019, in violation of House ethics rules.

Luria, whose daughter attends a private middle school, railed against school choice and voucher programs on the campaign trail.

"I stand strongly against voucher systems," Luria said in 2018. "I stand strongly against any type of charter schools that would remove funding from our public education, because the public education that we provide across America is the foundation of our future generation."

Freshman representatives must report on their financial disclosure forms any non-federal positions held within two years of their election. Luria did not list her position at Tidewater Montessori High School, Inc. on her 2018 candidate finance forms or her annual congressional reports in 2019 and 2020.

"Whether intentional or not, it seems that Rep. Luria failed to properly disclose her corporate position on any of her Congressional Financial Disclosure Statements," FACT executive director Kendra Arnold said in a statement. "Failing to do so is an egregious lack of transparency that erodes public trust and leaves citizens unaware of potential conflicts of interest."

While many public schools in Virginia remained closed for more than a year over coronavirus concerns, Luria's daughter's school reopened [https://www.ghentmontessorischool.com/covid-19-update/] for in-person learning in the fall of 2020. Luria and other House Democrats in February 2021 blocked [https://www.foxnews.com/politics/house-blocks-quick-consideration-of-school-reopening-legislation] a Republican effort to give federal funds to schools that reopened during the pandemic.

Democrats who oppose school choice often send their children to private schools. Sen. Elizabeth Warren (Mass.) lied about sending her son to a private school when pressed by a school-choice activist, after opposing private and charter schools on the presidential campaign trail in 2019. Former Virginia governor Terry McAuliffe [https://www.nationalreview.com/the-campaign-spot/another-anti-voucher-democrat-kids-best-private-school-jim-geraghty/] vetoed a bill to boost charter school growth in the state, but sent at least four of his kids to the Potomac School in McLean, Va.

Signed,

Jen

DONATE $10 [https://secure.winred.com/kiggans-for-congress/donate?amount=10&utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=Nonpartisan+ethics+watchdog+calls+for+investigation+into+Elaine+Luiria+after+evidence+shows+she+violated+federal+law.] DONATE $25 [https://secure.winred.com/kiggans-for-congress/donate?amount=25&utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=Nonpartisan+ethics+watchdog+calls+for+investigation+into+Elaine+Luiria+after+evidence+shows+she+violated+federal+law.] DONATE $50 [https://secure.winred.com/kiggans-for-congress/donate?amount=50&utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=Nonpartisan+ethics+watchdog+calls+for+investigation+into+Elaine+Luiria+after+evidence+shows+she+violated+federal+law.] DONATE $100 [https://secure.winred.com/kiggans-for-congress/donate?amount=100&utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=Nonpartisan+ethics+watchdog+calls+for+investigation+into+Elaine+Luiria+after+evidence+shows+she+violated+federal+law.] DONATE OTHER [https://secure.winred.com/kiggans-for-congress/donate?utm_source=All+Lists&utm_medium=FR+Email&utm_campaign=Nonpartisan+ethics+watchdog+calls+for+investigation+into+Elaine+Luiria+after+evidence+shows+she+violated+federal+law.]

Jen Kiggans is a veteran of the US Navy. Use of her military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the US Navy or the Deparetment of Defense.

Unsubscribe https://kiggansforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-u-cudtua-yukjlhakt-q/

name: Casey DeSantis
subject: Freedom is Prevailing in Florida
body:
I am grateful every single day to live in Florida. Thanks to the leadership of our great governor and my husband, Ron DeSantis,
[****](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3c35lfujbivqelj0r0ktucdlvgq2aub817sgsd8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clg6cpr2cjh2bs)
Friend,
I am grateful every single day to live in Florida. Thanks to the leadership of our great governor and my husband, Ron DeSantis, **Florida is the freest state in the United States.**
[**CHIP IN $20.22 TO HELP GOVERNOR DESANTIS CONTINUE THE FIGHT FOR FLORIDA >>>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztkcf44cfmcc5gia5nk50rp0odssnt7n0abj5tlg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clg6cpr2cjh2bs)
But across the country, that freedom has come under assault as politicians have cast aside their citizens' liberty. Thankfully, Florida has a governor who stands courageously in the face of sharp opposition to protect our freedom. Thanks to his leadership, Floridians have a right to earn a living without heavy-handed mandates and kids have an opportunity to thrive.
Over the last three years, Governor DeSantis led Florida to record-breaking economic success, which has become the envy of America. Our tax burden is the lowest per capita in the nation, our job growth far outpaces the national average, we are leading the nation in business formations, and our tourism industry is soaring even beyond its pre-pandemic levels. Despite this, federal policies are creating negative headwinds. To that end, Governor DeSantis has proposed a $1 billion gas tax holiday to help Floridians combat rising inflation and gas prices.
With politicians in Democrat-controlled cities and states AGAIN making the disastrous decision to close schools, our governor continues to stand strong for parents and students to keep schools open! We have a governor who is committed to protecting parental rights -- he believes parents must have a say in their child's education, from the curriculum to the decision to vaccinate their child against COVID.
[**CHIP IN TO HELP GOVERNOR DESANTIS KEEP FLORIDA FREE!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv66p9ub519cgsv83uc77n84m3upmtk2tsd7kdq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clg6cpr2cjh2bs "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/freedom-is-prevailing-fl-hf")
Governor DeSantis has banned Critical Race Theory in our schools. He believes that if a child is subjected to any hateful or discriminating propaganda in school, parents should have legal recourse.
As a husband and father, he knows the importance of keeping our communities safe, which is why he has made it clear that Florida stands for law and order. In addition to the $1,000 bonus checks he awarded to first responders last year, he's calling on the legislature to not only issue another round of bonuses this year but to increase pay for state law enforcement by up to 25% and to provide $5,000 bonuses for new officers, including those already serving in other states who want to relocate to Florida.
Keeping our communities safe also requires enforcing our border laws. With the federal government's indifference towards enforcing the rule of law, our governor is taking action. Governor DeSantis banned sanctuary cities and was the first governor to send reinforcements to Texas to help combat the surge taking place at our southern border. He's fought to stop clandestine flights that drop off illegal immigrants in Florida. He is also introducing proposals to stop these relocation efforts and is holding those who help facilitate such underhanded policies accountable.
He understands that enforcing a strong border means protecting our communities by keeping drugs off our streets and out of our children's hands, and he refuses to allow the federal government's human smuggling operation to go on unchallenged. Florida's citizens shouldn't be forced to bear the burden of the federal government's immigration ineptitude.
Florida counted over 11 million ballots on Election Day. Other states took days, if not weeks, to return ballots, ultimately casting doubt on the integrity of our electoral process. To ensure Florida continues to lead, Governor DeSantis banned "Zuckerbucks," ballot harvesting, the mass sending of mail-in ballots and he strengthened our voter ID laws. He's prepared to take additional measures this legislative session to further ensure Floridians have confidence in our election systems.
Florida is in a better place today because of our governor, but his work isn't finished. With an election coming up this November, I know that with your support, together we can continue building upon the rock of freedom Florida has become.
Get ready, Florida - ** _Governor DeSantis has only just begun to fight for you._**
[**Please rush in a contribution to help us continue to hold the line and keep Florida free. Chip in $20.22, $30, or $50 now!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmh42mt16k1pjj2i1o5ckckq20jf071nbv8p8j8o_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clg6cpr2cjh2bs)
Sincerely,
Casey DeSantis

Peter,

_**I'm reaching out personally to make sure you get your name on the list.**_

My campaign is offering hand-signed copies of my book, _Hillbilly Elegy,_ and I do not want you to miss out.

_Peter, if you want to claim your hand-signed copy of Hillbilly Elegy you must chip in $50 or more by 11:59 PM TONIGHT. You won't get another chance._

Peter,

I am beyond proud to offer this to you.

My book, _Hillbilly Elegy,_ is a collection of family history that comes from the heart, and I wore my soul on my sleeve while writing it.

That's why it gives me such immense pride to say I am offering a few limited edition, hand-signed copies to hard-working Patriots like you.

**[Please chip in $50 or more TODAY and claim your limited edition copy of _Hillbilly Elegy_ that I hand-signed for you. >>](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59499362:sBpLvHHiN:m:1:1155937413:DAF80FD62C35C970C1C1540735F4A0E5:r)**

[](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59499362:sBpLvHHiN:m:1:1155937413:DAF80FD62C35C970C1C1540735F4A0E5:r)

**[CHIP IN $250>>](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59499363:sBpLvHHiN:m:1:1155937413:DAF80FD62C35C970C1C1540735F4A0E5:r)**

**[CHIP IN $150>>](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59499364:sBpLvHHiN:m:1:1155937413:DAF80FD62C35C970C1C1540735F4A0E5:r)**

**[CHIP IN $75>>](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59499365:sBpLvHHiN:m:1:1155937413:DAF80FD62C35C970C1C1540735F4A0E5:r)**

**[CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT>>](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59499366:sBpLvHHiN:m:1:1155937413:DAF80FD62C35C970C1C1540735F4A0E5:r)**

This book gives the rest of America a glimpse into what life is like for folks like me and you here in middle America. Peter, I truly believe my experiences in _Hillbilly Elegy_ are shared by so many of us here in the great state of Ohio.

It would make me incredibly proud to share a signed copy with you. So, what are you waiting for? **[Claim it NOW.>>](https://email.granitelists.com/ct/59499362:sBpLvHHiN:m:1:1155937413:DAF80FD62C35C970C1C1540735F4A0E5:r)**

# Bianca Gracia for Texas Senate District 11
---
Everything we’ve been working for is now in front of the Supreme Court!
We could be just days away from the 2020 election being thrown out, but we can’t stop now! I am Bianca Gracia, the President and founder of Latinos for Trump. I’ve spent the past five years fighting for President Trump and the America First Agenda; even now I am fighting to have the illegitimate 2020 election overturned. Now I am running for State Senate in Texas’s open 11th District so that Texas can have Conservative fighters that won’t give up even when faced with the RINOs that run the state now.
Just look at part of our lawsuit;
The truth of the allegations set forth herein compels the shocking conclusion that every member of currently-seated 117th U.S. Congress and the President-Elect, who is scheduled to be sworn in this coming Wednesday, January 20th, were not legitimately elected because the People of the United States were given ballots that were patently illegal under federal law, namely HAVA. Therefore, the entire 117th Congress is illegitimate and all actions taken since January 3, 2021, including the counting of the Electoral College votes and confirmation of Joseph Biden as President-Elect and the impeachment of President Donald J. Trump are null and void.
If not for Liberal and RINO judges this case would have been cleared even before Joe Biden seized power.
I’m proud to be working with Patriots like General Michael Flynn and State Senator Wendy Rogers so that we can decertify and redo the 2020 election before it’s too late to undo the damage the left has done!
With the left tearing our nation apart we need to stand together in this fight to expose the fraud in 2020. Can I count on you to join me in this fight today? We’ve all seen how many RINOs and Cowards pretend to want to fight against the stolen 2020 election, but what do they actually do to get results?
Nothing.
I brough a lawsuit to the halls of the Supreme Court and once elected to Represent the people of Texas I won’t rest until actual election integrity laws are passed. I’m running to get results with your help I know I’ll be successful.
Can I count your support in taking down the RINO Establishment and the Socialist left? It’s only because of great patriots like you that great Conservatives like President Trump and Senator Wendy Rogers have been able to help fight for America! Let’s win this together!
_DONATE $25_
_DONATE $50_
_DONATE $100_
_DONATE $250_
_DONATE $500_
_DONATE $1000_
God bless you,
Bianca Gracia
Candidate for Texas Senate District 11
Mother & Homeschool Teacher
President Latinos for Trump

I’m running to get results with your help I know I’ll be successful. Can I count your support in taking down the RINO Establishment and the Socialist left? It’s only because of great patriots like you that great Conservatives like President Trump and Senator Wendy Rogers have been able to help fight for America! Let’s win this together! name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: What Tucker Carlson said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you’re thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I’ll tell you why. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6769%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=g0NQB4WLq9M2g%2f3i794zVQ&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69758%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e%2fhAXg6TpLXN8SO2gVEvzA&sysid=1) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you’re thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I’ll tell you why. I’ve seen what’s happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I’m sure you have too. All over the country, teachers are brainwashing children to hate themselves and hate their country. They tell students that if they’re white they’re evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they’re black they’re helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. _It’s state sanctioned racism, plain and simple._ **And it doesn’t matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race.** ** ** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help us fight the spread of Critical Race Theory and elect conservatives who care about the truth.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69759%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gSNjCs7dg9axmgkO4tHDHw&sysid=1)** Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won’t survive. _The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it._ They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. **They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back.** The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. **[But there’s something you can do.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69750%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RvyTgw7%2fhVMzGBjfUELOHg&sysid=1)** That’s why I’m writing to you today. Because our fate isn’t sealed -- yet.__But we must act now.__ My name is Ryan Girdusky and I’ve made it my mission to make education sane again. I created the 1776 Project Political Action Committee to do what our politicians won’t and take back our schools. **I’m going state to state and county to county targeting school board elections, campaigning and fundraising for candidates that will take a strong stance against Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project.** But I don’t stand a chance without you. **[Please donate $35 or more to the 1776 Project PAC and save our schools from race-baiting, America-hating Marxists.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69751%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nxJWUwYGlFu9GLzayS6rLA&sysid=1)** And make no mistake -- this isn’t just a California or New York problem. **Critical Race Theory is already being taught in EVERY SINGLE state.** It’s happening from coast to coast, in red, blue and purple states alike. And if we don’t take action, we’ll all pay the price. You and I have to take a stand NOW. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Ryan J. Girdusky [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69758%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e%2fhAXg6TpLXN8SO2gVEvzA&sysid=1) [**DONATE**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69752%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sOo2iYQtMJUdkpwUkKDoFQ&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69753%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jHUa7dhoKPE81Mv9ijUKMw&sysid=1) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69754%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Aai4pEOSlmtr7wbRPyLUig&sysid=1)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

body:

| If you like firearms, then you're in the right place. This is America...
And those of us willing to think for ourselves know how and why we became a country.
That’s right.
We have the right to bear arms...
To spit free speech like a beast...
And to stir up libtard feelings like deer chilly over hot coals...
And nothing gives you **a bigger freedom boner** than open carrying a 1911 with a stick of jerky in one hand...**and this 20oz M-F’er in the other.**
---
| | |
---
| | |
**It’s the ULTIMATE tumbler for patriots ...**
And the only thing better than triggering those safe-space, purple-haired SJWs...
Is watching as this magical mug immediately melts them into liquid snowflake form right before your very eyes.
**BUT – there is a downside...**
And that’s the fact that it has NOT triggered ENOUGH liberals – YET.
And that’s exactly where you come in...and why you’re getting this email today...
Because for a **VERY limited time,** you can get your very own Patriot Tumbler for a whopping **75% OFF.**
So, here’s the deal...
A buddy of mine brought his downtown Austin with him last week and was happy to get an equal “fist bumps to melted snowflakes” ratio.
Because if there was ever a phrase that perfectly embodied how to feel about the
2nd Amendment...
THIS is it.
Not only does it stand as a reminder for those who are too ignorant to know and unwilling to learn...
But this patriotic tumbler helps express the RIGHT attitude about bearing arms AND helping with its continued support – especially in these trying times.
And you have the opportunity to let people know how you feel and what you stand for **by getting yours at a WICKED discount today**.
I even grabbed an extra one for my cousin out in California who loved the message...and snagged one for my pops, who taught me what it REALLY means to be an American.
Whether you’re hitting the open road with the family, taking the boat out on the weekend, or just need to keep a drink at the perfect temp until the end of your shift...
This Patriot Tumbler is the perfect way to show support for (and represent) your rights and freedoms!
So, here’s the deal...
These tumblers usually go for anywhere between $30 and 40$ easy...
But for a limited time, you can grab one for literally A FRACTION OF THAT when you take advantage of this limited-time offer today.
And if getting this beauty for just $10 wasn’t enough of a “HELL YEAH” for you...
Here are some details to help make this decision an absolute no-brainer:
* **Holds up to 20oz of liquid...**
* **It’s double-wall vacuum insulated...**
* **Fits in any car cup holder...**
* **Made of stainless steel...**
* **It’s dishwasher safe...**
* **Laser engraved in the USA...**

AND it’s delivered right to your doorstep in just 3-5 business days.
On top of that, it comes with an iron-clad, 100% Satisfaction Guarantee.
Meaning if you’re not happy with your tumbler for any reason, you can simply call for an easy return with zero hassle.
**Here’s the thing, though...**
This limited-time offer is only available **through the official website[here](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/234/56327/bc568780ae4c7e9e0e44b4c4aa59f6f192838c3c/062d4a8a8b5ef589ac875ccf2c04dfa8e3ad2fb3)** and NOT available in stores.
PLUS – only 1,000 of them are being set aside for this exclusive promo.
And with so many verified patriots springing to grab one for themselves (and 1-2 more for their friends and family members)...
I honestly can’t say how long that limited stock of tumblers will last.
**So click here now to check for availability, and secure your 75% discount before it disappears.**
_Just see what a handful of happy customers
had to share after snagging theirs..._
“**Wow this cup is as nice as that name brand mug everyone pays so much for**. Put ice in when I got it and a drink. Wake up this morning still as cold as yesterday afternoon and it looks like no ice melted...”
* Ryan M.

“**Love these mugs we have two of them** , they keep ice all day and there is still ice in them the next day . I have not tried anything hot in them. Love that they are delivered from the USA!!!! I do everything I can not to buy things from China!!”
* Lisa L.

“**The feeling of drinking from this beautiful American made tumbler** with such high quality engraving is compared to none! Yes there are other brands of tumblers but this is something special! The heaviness of the Tumbler plus the leak proof ability is something amazing...”
* Kaden W.

“**This has helped spark a lot of positive conversations** and I really like that! Definitely worth it. I loved it so much I ordered a second one for my husband. He uses it for everything!
* Stephanie L.

**So, if you want to show your support for the 2****nd****Amendment with an awesome tumbler that:**
* Pisses off libtards without having to utter a word...
* Melt’s snowflakes even when its 20 below outside...
* Reveals fellow patriots via fist bumps and compliments...
* And expresses YOUR FEELINGS concerning your Constitutional rights to the PC crowd...

## [**> > Click here to claim your Patriot Tumbler and activate your 75% OFF coupon now... **](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/234/56327/bc568780ae4c7e9e0e44b4c4aa59f6f192838c3c/062d4a8a8b5ef589ac875ccf2c04dfa8e3ad2fb3)

**And don’t miss out on your chance to get YOURS today!**
**Thank You.** PS – this is not something we can offer again any time soon – so don’t miss out on this limited opportunity. [**Get your 2****nd****Amendment Patriot Tumbler for just $10 now while supplies last**.](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/234/56327/bc568780ae4c7e9e0e44b4c4aa59f6f192838c3c/062d4a8a8b5ef589ac875ccf2c04dfa8e3ad2fb3)

And if this ‘merica tumbler makes people uncomfortable, then their whiny little minds just don’t get it.

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: Thank you for standing with me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
| | | |
---
---
---
|
---
|
---

Dear Friend,
Have you seen all the recent reports conjecturing about people who might be lining up to get into the Governor's race?
It's the same old political calculus we always see.
Republicans who pick and choose what administration they're going to support based on political connections, rather than a strong core of conservative ideals, are desperate to keep you - the heart and soul of our party - from finally having your voice heard.
Well, guess what? I'm not going to let them win. I stand with you.
When I announced my candidacy back on July 4 last year, I didn't need a poll to tell me whether or not I should run, and I didn't base my decision on who else might be in the race. I decided to run for Governor for one reason - I want to bring strong leadership to Beacon Hill to fight for your rights, protect your tax dollars, and make our state government more accountable.
Are you with me?
---
---
Geoff Diehl Republican Candidate for Governor

Be thankful for the **2nd Amendment**. It is beyond imperative that we FIGHT this evil that has crept into our nation. We fight with our **TIME** , **TALENT** and **TREASURE**! If we will fight, we will win. Also, if you live in Oklahoma and would be willing to host me at your home or business with 10+ friends for a meet & greet in 2022 that would be incredibly helpful. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40789506/325959485/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTIzYjBlZC02Njc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AqHxzH3fgnwYV_2pD7mXY0Bl7XH0nhk3rOts4p-227A=&emci=4f97c8be-2378-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7923b0ed-6678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40789507/325959487/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTIzYjBlZC02Njc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AqHxzH3fgnwYV_2pD7mXY0Bl7XH0nhk3rOts4p-227A=&emci=4f97c8be-2378-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7923b0ed-6678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
When a candidate for office asks you to lend them your support — you should be confident about what they stand for.
[**After over 36 years serving in the United States Navy, I'm home to unseat Chuck Grassley and become the next Senator from Iowa — and I'm writing today to ask you to become a 2022 donor to this campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40789508/325959488/-42398318?refcode=em20220118am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTIzYjBlZC02Njc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AqHxzH3fgnwYV_2pD7mXY0Bl7XH0nhk3rOts4p-227A=)
So, here's some substance about where I stand on the issues:
* Every American should enjoy comprehensive healthcare. That includes dental, mental, and preventive care, and ultimately, Medicare available to all who need it.

* The threat posed by the climate crisis is enormous, but so are the benefits we can enjoy by addressing it. That’s especially true in Iowa thanks to renewed leadership in agriculture and bioenergy.

* It's appalling that large corporations and the very wealthy pay a lower tax rate than ordinary Iowans. It's time to stop giving working families a raw deal and start eliminating loopholes for the ultra-rich.

* Too many of our students right here in Iowa don't get the quality of education they deserve. We need to pay our teachers what they're worth, and we can take steps to improve education in rural areas by making sure they get their fair share of per-student spending.

* And finally, I believe that Americans deserve a movement of steel-jawed Democrats who win with the first punch and don't back down. We don't need to coddle Chuck Grassley and others who were aware of attempts to overthrow our democracy; we need to show them the barn door.

[**If all of this sounds right to you, then there is something you can do about it: Chip into our campaign today. We're running this race the right way, focusing on our vision for the future of every Iowan and every American — and your gift today will help make sure voters hear our message.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40789509/325959489/-42398318?refcode=em20220118am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTIzYjBlZC02Njc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AqHxzH3fgnwYV_2pD7mXY0Bl7XH0nhk3rOts4p-227A=)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Hello, When a candidate for office asks you to lend them your support — you should be confident about what they stand for. = So, here's some substance about where I stand on the issues: Every American should enjoy comprehensive healthcare. That includes dental, mental, and preventive care, and ultimately, Medicare available to all who need it. The threat posed by the climate crisis is enormous, but so are the benefits we can enjoy by addressing it. That’s especially true in Iowa thanks to renewed leadership in agriculture and bioenergy. It's appalling that large corporations and the very wealthy pay a lower tax rate than ordinary Iowans. It's time to stop giving working families a raw deal and start eliminating loopholes for the ultra-rich. Too many of our students right here in Iowa don't get the quality of education they deserve. We need to pay our teachers what they're worth, and we can take steps to improve education in rural areas by making sure they get their fair share of per-student spending. * And finally, I believe that Americans deserve a movement of steel-jawed Democrats who win with the first punch and don't back down. We don't need to coddle Chuck Grassley and others who were aware of attempts to overthrow our democracy; we need to show them the barn door. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I've said this before, but I'll repeat it here. I think you deserve a Senator who is pragmatic enough to achieve what’s achievable, but bold enough to aim for what we haven't yet been able to achieve. It's my sincere hope I can be that Senator for you. Thanks for your support, and thanks for doing what it takes to win this election. Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)
