name: Rep. Val Demings
subject: I can't do this without you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Grassroots supporters like you propelled my campaign launch to historic heights
| | |
---
Friend,

I want you to hear this directly from me: I cannot win in Florida without you. **And right now, as I'm coming up short of my midnight goal, I have nowhere else to turn. **
Polling in my race shows the numbers are close (I'm just 2 points behind Marco Rubio!). That's a statistical tie, but The Cook Political Report also increased my chances of winning. I need to surge _ahead_ , friend – _ _ and the only way to do it is by hitting my midnight fundraising goal. Missing this goal isn't an option.
Running a campaign in Florida is expensive – and Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points (_10,033 votes_), so every dollar will make a difference. With the Senate Republican campaign arm pulling in over $28 million last quarter, **missing my goal could cost Floridians and our country a meaningful win.**
Grassroots supporters like you propelled my campaign launch to historic heights. _Your_ support fueled The Cook Political Report to increase my odds of winning. And this grassroots team is the reason political pundits across the board are saying I have what it takes to defeat Sen. Marco Rubio.
So, friend, here I am, writing to you again. I know you hear a lot from me, but it's only because I _trust_ you and _believe_ that I can't do this without you. Please, if you can spare any donation before midnight to close our fundraising gap, it would mean the world to me.
Here's the best link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40792517/325971279/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2130-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjdlODRjZi02Yjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SMb_rbGw0bJ36sg09JcJgP_gfmiBpOteNKVlHTDJays=)
Thank you so much for your support,

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40792518/325971280/-892300846?refcode=jtk2130-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjdlODRjZi02Yjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SMb_rbGw0bJ36sg09JcJgP_gfmiBpOteNKVlHTDJays=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40792519/325971281/1804727444?refcode=jtk2130-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjdlODRjZi02Yjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SMb_rbGw0bJ36sg09JcJgP_gfmiBpOteNKVlHTDJays=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40792520/325971282/-460395862?refcode=jtk2130-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjdlODRjZi02Yjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SMb_rbGw0bJ36sg09JcJgP_gfmiBpOteNKVlHTDJays=&emci=e63f7686-5575-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=827e84cf-6b78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic.

clean_body: Grassroots supporters like you propelled my campaign launch to historic heights | | | Friend, I want you to hear this directly from me: I cannot win in Florida without you. And right now, as I'm coming up short of my midnight goal, I have nowhere else to turn. Polling in my race shows the numbers are close (I'm just 2 points behind Marco Rubio!). That's a statistical tie, but The Cook Political Report also increased my chances of winning. I need to surge ahead , friend – and the only way to do it is by hitting my midnight fundraising goal. Missing this goal isn't an option. Running a campaign in Florida is expensive – and Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points (10,033 votes), so every dollar will make a difference. With the Senate Republican campaign arm pulling in over $28 million last quarter, missing my goal could cost Floridians and our country a meaningful win. Grassroots supporters like you propelled my campaign launch to historic heights. Your support fueled The Cook Political Report to increase my odds of winning. And this grassroots team is the reason political pundits across the board are saying I have what it takes to defeat Sen. Marco Rubio. So, friend, here I am, writing to you again. I know you hear a lot from me, but it's only because I trust you and believe that I can't do this without you. Please, if you can spare any donation before midnight to close our fundraising gap, it would mean the world to me. Here's the best link: = Thank you so much for your support, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. name: Heidi St. John
subject: You can find me here
body:
Dear Peter,

A little over six months from today is election day here in Washington State.

After a great 4th quarter of 2021, **our momentum is surging** , we're running ads across the district, campaign staff and volunteers are inspired, and we're drawing up plans right now to WIN this race.

**As we head toward that finish line, I want to be able to stay in touch with my supporters not only here in Southwest Washington, but across the country.**

Please see the links below and follow the progress of our campaign using your preferred platform!

[**Follow me on Telegram - > CLICK HERE**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59500403:W1xPDHHNM:m:1:2503513073:7F37783F278443C04CDA6FEB664358DB:r)

[**Follow me on GETTR - > CLICK HERE**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59500404:W1xPDHHNM:m:1:2503513073:7F37783F278443C04CDA6FEB664358DB:r)

[**Follow me on Facebook - > CLICK HERE**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59500405:W1xPDHHNM:m:1:2503513073:7F37783F278443C04CDA6FEB664358DB:r)

[**Follow me on Instagram - > CLICK HERE **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59500406:W1xPDHHNM:m:1:2503513073:7F37783F278443C04CDA6FEB664358DB:r)

[**Follow me on Twitter - > CLICK HERE**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59500407:W1xPDHHNM:m:1:2503513073:7F37783F278443C04CDA6FEB664358DB:r)

[**Subscribe to my YouTube - > CLICK HERE**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59500408:W1xPDHHNM:m:1:2503513073:7F37783F278443C04CDA6FEB664358DB:r)

[**Sign up for my email list - > CLICK HERE **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59500409:W1xPDHHNM:m:1:2503513073:7F37783F278443C04CDA6FEB664358DB:r)

[**Visit my campaign website - > CLICK HERE **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59500410:W1xPDHHNM:m:1:2503513073:7F37783F278443C04CDA6FEB664358DB:r)

As always, thank you for your prayers, encouragement and financial support!

**For freedom,

Heidi St. John
Republican for Congress**
[**www.HeidiStJohnForCongress.com**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59500411:W1xPDHHNM:m:1:2503513073:7F37783F278443C04CDA6FEB664358DB:r)

P.S. Hundreds of my supporters love their new "NO MORE MANDATES" t-shirts . . . [**If you'd like to get one for yourself, please CLICK BELOW**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59500412:W1xPDHHNM:m:1:2503513073:7F37783F278443C04CDA6FEB664358DB:r)!

subject: new year, higher stakes

body:
Mark Holland for Senate

| We are checking, did you see Mark’s message?

The stakes are higher than ever. The GOP is ramping up their fundraising like never before, and we need to show out in our first month of 2022.

Mark is dedicated to being accountable to the people of Kansas and protecting **_everyone's access to the ballot box._**

[He knows what works and has the experience to prove it – Washington needs leadership like him. Are you able to donate to his campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40794392/325983090/-1390744932?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_220118_3_1&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDhkNzI5MS03MDc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0NHoB3UM5_B4auaSQiwpO83L-79zXLi5M8NeVlS8cis=)

**_–Begin Message from Mark Holland–_**
As you know I am a proud fourth generation Kansan, father, pastor, and former mayor. No matter which of these hats I’m wearing, I have always believed that everyone’s voice must be heard.

Recently we have seen unprecedented attacks on access to the ballot box. As the far-right extremists gain momentum across the country, **it's more important than ever to elect people who will protect and restore voting rights.**

[Will you consider a contribution today of $10? It’s people like you that make our campaign possible. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40794393/325983091/-1390744932?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_220118_3_1&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDhkNzI5MS03MDc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0NHoB3UM5_B4auaSQiwpO83L-79zXLi5M8NeVlS8cis=) | | [GIVE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40794394/325983092/-1390744932?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_220118_3_1&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDhkNzI5MS03MDc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0NHoB3UM5_B4auaSQiwpO83L-79zXLi5M8NeVlS8cis=)

I want to tell you more about the importance of this race and what’s on the line.

While I’ve spent my life serving others and protecting voting rights, Jerry Moran has answered to millionaires, special interest donors and has obstructed equal voting access — **putting his needs above our constituents.**

Listen, even here in Kansas there are bad actors trying to strip voting rights from our citizens. We must stop these whack-a-mole attacks with comprehensive protection at the federal level. **_That's why I'm running for Senate: I am accountable to the people of Kansas._**

[This campaign is powered by passionate people like you — and I need your support now more than ever. Will you stand with me in this fight and contribute any amount today? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40794395/325983093/-1390744932?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_220118_3_1&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDhkNzI5MS03MDc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0NHoB3UM5_B4auaSQiwpO83L-79zXLi5M8NeVlS8cis=)

Mark

name: Nikki Fried
subject: How we celebrated MLK Jr.
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,

Yesterday, I joined the Martin Luther King Jr. Day Parade in Miami to celebrate Dr. King’s legacy and show my commitment to continuing his fight for justice and racial equality.

And if you missed it, don’t worry — we took plenty of pictures!
It was a privilege to spend the day in Miami, remembering Dr. King, celebrating how far we’ve come, and remembering how much work lies ahead to fulfill the dream that inspired millions.

Thank you to everyone who joined us for the parade and to everyone who took some time yesterday to reflect on Dr. King’s legacy and how we can continue his work together.

With thanks,
Nikki

name: Roger Marshall
subject: HANNITY: Fauci owes an apology!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/2974306129d2dbf6/61ed78cb5e85e447c3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
# **Friend — Last night, I joined Sean Hannity to talk about my fight to hold Fauci accountable and last week’s hearing, where Fauci called me a “moron.” **

---
Here’s what Hannity said about it: _“Good work. I think he owes you an apology!” _
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/2974306129d2dbf6/79d0b54be708802fc3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
I’m not holding my breath for an apology from a lifelong bureaucrat like Fauci, but I am keeping up the fight for accountability and transparency. [**If you’re with me, then I hope you’ll help me send Fauci a message NOW by chipping in whatever you can.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/2974306129d2dbf6/821a05b9e8140e0ec3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
[**SEND FAUCI A MESSAGE »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/2974306129d2dbf6/2e34ca2e31a5b140c3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
Fauci has spent the last two years justifying tyrannical lockdowns and mandates — all while dodging tough questions about his behavior and financial records. **He really owes the American people an apology, because you deserve better.** **And that’s exactly what I’m fighting for.[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll take action and send Fauci a message NOW.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/2974306129d2dbf6/3a2c2adbfdce1d25c3d6b838967d376c/37973)**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/2974306129d2dbf6/cf60f064ab3c6a70c3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
Senator Roger Marshall
---
[**SEND FAUCI A MESSAGE »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/2974306129d2dbf6/10c4288cc6eedfc0c3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
| | |
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/2974306129d2dbf6/b19f5a3c3ecce6cdc3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith. **He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help.** We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694&c=37973&jid=2974306129d2dbf6&d=7122eedd6ef7ce29c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694&c=37973&jid=2974306129d2dbf6).

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Biden’s top 5 failures of 2021
body:
Now that 2021 is over, I looked over everything Biden did (and didn’t do) last year and came up with a list of what I think are his top 5 failures.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rp7133thnIVUu-M063RY4l0OvPa_VqWW6Nk2pGH8owKJc0X_ha5cWw3dE625fHSGHLUXFLU8hbdcRpwiGxjPn4r6O_w1PJb_KcP-tM3dCJ-021ph2Z8qx2Cb-jugNy9HMRu-BKpoQ3dN-_mZu66ObwpOSA-GazaEq3MfS-_i3GKIr8M4G7sYnA==&c=XJaGq8nZjsEJ-yo4NK0wYf1WyqoLnwN6kyUntFJWjpcd4u-b3hb-qQ==&ch=HQIxwWUcS-BerS6MwVvYccw0wEa5eS2ucJfP-yWTuCuGzxn-tDyNHQ==)
---
| Peter
Now that 2021 is over, I looked over everything Biden did (and didn't do) last year and came up with a list of what I think are his top 5 failures.
---
| 1\. Inflation. Inflation up 6.8%--the highest it's been in 30 years. That's a huge jump from when it was just 1.4% during Trump's last year in office.
2\. COVID Employer Mandates. Biden has tried to illegally use the power of the federal government to force mask and vaccine mandates on private businesses.
3\. DOJ Conspiring with Teacher Unions. Parents across the country are protesting against Critical Race Theory being taught in schools. Now, the DOJ and the teacher's unions have gone so far as to label some of these parents as "terrorists."
4\. Afghanistan Withdrawal. Biden incorrectly handled withdrawing our troops from Afghanistan. He surrendered our most effective evacuation facility (Bagram Airfield) before safely evacuating American civilians and civil servants.
5\. Destroying America's Energy Independence. In Biden's early days in office, he crippled America when he recommitted America to the Paris Climate Accords, which restricts America while giving countries like China a pass.
---
| Peter, [we cannot wait for 2024 to defeat Biden. We must defeat the radical Left in Congress this year. Will you donate $20.22, $50, $100, or any amount today? clean_body: Now that 2021 is over, I looked over everything Biden did (and didn’t do) last year and came up with a list of what I think are his top 5 failures. | | | | | | == | Peter Now that 2021 is over, I looked over everything Biden did (and didn't do) last year and came up with a list of what I think are his top 5 failures. | 1\. Inflation. Inflation up 6.8%--the highest it's been in 30 years. That's a huge jump from when it was just 1.4% during Trump's last year in office. 2\. COVID Employer Mandates. Biden has tried to illegally use the power of the federal government to force mask and vaccine mandates on private businesses. 3\. DOJ Conspiring with Teacher Unions. Parents across the country are protesting against Critical Race Theory being taught in schools. Now, the DOJ and the teacher's unions have gone so far as to label some of these parents as "terrorists." 4\. Afghanistan Withdrawal. Biden incorrectly handled withdrawing our troops from Afghanistan. He surrendered our most effective evacuation facility (Bagram Airfield) before safely evacuating American civilians and civil servants. 5\. Destroying America's Energy Independence. In Biden's early days in office, he crippled America when he recommitted America to the Paris Climate Accords, which restricts America while giving countries like China a pass. | Peter, == Biden has already done so much damage to our great country in just 1 year, we cannot give him free rein for another 3 years. You and I only have one chance to defeat him and save our country from the hands of the Left. Conservatives must take back the Senate in 2022! When I'm elected, I will oppose the Biden administration's socialist agenda. I refuse to spend any more of your tax dollars on wasteful programs that simply do not work. Will you generously contribute and help me win a seat in the Senate? Click any link below to donate today. == == == == == == == == == Thank you, Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate | | | | | == | www.GibbonsforOhio.com | | Gibbons for Ohio | 1650 E 55th St, #603679, Cleveland, OH 44103 | | Sent by mailto:info@gibbonsforohio.com powered by

name: Rushern Baker
subject: sticking together
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Friend,
This race is getting more intense every day, and I’m hoping your continued support can carry us across the finish line. The momentum we’re building with our hardworking and dedicated volunteers is truly incredible. So many Marylanders have chosen to get involved – and whether they’re on the ground knocking on doors or giving a contribution to this campaign I’m so grateful.
In order to accommodate such a fast growing operation, the reality is that we need to be bringing in more resources.
So I’m directly asking you for a donation today. I’m confident we can keep this thing going if we stick together. Can you help? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Thank you,

Rushern L. Baker, III
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
**P.S. because of Maryland’s Public Finance program, your donation will be eligible for a matching program explained here [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40797958/325999689/-420428835?refcode=20220118_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjgzZWEzOS03ODc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aepQsZ8Ox6ScxAs1UMpSRW6TaMQonmA5RxxMc3MmcCU=) Friend - I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrats up for reelection this year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record. Here's why: experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal.** **So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:[ please, split $25 or more right now – as much as you can spare by midnight tonight – between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40797959/325999690/-392698372?refcode=20220118_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjgzZWEzOS03ODc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aepQsZ8Ox6ScxAs1UMpSRW6TaMQonmA5RxxMc3MmcCU=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40797960/325999691/-420428835?refcode=20220118_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjgzZWEzOS03ODc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aepQsZ8Ox6ScxAs1UMpSRW6TaMQonmA5RxxMc3MmcCU=)
As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: **with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat.** That's why we have to fight back _now_ – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. **The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late:** [**Please, split a donation of $25 or more now between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC – before our crucial midnight deadline – to help us fight back against GOP attacks, keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40797961/325999692/-392698372?refcode=20220118_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjgzZWEzOS03ODc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aepQsZ8Ox6ScxAs1UMpSRW6TaMQonmA5RxxMc3MmcCU=) I appreciate it – thank you so much. – Raphael Warnock [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40797962/325999693/-420428835?refcode=20220118_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjgzZWEzOS03ODc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aepQsZ8Ox6ScxAs1UMpSRW6TaMQonmA5RxxMc3MmcCU=)

I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:= = As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat. That's why we have to fight back now – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late: = I appreciate it – thank you so much. – Raphael Warnock = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Abby Finkenauer

body:
I was taught the meaning of hard work
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40798019/325999891/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk572-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWY1MWI2My03ODc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yy-fdc6wpjpGqIip8m4RFcqmE951NX_I2WrsCuhP2Mg=)
Peter: I know that you've heard from me a lot recently about our race to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA) – but today I have a special story to tell you and I hope you'll take a moment to read it.
If you know anything about Iowa politics, you know that we take our presidential caucuses – and all the festivities leading up to them – very seriously. So, back in 2019, when I had eight Democratic candidates and hundreds of voters attending my Finkenauer Fish Fry event, there was a bit of pressure, to say the least. People were going to be eager to talk politics – and just as eager to eat.
Thankfully, I come from a family that knows the meaning of hard work – and the importance of showing up for each other when we need it.
So when I asked for my mom's help, she was there. **My mom baked nearly 1,000 cupcakes for our guests – chocolate, pumpkin, red velvet, you name it.** And when she ran out of space to store them in our freezer, she used my dad's pickup truck, the cold weather and some classic Iowan problem-solving to improvise a second freezer to fit them all.
But trust me, 1,000 cupcakes are nothing compared to everything my family has done for me – I wouldn't be where I am today without them. They taught me the value of hard work and the power of a scrappy, passionate team. **That's how I became the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue – and it's how I'm going to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley to become the youngest woman elected to the Senate.**
Listen, the numbers are on our side: Nearly two-thirds of voters here don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley. We can win but only with hardworking people like you who care about flipping this seat blue, fighting for working families and protecting our Senate majority. **[That's why today I'm asking you to make a contribution to my campaign of $5, or whatever you can spare, to my campaign so that we have the resources to defeat Sen. Grassley, bring new leadership to Iowa and protect our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40798020/325999892/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk572-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWY1MWI2My03ODc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yy-fdc6wpjpGqIip8m4RFcqmE951NX_I2WrsCuhP2Mg=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40798021/325999893/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk572-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWY1MWI2My03ODc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yy-fdc6wpjpGqIip8m4RFcqmE951NX_I2WrsCuhP2Mg=)
---
I know that we're going to win this thing – one dollar, or one cupcake, at a time. Thank you for standing with me.

– Abby

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Big Lie is bull? + 1/6 Committee Digest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=1)
---
Friend -- Did you see Donald Trump's recent rally, at which he said "the BIG LIE is a lot of bull****," rewrote history to fit his self-aggrandizing fantasies, and lashed out at me and the other members of what he calls the "1/6 Unselect Committee of political hacks"? It was stomach turning -- not because of the childish insults (I couldn't care less) or that he continues to lie about the election and celebrate the insurrection, but because he's conned so many Americans into worshipping at the feet of a sore-loser who still refuses to concede defeat. And as much as we'd like to ignore his antics and pretend he's harmless, we've got to admit the truth: He's dangerous, and it's up to Republicans, Democrats, and Independents to call out his lies and stand up for democracy. I, for one, have refused to be silent, and I'm not going anywhere. Regardless of whether I have a title, I will fight to save our Republic from the authoritarian and autocratic threat Trump and his lackeys pose to America.

Country First is part of a vitally important constellation of organizations seeking to take on the most toxic "Trump First" partisans -- up and down the ballot. We will unveil our first-of-its-kind strategy, called "Primary First," in time for our 1st Birthday later this month. I'm very excited for you to learn all about it and help bring it to life! I do not take for granted the trust you've placed in me to usher our movement through this turbulent chapter of American history, and I'm humbled by your continued support. Your investment in Country First -- whether it be your [time](https://www.country1st.com/get_involved?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=2), [money](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=3), or helping to spread the word -- helps us preserve democracy and pass a better, brighter America to our kids and grandkids. I have faith the good we do today will be compounded over time, and I'm excited by what we can do together.

With great appreciation, I remain yours in service.

Country First,

Adam | [](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=4 "Support our Mission") [Support our Mission](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=4)
---
* * *
* * *
* * *
## 1/6 Committee Weekly Digest
Country First presents the next edition of The Weekly Digest to highlight the important work of the January 6th Select Committee. Each week that the committee makes news, we’ll provide a recap to make sure you’re up to date. **In Case You Missed It:**
* Rep. Kinzinger [speaking](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZLL1uggQVDBJK7r8gJw-iE&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=5) on MSNBC on the anniversary of the attack.
* Rep. Kinzinger speaking with Chuck Todd on Social Media [Disinformation](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRb5wf4LBW0i40QBqMa9KW90&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=6) and 1/6
* Rep. Kinzinger [criticizes](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRb5wf4LBW0i40QBqMa9KW90&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=7) Trump on Fox News.
* Rep. Kinzinger talks with GMA to give an [update ](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRbXIPq4v6a9BhbhHzpcMmNz&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=8)on 1/6 commission.

**New Requests for Information from 1/6 Committee:**
* House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy (R-CA)
* Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH)
* Rep. Scott Perry (R-PA)
* Sean Hannity (Fox News)

Here are the major developments from this past week: **The 1/6 Committee Calls Out McCarthy and other GOP Members for their Comments on the Insurrection** The 1/6 Committee is firing back after members of the GOP, including House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy (R-CA) [questioned](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GmrkqIvTVM5Gw19P8OEWnqPAtIHhAMxU89vlTUXNYDYQmyt3fftOoEcuxYqeCeVLFjG0OIWZeVW6Uk7OB4GfnLeGG9HeJCOC3g_9ZBc2qFNGlDt-YOCCiOfR2oh-uYGJVSlNFKweexaOE8b0EL0CwYaFZfE2ABqegdfpbSMn31c&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=9) the legitimacy of the investigation. The committee responded to the allegations in its first detailed legal response in a filing Wednesday night. Chairman Bennie Thompson (D-MS) responded to Minority Leader McCarthy saying, "We have information that he made calls to the White House, telling him [Trump] he needed to call the people off and for whatever reason, he decided not to come to the committee and say what many things he said in public." McCarthy has been dodging questions about responding to the questions the committee wants to ask him. Recently, McCarthy has decided not to [respond](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=PiInCVHjZg_Lhb0RQ-dhd2pKCmU6OURoFRTuJDLKwsf6AKoiRULEbj6gDNBD53XlflOVjBVye-jLNDcjh4yjiWmTLUV68nO32fSgDTLQvlJeQMaNDlWZK70UaZWNiFN4&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=10) to the request of the January 6th committee to answer questions. McCarthy has also backtracked his initial statements that the former president had any involvement in the planning or unfolding of the events that conspired on January 6th. As a reminder, [here](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=B-xMNSNcDpdY3m1jne-HGcsuwYlw_opcx4mcmQJcQv19H5vV3pjS1vtvUzOyrL_pE0B7intwWi34er7JE_B6_G-yoKffhS5suo7bd8r6Bh3Kh84H9TuVfRv4EZhwpicjkVPKgoYEEvt31OSZyjz8zd_nLNYDgZvA4ozu-2yhuEY&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=11) is Congressman McCarthy’s speech on January 13, 2021, condemning the former president for his inaction on January 6th. **Extremist group, the Oath Keepers, leaders Indicted on the Most Serious Charges Yet** On January 13, just over a year after the attack on the Capitol, the leader of the extremist group known as the Oath Keepers, Stewart Rhodes, was [indicted](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GmrkqIvTVM5Gw19P8OEWnrRejkeuiMqP-NSYE4bWmYEMKRjLJjUYCa1yYAKW6_w2skcBboYA9p-667IOn73U5dyB4LmQO7-rg1B-cDNgyZr5cA9W0fIgdo8iuBgIvWJAkluHAVGfaACayOQB584LAuG0lwTrvar7QCFyvNpfzJc&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=12) on 17 counts of seditious conspiracy. Along with Rhodes, 10 others in the extremist group, including Edward Vallejo of Phoenix, were also indicted on the same charges. Seditious conspiracy is the most serious charge that has been brought against people who were involved in the attack at the Capitol. Often referred to treason’s sibling, seditious conspiracy is punishable by up to 20 years in prison. A federal grand jury in Washington, DC handed down the indictment days after Attorney General Merrick Garland [reaffirmed](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=nPFaTKas50gnV2FjfYL96sZxSzAr6rJ48z74_MHyOAtzUeQhSPRwVArcpMM07twkoLSj1R6hT-KG4grA6lFmlML9YyqM1IUz-DCkDSH11n30Dgo6uTHZe4rBboyfQOeJpFxk3exEiMnZTq_8rxYSCO_nLTx0GwDlpKjA-p2C7yM&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=13) his commitment to prosecuting the perpetrators of the attempted coup. The DOJ produced a news [release](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=nPFaTKas50gnV2FjfYL96jOsTthFk4PsZcq20pl4Ps7ZjFifRNUtgux4960XQvo5Gjv9jErva5SyeY4JD-kyZBcq96MPu0vuIc5Z0RGesKvh1EdZYHv-rYBUACtF2UDxb00vrBoYilKEWX8D-TtSfr5INec_PLL4OJUPmN_r85M&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=14) saying, in part, "According to the seditious conspiracy charge, the defendants conspired through a variety of manners and means, including: organizing into teams that were prepared and willing to use force and to transport firearms and ammunition into Washington, DC." The indictment goes on to accuse the 11 of recruiting members and holding trainings to teach combat tactics as well as providing weaponry and protective equipment to their members. **Federal Judge Rejects Proud Boys First Amendment Claim in Conspiracy Case** In an opinion issued last week, Judge Timothy Kelly [rejected](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHlxVTewBlhh3x5sgxmuWEbyhyZbNoaZ-c_B6pthtud1OJR_Xbzhrj0ILJlCWIOGoWQFCvAdovxSR7cWO-HxIhII&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=15) the far-right extremist group known as the “Proud Boys” claim that their actions on January 6th are protected under the 1st Amendment. Proud Boys leaders Joseph Biggs, Charles Donohoe, Ethan Nordean, and Zachary Rehl were [charged](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHqnhaWRSmpsw_zLkOQf-ugKqYAkzRm1-SgKQXiIohzRSEqzHznOYstgnrOx6rsxxDGRVohAe6LqpeKUaaxN5EQGiOgHMGDmfCKBFgF13LiEV&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=16) with conspiracy and obstruction among other felonies for planning the brutal attack at the Capitol. The obstruction charge carries a 20-year maximum prison term. Judge Kelly, wrote "No matter Defendants political motivations or any political message they wished to express, this alleged conduct is simply not protected by the First Amendment," the **Trump-appointed judge** continued saying, "Quite obviously, there were many avenues for Defendants to express their opinions about the 2020 presidential election... without resorting to the conduct with which they have been charged." This ruling is unique because it is a separate case from the case against another far-right extremist group, the Oath Keepers. **January 6 Committee Looking to Release Interim Report Mid-Summer** The 1/6 Committee, including Congressman Kinzinger, is seeking to ensure the American people are aware of the serious information it has uncovered. According to senior committee aides, the committee has a [goal](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GjwzQmjoNJNKZ7-eUAZR_PA_nNH0Da_jCJ3Safw4xOtuRXVi1mmsX8HQduMGZW4uWUzu6NqXMXwfBil74ev_kZ-BvT-BZkN73epg1xIFQrrBOq6HPfwxnCsq5hYy_iQafnNaj-2KcOIMWC2vpGJsFn4_FzQzPsW51vKt42sLfeWIaQooD1t3xxqAcUSSC_KE&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=17) of releasing an interim report in the summer of 2022, with a goal of releasing a final report before the end of the year. The committee has split into five teams and are looking for, "information on the money and funding streams for the 'Stop the Steal' rallies and events; the misinformation and online extremist activity; how agencies across the government were preparing for the January 6 rally; the pressure campaigns to overturn the election results or delay the electoral certification; and the organizers of the various events and plans for undermining the election," the Washington Post reported Dec. 27. While some witnesses have been reluctant to comply with subpoenas issued, the committee has collected over 9,000 documents and records from former Chief of Staff Mark Meadows alone, with many members of Congress still to be subpoenaed. The commission also plans to hold public hearings in 2022. **Federal Judge Rejects Trump’s Claim of Peaceful January 6 Protesters** On Monday, US district Judge Amit Mehta handed Trump's lawyers another [blow](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GUadKUZbNtXpoQtrN7XiLlDAp0T1nvsEvUIUmB084zF2E_x7FTYDcZkJiog495UkhXNBpZqUgiyqhG9fzLrKXUugOJK0_8KJPW4UZd0p9e6m6JkpFyCQt8bOoQ9aZEH1_Xj6JjLpI6SGh6x10S4LRg&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=18), telling them to "stick with the facts" when they claimed Trump urged his supporters to stay peaceful. Judge Mehta said that Trump did not, "take to Twitter... and say 'Stop. Get out of the Capitol. What you are doing is not what I wanted to do,'" in a court hearing on Monday. A federal judge required the lawyers for the former president to reckon with his silence during the attack at the Capitol, asking whether the president’s action or lack thereof could be considered an endorsement of the violence that occurred. Trump’s lawyer pushed back, saying that the former president could not face legal action for his inaction. **Select Committee Issued Subpoenas to Social Media Companies** Social Media companies including Twitter, Reddit, Facebook, and Google were [subpoenaed](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=Y1JQzDDPf_G40AL8Qe4860pOUcQ4lA3ftfNZn9tYT2Q5jTu3eaQdDSop988FGD3zf-gyWgg6tJOKjpJEKvCHoF6jfoIM3IFbucziBT0c8BnJNEvlb6JAE5nz_O0vbNVPnPOStKpF1w-IeqT-Zypt1hVK3lZ1s8erUUmfZIzkg6rTWapSg244_XgujvdLHu41&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=19) by the 1/6 committee on January 13. The committee has asked for more records after their first request received “inadequate responses” from the major platforms. The committee believes social media giants like Meta, formerly Facebook, among other social media giants have held back information that is vital to the House investigation. **Other news that may be of interest:**
* Biden [calls](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=qyDi432GwqzcezEbr9kAv2ln-LVMCiH9fzHr63jffNAQ1_KcfxDpvKpbfDVcfQtPZSlHUdGpWEukeA6cV7AL9NNdKVaw0xSjo9EaChdxuDy-pBfHA30oH0QaFJCh2mlg&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=20) 1/6 an attempted coup.
* Pence and the 1/6 Committee go back and forth over [testimony](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=PiInCVHjZg_Lhb0RQ-dhd2pKCmU6OURoFRTuJDLKwsfJpHSwTum2dZqqgC0ljQAuCAIecsj06zsDFKgeBPYhysuMaeVNP1Yy-Y6Xnq15lbU&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=21).
* 1/6 Committee issued [more](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GUadKUZbNtXpoQtrN7XiLlDAp0T1nvsEvUIUmB084zHhSmJ8Vpq42aIQB5HJKy2VUkUfoLuKdXKP3dM3GzqZ5eIq85ZhwU_06ylZYOhVMNpz0BlbEJh2bblFtCJoCh6m4xS708NIGom5rXQ9qL5-4A&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=22) subpoenas.
* CNN produced a [fact check](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHkplIwymIK7ines0vmC60cIjNokCvz07J72urMDwT0Mqei2K6lzkq4Dgj5s7Ge4v2vy9CqQv9Ip4WTdpT4xVz-9IwCsnhvChjp-AIxGLb8DF&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=23) on Rep. Jordan’s letter to the committee.
* CNN produced a [fact check](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHqPq0UMkcmgFmUvA1qZPN6Mhr33pO82FgStPm7CfYGA34gPIV0DekWBXyguPelTxDNdTw2Hw_0pF1XAxXXvp6Iwz7OFPzFRvQyDWnDZOEWUcdbR88YNLlbC1IRBAvjigvw&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_lie_is_bull_nd&n=24) on House Minority Leader McCarthy’s comments on the 1/6 Committee.

_Country First is proud to release The Weekly Digest with important updates on the 1/6 Committee's investigation of the Capitol attack. If you would like to help contribute content to this newsletter, please e-mail[volunteer@country1st.com](mailto:volunteer@country1st.com)._

clean_body: | Friend -- Did you see Donald Trump's recent rally, at which he said "the BIG LIE is a lot of bull**," rewrote history to fit his self-aggrandizing fantasies, and lashed out at me and the other members of what he calls the "1/6 Unselect Committee of political hacks"? It was stomach turning -- not because of the childish insults (I couldn't care less) or that he continues to lie about the election and celebrate the insurrection, but because he's conned so many Americans into worshipping at the feet of a sore-loser who still refuses to concede defeat. And as much as we'd like to ignore his antics and pretend he's harmless, we've got to admit the truth: He's dangerous, and it's up to Republicans, Democrats, and Independents to call out his lies and stand up for democracy. I, for one, have refused to be silent, and I'm not going anywhere. Regardless of whether I have a title, I will fight to save our Republic from the authoritarian and autocratic threat Trump and his lackeys pose to America. Country First is part of a vitally important constellation of organizations seeking to take on the most toxic "Trump First" partisans -- up and down the ballot. We will unveil our first-of-its-kind strategy, called "Primary First," in time for our 1st Birthday later this month. I'm very excited for you to learn all about it and help bring it to life! I do not take for granted the trust you've placed in me to usher our movement through this turbulent chapter of American history, and I'm humbled by your continued support. Your investment in Country First -- whether it be your , , or helping to spread the word -- helps us preserve democracy and pass a better, brighter America to our kids and grandkids. I have faith the good we do today will be compounded over time, and I'm excited by what we can do together. With great appreciation, I remain yours in service. body:
My team just let me know that we need to raise $15,000 in the next few days to stay on track toward our January fundraising goal. So I’m asking: will you pitch in right now?

Team,
I’m running for governor of Ohio because I believe it’s time for a change.
The same corrupt crew has been running the show in Columbus for far too long now. I know that we can take back this state and get it working again for our families, not the corporate backers.
But it’s going to take all of us standing together and building a movement that will last.
**[My team just let me know that we need to raise $15,000 in the next few days to stay on track toward our January fundraising goal. So I’m asking: will you pitch in $5 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40799444/326006480/1959033055?refcode=nw_em_220118_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDc1NTZlMC03Yjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CpNAvDuoFgGfep-jO9KR9l6vAIXo545jlwUpnftSNCA=)**
As the mayor of Dayton, I’ve seen some of Ohio’s biggest challenges up close and personal. From the devastating opioid crisis to the COVID-19 pandemic to a mass shooting in our city, Dayton has been a microcosm of what so many communities are experiencing across the state.
I’ve worked hard to lead Dayton’s response to these issues -- and I believe it will take someone with that kind of experience to help Ohio come back from the biggest crises we’ve ever seen.
It’s time to turn the page in Columbus and elect a governor who will truly work for the people. And I think that we need more leaders like me from the middle class, not another millionaire.
**Are you ready to take back Ohio in 2022? The fight starts right now:**
**[Stand with me now and make a $5 contribution toward our January fundraising goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40799445/326006481/1959033055?refcode=nw_em_220118_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDc1NTZlMC03Yjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CpNAvDuoFgGfep-jO9KR9l6vAIXo545jlwUpnftSNCA=)**
Onward,
Nan

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40799446/326006482/1959033055?refcode=nw_em_220118_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDc1NTZlMC03Yjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CpNAvDuoFgGfep-jO9KR9l6vAIXo545jlwUpnftSNCA=)**

| Friend,
Joe Biden only comes out of hiding when he wants to take pop shots at Republicans to deflect from his failed agenda. On January 7th, we had the worst jobs report to date under the Radical Left's failed leadership, and all he did was make excuses and blame anyone but himself.
It was just another day in the "Hidin' Biden" administration, where the buck stops nowhere and the American people suffer.
The Left doesn't care about curbing our rising prices or solving the supply-chain issues plaguing our nation. They will shift the blame as long as they can while they push for further big government socialism in your life.

clean_body: Joe Biden only comes out of hiding when he wants to take pop shots at Republicans to deflect from his failed agenda | | | | | | == | Friend, Joe Biden only comes out of hiding when he wants to take pop shots at Republicans to deflect from his failed agenda. On January 7th, we had the worst jobs report to date under the Radical Left's failed leadership, and all he did was make excuses and blame anyone but himself. It was just another day in the "Hidin' Biden" administration, where the buck stops nowhere and the American people suffer. The Left doesn't care about curbing our rising prices or solving the supply-chain issues plaguing our nation. They will shift the blame as long as they can while they push for further big government socialism in your life. | | | == | == | The Biden administration has been an unmitigated disaster that refuses to quit. They consistently create more problems for hardworking Americans while they hide away from the press and patriots. America deserves leaders that at least have the courage to own up to their mistakes, but the spineless Left can't even do that. I have been working tooth and nail against the Biden agenda, but I need your support to help take back the House. Strong patriots like you are what makes America great. == | | | == | Thanks for your support, | == | Kat Cammack | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

I'm proud to announce that this month marks my **25th year of service as an elected official.** Serving my community for a quarter-century has been one of the greatest honors of my life, and [_**I hope to continue this public service by representing my community in Congress.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/2NP4DnDV8vY7Ew916j7_rvaXjv9dJLEssgxfQ02ODxA=/fU2n6MH5EFSDqmdQef6h5I4AuWjCfja_2c69zXW3LxA=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220118-1-EM)

Let me tell you a story about how I got my start as an elected official.

As a mother of two young sons, I worked full time at the Chapel Hill Police Department. While this was not an easy schedule to keep, I still found it fulfilling and necessary to volunteer regularly in my sons' classrooms in Chapel Hill-Carrboro City Schools.

I would leave the Chapel Hill Police Department at 7:00 a.m. and go straight to my sons' classrooms until 9:00 a.m. Through my time volunteering in their schools, I recognized that kids, especially Black and Brown kids, needed another champion on the School Board who would always advocate for them and their success.

**That 's when I decided I had to take things into my own hands -- I ran for the Chapel Hill-Carrboro City School Board and won.**

After meaningful years working to make our schools safer and more effective for learning, I took my next public service role, as the first Black woman elected to the Orange County Commission. From there, I went on to serve in both the North Carolina state House and state Senate.

**Twenty-five years later, I find public service as fulfilling and rewarding as when I first started. With your support, I am confident that I will take what I 've learned as a community and state leader and apply it to my next public service role -- as a Member of Congress.

[_If you 're able, I hope you'll consider contributing to my campaign for Congress. Every dollar makes a difference in this race, and whether you can give $1 or $100, it means so much to me._](https://act.myngp.com/el/2NP4DnDV8vY7Ew916j7_rvaXjv9dJLEssgxfQ02ODxA=/fU2n6MH5EFSDqmdQef6h5I4AuWjCfja_2c69zXW3LxA=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220118-1-EM)**

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Top 4 liberal media targets of 2022
body:
The radical left-wing media is already showing who they want to destroy in 2022. I’m here to warn you NOW about their plans to
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z6agq9c7a29cuqjvijn42hfjhc5mei787evmugp8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clh6aoj6chh2bs)
Friend,

The radical left-wing media is already showing who they want to destroy in 2022. I'm here to warn you NOW about their plans to destroy these TOP 4 targets:
> **#4: Republicans**
This is a given, but be prepared for it to get even worse as they start to call Republicans, terrorists or racists.
> **#3: Comedians**
The regime in charge of the media cannot allow for any deviations from the socialist narrative. Joe Rogan, Tim Dillon, and Dave Chappelle all represent a threat to the Establishment Media. As champions of free speech, the left-wing media will seek to destroy them.
> **#2: Parents**
Lenin (a Soviet era communist) said in order to bring about total domination you must control education. The radicals in the media will continue their war on parents.
> **#1: Unvaccinated**
The unvaccinated will be the excuse and scapegoat for the failures of vaccines and mandates. The rhetoric here may get very dangerous.

I am warning you, but I am also asking for you to support the Media Research Center (MRC) to expose the radical bias in the media. It's no longer the news corporations. It's also collusion with the White House and Big Tech.

[_**Can you send an urgent donation of $10, $50, $100, or any amount you can generously spare to the Media Research Center?**_

_**Donate $10 >>
Donate $35 >>

**_Donate $500 >>_

I am the Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media.

**Thanks to our efforts exposing bias in the media, 90% of Americans do not TRUST the media as a reliable source of information. **

Before MRC, voters would believe their evening news. We have shown Americans how much they are being lied to. We are teaching voters to Believe in America - Not the Media.
_**Here 's how MRC exposes the fake news media:**_

* MRC records all Fake News media outlets to identify lies, half-truths, and lies of omission. In fact, we have over 800,000 hours of recorded video and audio from TV, radio, and podcasts.
* We use this content to expose the truth and show everyday Americans how the Fake News media is using their influence to enact socialism, advocate for Critical Race Theory, and sabotage conservatives.
* MRC is combatting online censorship by building MASSIVE social media pages to distribute the truth. I am proud to report MRC's social media team has several MILLION followers and we reach millions of Americans each week with our message.

[_**Please help me DEFEAT the leftwing media and their lies by becoming a supporter of the Media Research Center today!**_](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zm8icrof57ttqhbdr28gb1b79tqpg7pl121tkre8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clh6aoj6chh2bs)

The Media Research Center is the ONLY conservative organization recording the media 24/7, identifying lies, exposing false media coverage, and holding the media accountable.

Our efforts have led to reporters being terminated for fake news reporting, major news publications retracting false statements, apologies from news personalities, and more.

I am truly worried about the uptick in dangerous rhetoric from the media. They are calling Republicans and parents terrorists. They are putting a false blame onto the unvaccinated.

If we do not expose them, then their lies will influence voters which will have bad consequences.

body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, today I'm personally reaching out to talk to you about rural voters. To put it simply, the Democratic Party is not competing in rural areas. And our campaign wants to change that.
This campaign is about uplifting voices that have been forgotten by leaders in our community for decades. We will not continue the cycle of alienating our rural neighbors in favor of big cities. The Democratic Party needs rural voters.
The future of GA-14 depends on dedicated leadership on kitchen table issues – ones that affect all of us .
That’s why I’m so proud of our Rural Revival Plan. Our plan tackles the issues that really matter to folks on Main Street. Our residents aren't worried about issues that don't affect them, and DC politics have no place here. But my neighbors do care about having clean drinking water, access to the internet for their children, or if the next tornado will wipe out their town.
It’s time to show Democrats how to compete in rural areas. Chip in today if you’re with me. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0105]
Thanks so much,
Holly.

Marjorie Taylor Greene Uses MLK Day to Announce ‘A New Segregation’ for the Unvaccinated
Team,
Marjorie Taylor Greene spent the holiday yesterday pushing baseless conspiracy theories comparing the horrors of segregation to simple vaccine requirements.
"I believe we are seeing a new segregation and discrimination beginning, wrongfully forced upon unvaccinated Americans by the tyrants of the Democrat Party."
—Marjorie Taylor Greene, January 17
This type of statement is below the office she holds, but sadly, it seems like there’s no level of bigotry that Marjorie Taylor Greene isn’t willing to stoop to.
Compare that to her Democratic opponent, Marcus Flowers, who spent the day marching with activists in Georgia calling for expanded voting rights for ALL.
Last election cycle, Marjorie Taylor Greene didn’t even have an opponent. But this cycle is different. The voters in this district finally have a REAL choice in Marcus Flowers - but he needs your help.

name: ICYMI News
subject: [The gall!] Imagine saying THIS directly to Bill O'Reilly's face
body:
I've brought along a must-see Bill O’Reilly exclusive interview... No, the interviewee isn't Donald J. Trump, aka the 45th pr
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
Dear Reader,

I've brought along a must-see Bill O'Reilly exclusive interview...

No, the interviewee isn't Donald J. Trump, aka the 45th president, who joined O'Reilly's recent History Tour across the country...

Rather, the subject in this particular interview had the audacity to tell O'Reilly...

_To his face ... _

"**_There 's going to be more wealth created in the next two years [of the Biden Presidency]... than in the past 20 years combined_**."

Just wait until you see O'Reilly's reaction.

**_[>>>Prepare to be **wowed**. Click here (or on the play button below)](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5kr7kn1pho81bleafkhnt1m4hfjp41740nap7rg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clh61o74c5h2bs) _**

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5h1junj01hc1h0smuto5bg5e2q4u98dt4qjah9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clh61o74c5h2bs)

Sincerely,

Rachel Gearhart
Associate Publisher, The Oxford Club

P.S. I'm so glad we've got the connections to bring you [**_this video link today._**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs5l0j2fm1j4q60q0e0eu9ruiuluua5vhla32b38_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clh61o74c5h2bs)

You won't find this in the mainstream news.

Yet it's a MUST-SEE.

I do urge you to hear this O'Reilly's interviewee out. That's because he's been remarkably accurate on stock market predictions in the past.

In fact, during the interview, O'Reilly says that JUST ONE of this guy's stock recommendations - which is up more than 421% since '03 - helped put O'Reilly's own kids through college. **_[Details here.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0pst0tvb530n33iatdu343v257oretaeiriois0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clh61o74c5h2bs) _**

body:
Val Demings can only win with the grassroots support of people like you and me
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40803047/326024318/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2174-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTNkNDA4Yy04YTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ntK3EbTxa7vA6DMZrWPttZeYr1t-KIGVxn0vSu9FK_Y=)Friend, I am all too familiar with the cowardice of Marco Rubio. Just one week after my daughter Jaime was murdered at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida, I confronted Marco Rubio at a town hall on gun safety. He couldn't even look at me. He refused to work with Parkland survivors to make it more difficult for people to access assault rifles – weapons of war – like the one that killed my Jaime. He has continued since the Parkland shooting to politicize any efforts to reduce gun violence. I will do anything I can to ensure Marco Rubio is no longer in the Senate, because we need an advocate like Val Demings, whose strength and integrity is exactly what Florida needs, to replace him. **[Will you join me in supporting Val Demings by rushing a contribution of $5 or more right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40803048/326024319/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2174-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTNkNDA4Yy04YTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ntK3EbTxa7vA6DMZrWPttZeYr1t-KIGVxn0vSu9FK_Y=) **
Each and every day during her service in Congress – especially after the mass shootings in Parkland and at Pulse nightclub in her Orlando-based district – Val Demings has been one of the strongest fighters for gun safety reform.
I'm reaching out asking you for dollars to meet this goal, but it's about the people we can save. It's about creating a gun safety majority in the Senate that will enact the urgent change our country needs – change to prevent families like mine from going through any more senseless tragedy. But incompetent Marco Rubio is backed by the nearly $30 million campaign war chest of the Senate Republicans. In fact, NRA-loving Republicans have already funneled tens of millions of dollars into Florida to defend Rubio.
Val Demings can only win with the grassroots support of people like you and me, which is why I'm personally reaching out. I told the congresswoman I'd help raise $20,000 today for her Senate race – a race that experts are saying could decide Senate control. **[So please, can I count on you to donate $5 or more to help Val Demings win in Florida and make real progress on gun safety? Every dollar you give will build up grassroots resources that Congresswoman Demings needs to compete against massive amounts of GOP money.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40803049/326024320/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2174-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTNkNDA4Yy04YTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ntK3EbTxa7vA6DMZrWPttZeYr1t-KIGVxn0vSu9FK_Y=)**
I can never get my Jaime back, but helping changemakers like Val Demings – a leader who has passed lifesaving gun safety legislation – gives me the purpose I've needed since her murder. Thank you for doing your part to help.
Fred Guttenberg
Gun Violence Survivor
Jaime and Jesse's dad

body:

[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001T0koH8sw8dUJ7L8Du1fp0_Hh4GZ8VsZPkIkR32tlt3VCcaLDAqPwF0AiFZzZryyc_XtaPb2PypgNvROv5XG7fkuQaXnoEdmqtGXQPYOAL33CGisKuzOdM59iZtEfMiLOHd2TjJ9PRV1OwgBr0uhhWWxYb-KMhwah5G_EtwTEXpR-biumbRJuCPdWopJiUGlRjoWJzxURw4W-QJiUYGqwPw==&c=a59bOM4h3Unbu-kouhu3iC4LPl2kx052ljYYyScOgB6XRiIR8ZWsIw==&ch=lhkaGunsVH1BM8wHbDMSimSrdgTa7dygoUzCXXPTf_yMXSdJr72SdA==)

| Peter,
January 22nd and 23rd is an upcoming Weekend of Action for our team and we want to make sure you're invited to come help us grow the mission to TAKE BACK OUR STATE!
Using the button below, you can sign up for any of the available time slots to personally help our mission to bring much needed accountability back to Carson City & change the course on Nevada's dangerous single-party rule.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: What do you say: Defund the Police or Back the Blue?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Do you support the “defund the police” effort like Gretchen Whitmer does, or do you support the men and women of law enforcement? | | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=98978dea18&e=0636b97700)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Peter:

The past two years we’ve witnessed a tremendous change when it comes to law enforcement in the United States.

A “defund the police” movement has cut funding for law enforcement in various cities throughout America. Gretchen Whitmer says she “supports the spirit” of “defunding the police” and she has allowed radical democrats to openly vilify all law enforcement officers.

As you know, I’m running for Governor of Michigan.

**I’d like to know where _you_ stand.**

Do you support the “defund the police” effort like Gretchen Whitmer does, or do you support the men and women of law enforcement?

Please take 20 seconds and answer a short 1 question poll:
[_**I support law enforcement and oppose “defunding the police.”**_](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=4a7702eed6&e=0636b97700)

[_**I support “defunding the police.”**_](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=b041724754&e=0636b97700)

[_**I am unsure**_](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=a842610e78&e=0636b97700) Thank you.

Sincerely,

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor

Hello,
Have you ever heard the term “tracker?” I know I hadn’t until I decided to run for office.
“Trackers” are what political campaign staff call what are essentially professional stalkers. They’re paid by Republican Super PACs and dark money organizations to follow you around with a video camera literally everywhere you go – yelling ridiculous questions and trying to get you to say something that they can edit up and spin into a fake scandal on Fox News.
Well, the first tracker of the campaign has begun showing up to my events with Iowa voters, hired and paid to be there by the “unofficial research arm of the Republican Party.”
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions lying about me in TV ads. They’re scared because I’m a hard target for Republicans. They know that I can excite Independent voters and maybe even some Republicans to vote for someone who lives a life of Iowa values. **And if I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats will hold onto our Senate majority.**
And we can win: The latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows just 27% of Iowa voters want to re-elect Chuck Grassley!
**I’m not taking corporate PAC money, so if we’re going to be able to fight back against the GOP’s lies and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on you. We need to raise another $8,500 before midnight tonight if we’re going to win, but right now, we’re still $3,141 short.**

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: I'm standing up for life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness here in Massachusetts.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
| | | |
---
---
---
|
---
|
---
Dear Friend,
"...life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness."
Since 1776, these iconic words have defined the essence of what it means to be an American. We are blessed to live in a nation that recognizes certain liberties endowed by our Creator and which no person, no government, can ever take away. Rather, it is the role of government to defend these rights for We, the People.
Here in Massachusetts we enjoy a special kinship with these freedoms dating back to the earliest days of our Republic. And yet, today, these rights are under assault across our state. Just look around:

* As of this weekend, Bay Staters who refuse COVID vaccination are no longer free to eat in restaurants, or attend sporting events, or enter a museum in several communities including Boston.

* Longtime public servants, including cops and firefighters, are losing their careers for making medical decisions they believe in good faith are best for themselves.

* Prices are skyrocketing and store shelves are empty.

* Businesses are facing rising costs, labor shortages, and fewer customers, and many are closing their doors.

* Meanwhile, the State House remains closed to the public, giving legislators cover to spend billions and debate even more restrictive mandates.

* Parents watch their kids wearing masks in school, while they see their right to make decisions about their kids' upbringing, education, and medical care quickly being taken away.

Friends, this is not us. This is not the true spirit of Massachusetts.
I'm running for Governor because I support you and your freedom to make decisions that are best for you and your family. I am also terribly concerned for our business community and the jobs they support in our economy. And, I am very worried about our schools and the future of our children.
I want to end these out-of-control restrictions and make Massachusetts a better place to live. In fact, if I'm elected, one of my first acts will be to reverse vaccine mandates, call for an end to vaccine passports, and take masks off kids in school. I want to get our state back to normal as soon as possible.
When it comes to defending your right to life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness; when it comes to supporting your right to raise your kids; when it comes to protecting taxpayers; when it comes to supporting first responders and small businesses -- I won't allow a radical liberal agenda to derail what is best for you and your family. You have my word. And I am proud to be the only candidate in this race who will promise you as much.
Sincerely,
---
---
Geoff Diehl Republican Candidate for Governor
---

name: Tony Vargas
subject: I need your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
I was just added to the NewDem Watch List...

|
---

| | [**_I am thrilled to announce that I was just added to the NewDem Watch List as a candidate to look out for in 2022! NewDems advocate within the Democratic Party and in Congress for new approaches to move America forward. Which is why I’m so humbled to receive their support. To continue this momentum and show everyone that I have what it takes to win this race for Democrats, I need 1,104 endorsements from my top supporters before midnight. But if I miss my goal, it’ll be that much harder to create an undeniable wave of support. Can I count on your endorsement at this pivotal moment? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40805631/326035379/743744551?source=20220118_em_pet_b1_tony_30_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWYwMDIyZS05Njc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4yyIWQUQYj8_cHAoYGpLiQErtLnJXZQmvLUv5qJIsk=&emci=de2953e8-8678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=85f0022e-9678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=19927889)

I could not have made it this far without your support. But now, more than anything, I need your personal endorsement to keep this momentum going. [**_If you already know me and have my back, go ahead and sign your name here. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40805632/326035388/743744551?source=20220118_em_pet_b1_tony_30_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWYwMDIyZS05Njc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4yyIWQUQYj8_cHAoYGpLiQErtLnJXZQmvLUv5qJIsk=&emci=de2953e8-8678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=85f0022e-9678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=19927889)[** If you’re not sure yet, please give me the chance to earn your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40805633/326035389/743744551?source=20220118_em_pet_b1_tony_30_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWYwMDIyZS05Njc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4yyIWQUQYj8_cHAoYGpLiQErtLnJXZQmvLUv5qJIsk=&emci=de2953e8-8678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=85f0022e-9678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=19927889) Let me tell you a little bit about my backstory: I grew up in a working class family. My parents immigrated here in hopes of creating a good life for me and my brothers. It wasn’t easy living paycheck to paycheck and facing housing instability. But they believed in the American Dream, never gave up, and their hard work paid off. That is why I have made it my life’s mission to serve others and help countless Americans achieve their dreams. [**_Everyone deserves a shot at the American Dream. But my opponent, Congressman Don Bacon, has never supported people like you and me -- he voted to cut taxes for the wealthy and left working class folks in the dust. That is why I’m running for Congress -- to advocate for hardworking folks. But I can’t do it alone. I need 1,104 endorsements before midnight to prove I have what it takes to win, so will you add your name now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40805634/326035390/743744551?source=20220118_em_pet_b1_tony_30_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWYwMDIyZS05Njc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4yyIWQUQYj8_cHAoYGpLiQErtLnJXZQmvLUv5qJIsk=&emci=de2953e8-8678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=85f0022e-9678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=19927889) I’ll be honest: winning this race isn’t going to be easy. But endorsements like yours will help me take my grassroots campaign further than it has ever gone before. In exchange for your endorsement, I promise you this: I will have your back everyday in Washington. [**_BOLD Democrats and now the NewDems have already shown interest in my campaign. I’m just hoping you’ll show your support too with your personal endorsement. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40805635/326035391/743744551?source=20220118_em_pet_b1_tony_30_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWYwMDIyZS05Njc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4yyIWQUQYj8_cHAoYGpLiQErtLnJXZQmvLUv5qJIsk=&emci=de2953e8-8678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=85f0022e-9678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=19927889) Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Tony

---
|

clean_body: I was just added to the NewDem Watch List... | | | I could not have made it this far without your support. But now, more than anything, I need your personal endorsement to keep this momentum going. Let me tell you a little bit about my backstory: I grew up in a working class family. My parents immigrated here in hopes of creating a good life for me and my brothers. It wasn’t easy living paycheck to paycheck and facing housing instability. But they believed in the American Dream, never gave up, and their hard work paid off. That is why I have made it my life’s mission to serve others and help countless Americans achieve their dreams. I’ll be honest: winning this race isn’t going to be easy. But endorsements like yours will help me take my grassroots campaign further than it has ever gone before. In exchange for your endorsement, I promise you this: I will have your back everyday in Washington.
