name: Marisa Wood
subject: Kevin McCarthy only cares about one thing.
body:
It's a HUGE slap in the face that all Kevin McCarthy cares about is becoming Speaker of the House. | _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. To support Marisa Wood's campaign, [chip in here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40805743/326035834/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWZhMmI4Ni05Njc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QH9nhisCY_4q3vWjnk1FKygAIyRM9ElbGw-eGZoy_0E=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/1555967f-9678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/e5fa2b86-9678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWZhMmI4Ni05Njc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QH9nhisCY_4q3vWjnk1FKygAIyRM9ElbGw-eGZoy_0E=&id=124172018)._ I'm not a politician, friend.

But it doesn't take being an elected official to know that our Central Valley community is hurting. It's a HUGE slap in the face that all Kevin McCarthy cares about is becoming Speaker of the House, and he’s willing to sacrifice anything at the altar of his own ambition.

I've worked for over two decades serving students and their parents in our community. I could care less about a Speaker's gavel.

This campaign is about engaging our community around the real issues that matter -- health care access, education, raising our wages, strengthening our agricultural economy, and fixing our immigration system.

Beating a guy like Kevin McCarthy means talking to everyone, which means no community will be written off because they are "too Republican" or vote too infrequently.

**Friend, NOTHING would ruin McCarthy's plan to become Speaker better than crushing him at the ballot box in his own backyard. We can do this, but it’s going to take a lot of grassroots support.**

**[Can you chip in $3 to our campaign to DEFEAT GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy? name: Team De Gregorio
subject: De Gregorio Announces Series of Bergen County Endorsements
body:
Gains backing of over a half-dozen Bergen County Republican Organization (“BCRO”) Municipal Chairs
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kZB6Wv2bNmaQClTCBB-XQwoOLxlzFimAcIW2oiwYhOC0MUrWHIynDVoG3_d2TV-h70PXIVv6yiN9gFt6QAQqkqCyUa1hLelq_MSNOgtmr8WG1JkLz8y-HrUD1QY5t4NGpLkTGOmgfySU2YYnRRl95Q==&c=e4N9rypPfT9e7S7oTC_L_qIxiqroMNbCoZTdvAyEv1GIITXMpbSYzA==&ch=4Xjthj2k8rz65LTZdx2uaWs7SIsPf4Dzy8ccL1wsvkkhvW-eMFo2Eg==)
---
| PRESS RELEASE CONTACT: press@nickfornj.com FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 18, 2021, FAIR LAWN - Today, Nick De Gregorio, a Marine Veteran and Republican Candidate for Congress in New Jersey's Fifth Congressional District, announced that his campaign had received the support of several Bergen County Republican Organization ("BCRO") Municipal Chairs, who also serve on the organization's Policy Committee: "We couldn't be prouder to support Nick in his race to take on Pelosi pawn Josh Gottheimer. Tough times call for tough leaders, and Nick has what it takes to stand up against the radical socialist agenda that's given us sky high inflation and open borders. New Jersey families deserve better." Philip Fredericks, Dumont Municipal Chair Sergio Segalini, East Rutherford Municipal Chair Gerardette Iovino, Fairview Municipal Chair Louis G. Aloia, Garfield Municipal Chair Gary Paparozzi, Lodi Municipal Chair Sam Conoscenti, Maywood Councilman & Municipal Chair Dr. Douglas Holden, Saddle River Municipal Chair The Municipal Chairs' statement follows last week's announcement that De Gregorio had received the support of District 39 Assemblyman Robert Auth (R, Old Tappan) and Assemblywoman DeAnne DeFuccio (R, Upper Saddle River). The campaign also said it would report $403,000 raised on its year-end report for 2021 with $360,000 cash on hand.
###
---
| | |
---

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Can you please sign my petition supporting my legislation banning members of Congress from buying and selling stocks?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Members of Congress should not be buying and selling stocks while in public office.
#

Friends —
Members of Congress should not buy and sell stocks while in public office.
This is not a controversial idea. Yet, today, it is also legal.
I’m working with Jon Ossoff to change that. Together, we’ve introduced legislation called the Ban Congressional Stock Trading Act that is as simple as it is necessary.
Elected leaders have access to valuable policy information that impacts the economy and industries. The legislation we’re introducing would put an end to corrupt insider trading and ensure leaders in Congress focus on delivering results for the American people — not their stock portfolios.
This is an idea supported by Democrats, Republicans and Independents alike.
Now, I want to know if you support it as well:
[**Please sign my petition: Say you support my legislation that will ban members of Congress from buying and selling stocks while in office.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/stocks-petition?source=em220118-1-7&t=1&akid=1957%2E6688874%2EyOk9PN)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/stocks-petition?source=em220118-1-7&t=2&akid=1957%2E6688874%2EyOk9PN)**
Since I took office, I’ve remained focused on making Washington work for Arizonans. That includes making Washington more accountable and transparent.
Thanks for making your voice heard here.
Mark Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1957%2E6688874%2EyOk9PN).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Aadland For Congress
subject: Erik speaks to crowd of 11,000
body:
First Telephone Town Hall of 2022
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W05brZm7rN-k6GCQkbAQ4oFE7INuKqH3PjOPbl1cuii4nbTdECxVYdPD5gSGAnfFtW4n8Wc1q1GjyKVXQfePkn_fcWJlk0Z4dmryO9wM7zpv-iD4NstJXVrhCorstmmtzcvB2UQGF6tJQHiIgcpFoBvmY_glUpth&c=hF0bp0dLjXCtP7LSI5r8MTtkWGeHp3AtafuHmw2v-IdZCLYty-vBKQ==&ch=5TkZS6z0YyP4s1t_-oy30pZKeBJxv3sxbV5cbw4hoE3O2juOxNuM3A==)
---
|
---
|
# First Telephone Town Hall of 2022
---
Last Thursday, I had the privilege to speak to more than 11,000 people during our second Telephone Town Hall Meeting. The number one question on people's minds was immigration.
Immigration is tied directly to the rising crime we're seeing in our country and in Colorado. A massive amount of deadly fentanyl is pouring into our country, and heartbreaking human trafficking is well documented. A poll of callers showed that the topic was much on their minds.
During the one-hour town hall, almost 20 callers asked questions regarding marijuana laws, the economy, the botched withdrawal of U.S. troops from Afghanistan and why I am running for Congress. All those attending clearly care about the direction our country is heading and want change. I believe you want change too. If you are interested in listening to the Telephone Town Hall Meeting with Erik Aadland, [please use the link below.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W05brZm7rN-k6GCQkbAQ4oFE7INuKqH3PjOPbl1cuii4nbTdECxVYTG9Tn4E7Qcl1qEAw5WBOPWNp2y9LPIIJ4ZY9N-_0_oln2oz8Yyz4kcWAkjFFtzPPtTEP7MiBaOOWQxF0W64X8SGql2iMSz4g32F_4Tn6oCxZLw7iXbX5dM=&c=hF0bp0dLjXCtP7LSI5r8MTtkWGeHp3AtafuHmw2v-IdZCLYty-vBKQ==&ch=5TkZS6z0YyP4s1t_-oy30pZKeBJxv3sxbV5cbw4hoE3O2juOxNuM3A==)
---
| [Listen to the Town Hall Meeting Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W05brZm7rN-k6GCQkbAQ4oFE7INuKqH3PjOPbl1cuii4nbTdECxVYc3uExsZfmMpo6FmOBJ_WQ-vrlbaPJZwVnHQJDzUMJq8euw2BgBD9jGaxWBCVC77MkpxYPH20Kx2yTRgxl3r8-6TSm2zXI144Z8GGgk5Xx3LTiu2sk43gey2k99NZRr9cIS96y8-EzU-5apeslhv0Nz12MsufDZubXVIUhFj7hSN23-LxRipRmMnSq3FETxvEM841DULB4a6QeszcMssU4mnORTroDv738Fii1EvU78pGVuLylEY-jb5WbfaihY7Rw==&c=hF0bp0dLjXCtP7LSI5r8MTtkWGeHp3AtafuHmw2v-IdZCLYty-vBKQ==&ch=5TkZS6z0YyP4s1t_-oy30pZKeBJxv3sxbV5cbw4hoE3O2juOxNuM3A==)
---
We will continue to have more of these interactive meetings so I can learn more about you, and you can hear what I stand for. Watch our emails for information on registering in the future.
And please consider donating to our cause. I cannot do this alone but need your help in going to Washington. Together we can stem the tide of harmful policies that are robbing us of our livelihoods and putting our very lives at risk. Thank you for your support!
---
|
---
| |
---
| | [Send Erik your feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W05brZm7rN-k6GCQkbAQ4oFE7INuKqH3PjOPbl1cuii4nbTdECxVYaPGlvsPWcp7xzqkJUH-GOg5Is9XBmjqXHG35uyWS31GkmrXPt5HHHZLMp8T3YpAAU83dwQoDGgoO0CSeB1x_WMBVQSdQZxy-EQp09eQSgEDSEjIvKhIP7A4WwLf1EE2WkpU-Q8rfvRDl6cCUAmK3wq3VX6GH7Uy8w1wi-8M0C26&c=hF0bp0dLjXCtP7LSI5r8MTtkWGeHp3AtafuHmw2v-IdZCLYty-vBKQ==&ch=5TkZS6z0YyP4s1t_-oy30pZKeBJxv3sxbV5cbw4hoE3O2juOxNuM3A==)
---
| |
---
|
# Stand with Erik Today
---
| Stand with me today by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything. Donate today
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W05brZm7rN-k6GCQkbAQ4oFE7INuKqH3PjOPbl1cuii4nbTdECxVYaTcNvBz7sUF6tGv_HAxAg_RKiCYscZHZUETe0Q7kk7S8toHIcnZuA1DYtllnzESGSa1wxfHLsvN6kyHl5FzYniadj8PzuCWHQ==&c=hF0bp0dLjXCtP7LSI5r8MTtkWGeHp3AtafuHmw2v-IdZCLYty-vBKQ==&ch=5TkZS6z0YyP4s1t_-oy30pZKeBJxv3sxbV5cbw4hoE3O2juOxNuM3A==)
---
You can help in two ways:
* First, write your current lawmaker about your concerns with immigration and your other issues.

clean_body: First Telephone Town Hall of 2022 | | | | == | | First Telephone Town Hall of 2022 Last Thursday, I had the privilege to speak to more than 11,000 people during our second Telephone Town Hall Meeting. The number one question on people's minds was immigration. Immigration is tied directly to the rising crime we're seeing in our country and in Colorado. A massive amount of deadly fentanyl is pouring into our country, and heartbreaking human trafficking is well documented. A poll of callers showed that the topic was much on their minds. During the one-hour town hall, almost 20 callers asked questions regarding marijuana laws, the economy, the botched withdrawal of U.S. troops from Afghanistan and why I am running for Congress. All those attending clearly care about the direction our country is heading and want change. I believe you want change too. If you are interested in listening to the Telephone Town Hall Meeting with Erik Aadland, == | == We will continue to have more of these interactive meetings so I can learn more about you, and you can hear what I stand for. Watch our emails for information on registering in the future. And please consider donating to our cause. I cannot do this alone but need your help in going to Washington. Together we can stem the tide of harmful policies that are robbing us of our livelihoods and putting our very lives at risk. Thank you for your support! | | | | | == | | | Stand with Erik Today | Stand with me today by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything. Donate today | == You can help in two ways: First, write your current lawmaker about your concerns with immigration and your other issues. Second, help me go to Washington to fight for you, your children and the future of our country. | == | Together we can stand against bad policy and for our future. | | | COLORADO WILDFIRE - HOW YOU CAN HELP | Here are a number of places where you can contribute goods, funding, or even volunteer your time: | == | YMCA is accepting donations (blankets, pillows, dog and cat food) at their location: 2800 Dagny Way, Lafayette, CO 80026. The Airbnb Open Homes Program will notify you if your offer is needed. | | == | | | Volunteer to help with clean-up and rebuilding | If you want to volunteer for ongoing clean-up and rebuilding efforts, check Samaritan's Purse below: | == | | Current Shelter Resources | KDVR has provided a list of current shelters that are available. | == | | | Animal Assistance | | == | == | | | | | PO Box 630552 Littleton, co 80163 (303) 903 1985 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Congress | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with |

body:

Hey team, We’re well on our way into the first month of the new year, so we thought it’d be a good time to check in and see what your thoughts, concerns, and priorities are for 2022. With the midterm elections approaching in just eleven months from now, and our Democratic majorities in the House and Senate on the line, this year will be crucial to the direction of our country and our communities here in Pennsylvania’s 1st district. **As Ashley continues her hard work to get on the primary ballot and ultimately unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick in November, she wants to hear from you directly.** **[So, it’s time to take our first survey of the new year! Take a minute to share your top issues with Ashley and our team here>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40806518/326041256/-701798012?refcode=fl_em_su_20220118survey_te_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTEwMzNkNy05OTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w0v6Hrfqd9d-iLFrWlrg_9Jaub60sRkOQufhYlI4uF4=&emci=744358d0-9978-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=fe1033d7-9978-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=5643323)** | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40806519/326041257/-701798012?refcode=fl_em_su_20220118survey_te_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTEwMzNkNy05OTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w0v6Hrfqd9d-iLFrWlrg_9Jaub60sRkOQufhYlI4uF4=&emci=744358d0-9978-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=fe1033d7-9978-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=5643323)
---
Ashley is eager to review your submissions as she builds out her platform and we keep up the momentum to flip this crucial House seat from red to blue.
As always, thanks for taking the time to share your feedback with us.
— Team Ehasz

| Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them.

clean_body: | = Hey team, We’re well on our way into the first month of the new year, so we thought it’d be a good time to check in and see what your thoughts, concerns, and priorities are for 2022. With the midterm elections approaching in just eleven months from now, and our Democratic majorities in the House and Senate on the line, this year will be crucial to the direction of our country and our communities here in Pennsylvania’s 1st district. As Ashley continues her hard work to get on the primary ballot and ultimately unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick in November, she wants to hear from you directly. | Ashley is eager to review your submissions as she builds out her platform and we keep up the momentum to flip this crucial House seat from red to blue. As always, thanks for taking the time to share your feedback with us. — Team Ehasz | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. The Senate race in Georgia WILL DETERMINE who controls the Senate majority. 2. The race is a DEAD HEAT. A recent poll shows us leading 49%-48%. 3. However, we are being OUTRAISED BY MILLIONS by the Democrat incumbent. 4. Our campaign is behind our monthly donor goal by 107 conservatives. | | | | The stakes are too high for our campaign to fall short. The Democrats are using their Senate majority to fundamentally change our nation the wrong way, so we need your help to unite Americans and get our country back on the right track. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | | | | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Team, While we’re in the middle of collecting nomination petitions to get Gabe on the primary ballot before our February 1 deadline, Gabe wanted to check in and hear from you. We’re halfway through the first month of this new year, and so far, Republican Rep. Yvette Herrell has continued to remind us why she doesn’t belong in Congress. name: John Fetterman
subject: Can I get one minute of your time, Derek?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
You can roll your eyes. But also, please read this??!!
#
Derek,
I wanted to send you a quick personal note and ask if you'll **[chip in any amount that makes sense for you to support our campaign for U.S. Senate.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40855?refcode=ema20220118-4235&t=1&akid=4235%2E434096%2E-b03pJ)**
I knoooow, I know. It’s another donation ask, and if you’re rolling your eyes at me, that’s OK. Between Gisele and the kids, I’m kind of used to it. 🙄
But maybe you can give me a minute just to remind you why we send these emails in the first place. 🙏
First of all, I *seriously* believe that leaving this country better than my generation found it is possible. That belief is what got me into public service to begin with.
And it's why, alongside my incredible family, I decided to join this race for Senate (and start sending you an obnoxious amount of email) 😂
As much as we try to put the FUN in FUNdrai$ing with our emails, the stakes couldn’t be more serious in this race. The slower our online fundraising gets, the more ground we risk giving up to GOP opponents like Dr. Oz.
That’s not an option for us, especially not when Republicans and their super PACs have already spent more than $11.4 million on TV and radio ads...
Ok, alright, I'll let you get back to what you were doing. But before you go, I’m hoping you’ll take this note to heart and **[send a few bucks our way to help make sure we can take this fight all the way to the floor of the U.S. Senate, no matter how many PACs try to outspend us.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40855?refcode=ema20220118-4235&t=2&akid=4235%2E434096%2E-b03pJ)** ❤️
You don’t have to love these emails, even though I think they’re pretty awesome. The important thing is, every time we send an email like this, some of yinz chip in. And person by person, day by day, it powers our entire historic grassroots campaign.
Thank you for being a part of this.
— John
John Fetterman
Lt. Governor of Pennsylvania
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40855?refcode=em20220118-4235&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4235%2E434096%2E-b03pJ)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220118-4235-footer&t=22&refcode2=4235_434096_-b03pJ&akid=4235%2E434096%2E-b03pJ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=4235%2E434096%2E-b03pJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=4235%2E434096%2E-b03pJ)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

body:

Peter,

Now that it's officially election year, I've got some questions for you. get a sense of what motivates you to For instance, I’m curious to know if the Democrat-led push to nationalize federal elec I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, Now that it's officially election year, I've got some questions for you. As a congressional candidate it's my fulltime job to be in tune to what is going on throughout the country on any given day; that's no small feat given the 24-hour news cycle. For instance, I'm curious to know if the Democrat-led push to nationalize federal elections (including House races like mine) makes you more or less likely to cast a ballot. Will you do me a favor and take 30 seconds to one minute to answer five short questions for me? Your responses will allow my campaign to better understand the underlying sentiment among conservatives in the country at present. Despite our nation being mired in deep division, I remain confident that the answer to some significant questions we face today can be answered by returning a Republican majority to congress. Thank you Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. Friend, This week I led the search for answers on whether there was any federal involvement in **January 6**.
I grilled a senior FBI official, and she _REFUSED_ to answer key questions. _Who is Ray Epps? Was Ray Epps a federal agent or informant?_

_Did _ANY_ FBI agents or confidential informants actively participate in the events that day?_

We know the FBI has been misused in the past to target President Trump and our conservative movement and run interference for the Democrats. Just look at the Russia Collusion Hoax- James Comey and Peter Strzok... ...and now AG Merrick Garland won't answer questions from Congress.

**What are they trying to hide now****about the events of January 6, 2021?** I'm working hard to expose the full truth and shine a light on whether there was any FBI involvement on that day... _and the liberal media can't stand it!_ [**I'm counting on YOUR help to KEEP UP THE PRESSURE >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za6i8thhr95kh847fbt1k2ukknfs2dt5u00jggm8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clj66o32chh2bs)

The American people deserve answers, and I intend to pry them out of the Biden DOJ.

It's clear that the Democrats want to distract voters from the Biden administration's failures and their Party's extreme-left agenda. Democrats want to twist the events of January 6 to fit their completely dishonest narrative, with their pals in the liberal media all-in on the scam. **We can't let them get away with it.** [**_It's time to STAND UP and GET ANSWERS!_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg0hf7k6548hjscst83om131f6so2itsstgn2td8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clj66o32chh2bs)

name: Team Greitens
subject: ICYMI: Governor Eric Greitens Makes Headline News on Breitbart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
Former Missouri governor and Navy SEAL Eric Greitens appeared on Breitbart News Saturday to discuss the overwhelming support the campaign has received from patriots across the country.
---
| | | | | |
---
| ICYMI: Governor Eric Greitens Makes Headline News on Breitbart
---
| St. Louis, MO - Former Missouri governor and Navy SEAL Eric Greitens appeared on Breitbart News Saturday to discuss the overwhelming support the campaign has received from patriots across the country. Greitens said: "I'm the MAGA candidate in this race. I'm the America first candidate in this race. I came out, and we went down to Maricopa County to investigate election integrity. I was the first person in the country to say that when I'm in the Senate, why I'm voting against Mitch McConnell because we need strong America first leadership. We've called nonsense on all of the leftist lies about January 6. And so the people of Missouri recognize that we're the America first candidate." As the first U.S. Senate candidate in the country who has pledged to vote for a new Senate leader to replace Mitch McConnell, Governor Greitens explained why change is so important: "It's really simple, Matt. the American people, all of your loyal listeners, need to have leaders who are willing to fight for them. And what we've seen time and time and time again is the Republican establishment and the RINOs, they turn. They turn on President Trump. They turn against the American people. We saw all of that on January 6, we saw with the election integrity fights. We even saw it with things like Joe Biden's absurd infrastructure plan." Hi friend, sorry to bump this in your inbox, but with time running out before tonight's deadline, I'm still falling short of my daily fundraising goal.

I can't emphasize this enough: This race could very well decide Senate control. And with the GOP pouring MILLIONS into Florida to make sure Marco Rubio defeats me , there is zero room for error.

Every single fundraising goal is critical to keeping my campaign on track to flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic majority. That's why I need to ask you again, before my midnight deadline: Can I count on you to donate $5 or more to help me defeat Marco Rubio and protect the Senate for Democrats?

Val Demings

In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures.

**[We’re still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and we’ve set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Tuesday, March 1st.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c78fe276a9274463bd90b789590ebfd9&_e=DMtnhGyZJoUvOYwEUhccPhgPyQEZ7IUELHv6wuOAjJJaFdZcQFJyxrpK8sLtBrBD4eZkaREVcFVCZyGu1tamWL0xEixJBmkNMZlR0EpFcDDJGE8gD4BnSzoPmTX3lwk-AIUftRB6N9rhX5pmHWGTeI5V1dbLuvqv4FJjKksfRZUvZ3fXwGARIe-31zy5q32Wz6tpClDj71wjpjhU6a4TUUH12fLJRgzRelVc6VKLUh82iz3NUoP1syfasnsYVTqNKUtj4ElIX8KNXFPyDGTO5Oy9XRP2NiIN02RVncm9xYwbksLYTeQfbJsQ0VtpXgEIoS0FHxtDN6wNOeyMYyc30VWqeIZcMP0GHmiTyOTNeXBfH6xPY18oRcBPSHK7xA8-dVq1cdTh8VT5yFDtgt1NpqxFQFjTF5k7m44K9ukVWz-f-FedI7AfGavZXxxG8UHAdY0cwR3MqN3tpm-c_zsnr71pli5JPw9nIaFvnl8RktZefEHJPULuLWP-Tw21QSl5pQbfboyzE9qTY8uPsdtxPA%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c78fe276a9274463bd90b789590ebfd9&_e=DMtnhGyZJoUvOYwEUhccPhgPyQEZ7IUELHv6wuOAjJJaFdZcQFJyxrpK8sLtBrBD4eZkaREVcFVCZyGu1tamWL0xEixJBmkNMZlR0EpFcDDJGE8gD4BnSzoPmTX3lwk-AIUftRB6N9rhX5pmHWGTeI5V1dbLuvqv4FJjKksfRZUvZ3fXwGARIe-31zy5q32Wz6tpClDj71wjpjhU6a4TUUH12fLJRgzRelVc6VKLUh82iz3NUoP1syfasnsYVTqNKUtj4ElIX8KNXFPyDGTO5Oy9XRP2NiIN02RVncm9xYwbksLYTeQfbJsQ0VtpXgEIbzhjM6t7g8V87jYeoTsys6G0Xs7xOG1754kPw79F_SsqCMKyb6zdlp_koV1JWxeQvZ4UA9bLgSCucpUySaT_hdKiuJsHKlD5OROkH6hcC_95zQ_OFs-C5dTQph8iMyt8tqXqaN1pEpMP4dIsxuPWZUsCR4S1yWLmAGJEQ3S_WpB6JjpQ6P6oSYhDGTruPVdXkVgLBwX_KQH-dAUwO5278g%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden and Democrats in Congress are of the mindset that forcing through legislation on party-line votes is the way to go.

That just doesn’t fly. In Congress, our mandate from the American people is simple: Don’t do anything dumb. Democrats haven’t gotten the memo.

**Democrats have the narrowest congressional majority in the last 50 years, yet they’re acting as if they have a supermajority**.

Clearly Pelosi, Schumer, and Biden don’t remember what happened in 2010 after they went rogue and passed Obamacare without a single Republican vote. Need a reminder? **Republicans picked up 63 seats in the House and flipped the majority.**

Democrats are at it once again. They’ve added more than $2 trillion to our national debt in just twelve months and they’re eyeing an additional $3 trillion in spending in the coming months - with zero plans to negotiate with Republicans.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c78fe276a9274463bd90b789590ebfd9&_e=DMtnhGyZJoUvOYwEUhccPhgPyQEZ7IUELHv6wuOAjJJaFdZcQFJyxrpK8sLtBrBD4eZkaREVcFVCZyGu1tamWL0xEixJBmkNMZlR0EpFcDDJGE8gD4BnSzoPmTX3lwk-AIUftRB6N9rhX5pmHWGTeI5V1dbLuvqv4FJjKksfRZUvZ3fXwGARIe-31zy5q32Wz6tpClDj71wjpjhU6a4TUUH12fLJRgzRelVc6VKLUh82iz3NUoP1syfasnsYVTqNKUtj4ElIX8KNXFPyDGTO5Oy9XRP2NiIN02RVncm9xYwbksLYTeQfbJsQ0VtpXgEIz65aoNmqCkIogx2b_vab9wLAcm3cWcqWlWU-UHlcprEj7XHxLnEIjzfcYjA3BX0NXfY-F_FHfjXJjlo7Hp__uQjmiBigQUBF0J9BwvYneQTyxP2Ou8XHXX-C2uL2XN_Gleak1v6nvNmn07W434T_bGWWT7fKMwUfHOZh9tybab4gClxYlUa0nIiJv00xpARCAehFfPwV9W8ufxE58zgTBA%3D%3D)
That’s a mistake.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need a few more Conservatives in the House to put the Democrats in the minority and prevent the Biden administration from doing more damage to our nation](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c78fe276a9274463bd90b789590ebfd9&_e=DMtnhGyZJoUvOYwEUhccPhgPyQEZ7IUELHv6wuOAjJJaFdZcQFJyxrpK8sLtBrBD4eZkaREVcFVCZyGu1tamWL0xEixJBmkNMZlR0EpFcDDJGE8gD4BnSzoPmTX3lwk-AIUftRB6N9rhX5pmHWGTeI5V1dbLuvqv4FJjKksfRZUvZ3fXwGARIe-31zy5q32Wz6tpClDj71wjpjhU6a4TUUH12fLJRgzRelVc6VKLUh82iz3NUoP1syfasnsYVTqNKUtj4ElIX8KNXFPyDGTO5Oy9XRP2NiIN02RVncm9xYwbksLYTeQfbJsQ0VtpXgEIr3j4sib75kAfPm_VW3cDWUXiNW7ROSC2zxVESS0emGstnpjdxq-vJb1GYG2DEpCiXPo_p854kJlLhsg9HfoAObTDeaeHYb_YVZ_7nimio_e8T2WM6TA-lgt_m4Jivnrh0wf1IP4Li0Aj2kpS9uzfk04cMkHojz7OqRhvmbdeIqFzzm9V_iHaV_ZX5q3ql3FIJ0gWRs9plloFq1zxbrkchQ%3D%3D)**.

While the election may not be this month – **we must begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY**.

A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for **[100,000 conservatives to join our “2022 comeback team”](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c78fe276a9274463bd90b789590ebfd9&_e=DMtnhGyZJoUvOYwEUhccPhgPyQEZ7IUELHv6wuOAjJJaFdZcQFJyxrpK8sLtBrBD4eZkaREVcFVCZyGu1tamWL0xEixJBmkNMZlR0EpFcDDJGE8gD4BnSzoPmTX3lwk-AIUftRB6N9rhX5pmHWGTeI5V1dbLuvqv4FJjKksfRZUvZ3fXwGARIe-31zy5q32Wz6tpClDj71wjpjhU6a4TUUH12fLJRgzRelVc6VKLUh82iz3NUoP1syfasnsYVTqNKUtj4ElIX8KNXFPyDGTO5Oy9XRP2NiIN02RVncm9xYwbksLYTeQfbJsQ0VtpXgEIS39uPbqvRm0GAeumCx6Swp4MayjgvYm2LAXrV_imUnAbDYmYLvNUiVzOJwFRFpUI0pNdGbXdtfDCT5zuuE0jtizDaSst3GlK9DOBXEaEH5GePO3KZvUp6Qhogvwzi0RheRp_kLEjxHHh-A_XIU9sZsvGNXU0RSPz6B-kwYYOnSpHksUnjIzCh20k5_Z0lmLyM_zMFMC6OJBu9hlFqnlaOQ%3D%3D)** in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back Congress this November. In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures.

We’re still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and **we’ve set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Tuesday, March 1st**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c78fe276a9274463bd90b789590ebfd9&_e=DMtnhGyZJoUvOYwEUhccPhgPyQEZ7IUELHv6wuOAjJJaFdZcQFJyxrpK8sLtBrBD4eZkaREVcFVCZyGu1tamWL0xEixJBmkNMZlR0EpFcDDJGE8gD4BnSzoPmTX3lwk-AIUftRB6N9rhX5pmHWGTeI5V1dbLuvqv4FJjKksfRZUvZ3fXwGARIe-31zy5q32Wz6tpClDj71wjpjhU6a4TUUH12fLJRgzRelVc6VKLUh82iz3NUoP1syfasnsYVTqNKUtj4ElIX8KNXFPyDGTO5Oy9XRP2NiIN02RVncm9xYwbksLYTeQfbJsQ0VtpXgEIgsaJdPqsx1Ig-Yj4rn0EJsWJqb30gc6aeNqjZpAVzZ9MWYaLZIoWYHNEqoNeKeWyKYcwb-gxrnjVXYlWt5qnW15gTSnOis-7AD491egEBo9hMp3UX68L7T3G63_-tDiljUiK9VYqKgsj2d9-uf8HscrzR7gxn5nv9PSvMecOYz1H-E2aOk-7o1i9Nfc1UHbDoka-Et869VUDtGkGZeouOg%3D%3D)

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[We’re counting on you to join our cause.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c78fe276a9274463bd90b789590ebfd9&_e=DMtnhGyZJoUvOYwEUhccPhgPyQEZ7IUELHv6wuOAjJJaFdZcQFJyxrpK8sLtBrBD4eZkaREVcFVCZyGu1tamWL0xEixJBmkNMZlR0EpFcDDJGE8gD4BnSzoPmTX3lwk-AIUftRB6N9rhX5pmHWGTeI5V1dbLuvqv4FJjKksfRZUvZ3fXwGARIe-31zy5q32Wz6tpClDj71wjpjhU6a4TUUH12fLJRgzRelVc6VKLUh82iz3NUoP1syfasnsYVTqNKUtj4ElIX8KNXFPyDGTO5Oy9XRP2NiIN02RVncm9xYwbksLYTeQfbJsQ0VtpXgEI3jd8bIb2tqyCXdi9Tcmzl7eF-1_Tv_YmRcU3oi-RgLopgNLblA7uoDxBKM4ydsMXjY7CM5UqR0e0vQLpWNxfIl6l-0bGljeRz_lcq6TC_CatunBVM2DwEhQ1YuIWfZ5EO3kVoBAzxkLlNnj2evm_s_s8PG_2nV_wfsH3ZauP_uQ-YIh-hDqV77FihqOM2hs_TUBAtvIDLKPPWiqByRnFXA%3D%3D)**

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can’t block Democrats’ pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in the November 2020 election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c78fe276a9274463bd90b789590ebfd9&_e=DMtnhGyZJoUvOYwEUhccPhgPyQEZ7IUELHv6wuOAjJJaFdZcQFJyxrpK8sLtBrBD4eZkaREVcFVCZyGu1tamWL0xEixJBmkNMZlR0EpFcDDJGE8gD4BnSzoPmTX3lwk-AIUftRB6N9rhX5pmHWGTeI5V1dbLuvqv4FJjKksfRZUvZ3fXwGARIe-31zy5q32Wz6tpClDj71wjpjhU6a4TUUH12fLJRgzRelVc6VKLUh82iz3NUoP1syfasnsYVTqNKUtj4ElIX8KNXFPyDGTO5Oy9XRP2NiIN02RVncm9xYwbksLYTeQfbJsQ0VtpXgEIvfxjmWIyfPDSp4PrpgzEpmCyxxuPM_4MTjV5-ES7LcPuTMuVnMZfpdTUXObE5Do6x3cKOgT8rMe4KQChI7Q1kZtmfo4BTwIy5AwVaC8z4Eeue6aF2aOhQUalB6UkokMnwAWutkrRLTOBtnAsTZV4gSpb8GX9UzWioI6K2cdlCugkZ1VYsTZAgZjjgVbwtUEjr4B1JKdlTsgJOHQ36R7eOA%3D%3D)**.

clean_body: It’s not even close as we kick off the election year. | Peter, this is huge... A brand-new poll from the Missouri Chamber of Commerce gives us a 12-point LEAD over our next closest challenger. We are running away with this race and the evidence is overwhelming. It’s clear that when it comes to the 1 SEAT needed to FLIP the 50-50 Senate from Kamala’s control, voters don’t want a Soros-backed puppet like our opponent, or another feckless RINO. They want a pro-Trump warrior who will ALWAYS fight to put America FIRST. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

Mitch McConnell is looking for allies, so it’s no wonder he would reach out to Larry Hogan. Hogan opposed the American Rescue Plan, which provided urgent relief to families, workers and small businesses across Maryland. And, like McConnell, he's fighting against the Democratic plan to cut prescription drug costs and the cost of child care while closing tax loopholes that benefit big multi-national corporations.
**That’s exactly the kind of guy Mitch McConnell and his big money SuperPACs like putting their wallets behind.**
And we need to be prepared to fight back and keep Chris in the Senate working for us and for our democracy. We can't let them flip this Senate seat blue and bring Mitch McConnell back as majority leader.

clean_body: | | = Friends, On Sunday, Maryland Republican Governor Larry Hogan took a brief break from lobbying against President Biden's plan to help lift children out of poverty and appeared on Face the Nation — where he bragged his polling shows he could defeat Chris in November. He refused to rule out getting into this Senate race by the February 22nd filing deadline and said, while he wasn't interested in the Senate, 'people' were telling him it was his 'patriotic duty' to run. As the Baltimore Sun wrote last week — it's no secret who those 'people' are. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Mitch McConnell is looking for allies, so it’s no wonder he would reach out to Larry Hogan. Hogan opposed the American Rescue Plan, which provided urgent relief to families, workers and small businesses across Maryland. And, like McConnell, he's fighting against the Democratic plan to cut prescription drug costs and the cost of child care while closing tax loopholes that benefit big multi-national corporations. That’s exactly the kind of guy Mitch McConnell and his big money SuperPACs like putting their wallets behind. And we need to be prepared to fight back and keep Chris in the Senate working for us and for our democracy. We can't let them flip this Senate seat blue and bring Mitch McConnell back as majority leader. = Thank you for standing with Chris and this people-powered campaign. We couldn't do it without you. ** THE AMERICA FIRST CANDIDATE
------------------------------------------------------------

**

PRESS RELEASE:
January 18, 2022

###

------------------------------------------------------------

** Mike Blasi Challenges Primary Opponents to a Town Hall Debate
------------------------------------------------------------

FREEHOLD, NJ (January 18, 2022) – Today Mike Blasi, Republican Candidate for Congressional District 4, announced that he is challenging his primary opponents to a town hall debate.

Blasi's Communications Director explains, “Mike is the most qualified and most ready for the job. He’s the only candidate who has been calling out Chris Smith on the issues and the only one who has been actively campaigning throughout the district".

Mike Blasi added, “I am the only candidate who lives in the new 4th District. We need to unite around the best candidate and a debate will clearly show that I’m in this for the right reasons, I’m ready for the job and ready to represent the people I call neighbors and friends.”

###

name: Kathy Hochul
subject: New York's first woman Governor
body:
Derek —

CommonGood told me I should reach out to you.

First : I made history as New York’s first woman governor and promised a new era of transparency, collaboration, and delivering results for New Yorkers.

Then : Immediately, we got to work fighting for New York’s workers and families — expanding vaccination efforts to tackle the spread of COVID-19 and establishing New York as a safe harbor for those seeking abortion care nationwide. And I gave renters, small-business owners, and landlords with much needed direct relief due to the economic impact of the pandemic.

Now : I could really use your help to fuel my campaign and keep moving New York forward. My top priority is helping New Yorkers come back from this pandemic stronger than ever before while restoring their faith in their government, but I can’t do this without you.

So today I’m asking: Will you split a donation between my campaign and CommonGood? With your support, we can continue delivering for our communities. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_hochul?refcode=20220118_CGVA_Hochul]

Thank you for your support,

Kathy Hochul

Governor of New York

This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c600afa0-7a78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/d36e7358-9d78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzZlNzM1OC05ZDc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MLcWtyUI7GhcFC0oGnNs4rpZLE7h6Eq-g8STIGZQkwM=&id=108609855 .

clean_body: Where do you stand on President Trump? | PLEASE CONFIRM YOUR INFORMATION BELOW TO BEGIN: | | DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT >> Peter, The Left (including the Democrats, Big Tech, and the Fake News Media) have been relentless in their attacks on President Donald J. Trump. But we expected that. It’s no surprise at all. If you only listened to Cable News, you’d think that no one supported President Trump and that Joe Biden was a saint. But we know that the truth is something far, far different. | Thank you. name: Peter Franchot
subject: A new poll shows that I’m leading the field
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
I have some exciting news to share with you today. According to a recent poll conducted earlier this month, our team has a strong lead in the Democratic race for Governor. In our phone poll of 580 likely Democratic primary voters conducted between January 6 and January 10, 2022, I am leading the Democratic field with 23% of the vote.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/GraphSupport_1200x1200.png]I hold a seven-point lead over the second-place candidate. Additionally, our poll also found that the number of undecided voters is beginning to fall. Only 24% of voters remain undecided in the race, compared to 54% from a previous poll we conducted last year. This survey was fully representative of the expected June 2022 primary across factors like gender, age, geography, and race, so it gives an excellent overview on the current state of the primary.
With $3.3 million cash on hand and a decisive lead in the polls, it’s clear that our people-powered campaign is closer to victory than any other candidate in the race. That’s all thanks to grassroots supporters like you.
Fresh off the heels of this major announcement, will you help spread the news that we are leading the field by sharing with your friends on social media? By amplifying our message with your friends, you can help us stay ahead in the polls and widen our lead.
Click here to view and share on Facebook. [https://www.facebook.com/photo?fbid=497448925080507&set=a.422901372535263]
Click here to view and share on Twitter. [https://twitter.com/peterfranchot/status/1483497431060955139/photo/1]
Click here to view and share on Instagram. [https://www.instagram.com/p/CY4WCN9qrwm/]
Together, we’re going to win the primary in June, take back the Governor’s mansion, and deliver on the concrete points of progress to lift our communities into the high quality of life that they deserve.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/816b0407-9978-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/ccf24f95-a178-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2YyNGY5NS1hMTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SxVsYCQk4CzpqKk1gfOZtoqgvI5IUmI8g8fE617lGII=&id=136194660 .

name: Team MTO
subject: We’re leading the way on voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie, Robert Lara Treasurer
body:
We’re balancing increasing voter access while keeping elections secure

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40807952/326048484/1198618133?refcode=EM_C_220118VotingRights_N_TEAM_ABQ_10_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2YyNGY5NS1hMTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jsdy9xENmMjEWUue5DbNcraaEJKTVig0Z72bzPh68cA=&emci=6c5a397e-7a75-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=c3f24f95-a178-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=3583156)
Hi Team,
Across the country, a few states are following Trump’s lead and enacting voter suppression laws that make it harder to vote.
But here in New Mexico, we’re working with Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham to lead the way on **protecting voting rights!**
Here are just a few of the ways we’re leading when it comes to making it _easier to vote:_
1.**_Making_** election day a state holiday and extending early voting all the way up to the Sunday before an election.
2.**_Creating_** a permanent absentee ballot list that allows people to voluntarily receive absentee ballots every election without making new requests.
3.**_Supporting_** Native voting access by expanding the timeline for indigenous nations, tribes, and pueblos to request alternate voting sites.
4.**_Improving_** our automatic voter registration system.
This legislation will help balance demands for voter access with the needs of maintaining our high levels of election security and integrity.
And it shows once again that with Maggie (and Governor Lujan Grisham!), **New Mexico is a leader when it comes to elections.**
Let’s get this critical legislation passed,

Team MTO
_ _
_Friends of Maggie
PO Box 473
Albuquerque, NM 87103
United States_
__ | _Paid for by Friends of Maggie, Robert Lara Treasurer._

name: Ron Johnson
subject: DECISION MADE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
Since I have been in office, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| |
---
| | | Fellow Conservative,
Since I have been in office, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like _The New York Times_ , _Washington Post_ , and the _Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_ where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me. And that is why today, I am officially announcing my re-election campaign for the Wisconsin Senate seat.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Fellow Conservative. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can.

And that's why I need your help.

**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-I88agi1taHsw3YVw "Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.")**

Ron Johnson
---
| | | [FIGHT FOR FREEDOM](http://trk.freedomfirstproject. "Fight for Freedom")
---

P.S. As the Left's number one target, they want to silence my voice. Liberal media conglomerates, talk shows, and newspapers will be pushing their viewers and readers to support liberal candidates that will work to tear down our institutions and impose their agenda by spreading their false and manipulative message. I really need your help.

| _A personal note from Ron Johnson:_

Thank you for standing strong with me, Fellow Conservative. While the media tries to smear me, I am not afraid of standing up for the truth. I appreciate you joining me in the battle for Wisconsin against the Radical Democrats.

Recently, CNN ranked my seat #3 most likely to flip. Reports are also saying that even the THREAT of losing my seat could derail plans to take back the Senate. The thought of losing WI is terrifying -- it's just one more step towards destroying Trump's Legacy.

So I need you to step up and stand strong with me. **[Please click here to donate now](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDE4LWZiZGUzYzk5YTA5NDQ3NjZiNDJkM2NkM2FhZWY2Y2JkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS53aW5yZWQuY29tL3Jvbi1qb2huc29uL3Jvbi1qb2huc29uLWVtYWlsLWZvb3Rlci8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjIwMTE4X0FFLUZGUC4xMDE4Nzhfcm9uLWpvaG5zb25fdDExMzI1MTYtNzg1JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWxwJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9QUUtRkZQLjEwMTg3OCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIyMDExOF9kZWNpc2lvbi1tYWRlIn0/uHWk6g5vQQcF5Qn7g14FxA "Please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for being a patriot,

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like The New York Times , Washington Post , and the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say. I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech. Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me. And that is why today, I am officially announcing my re-election campaign for the Wisconsin Senate seat. I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Fellow Conservative. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me. Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can. And that's why I need your help. "Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. Marco Rubio | | * | | "MarcoRubioFooter" | A personal note from Marco Rubio : Fellow Conservative, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race? Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. So here's the deal: "Footer Gif" I really do need your help, Fellow Conservative. People think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. name: Greg Casar
subject: Less than one month…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
Peter,
With less than a month until early voting begins, our campaign just received TWO major endorsements in the race for TX-35: U.S. Representative Pramila Jayapal and the Sunrise Movement !
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=01.18-email&amount=35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=01.18-email&amount=35]Join the Sunrise Movement and Rep. Jayapal in supporting our campaign! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=01.18-email&amount=35]
These endorsements mean so much to me, Peter. As the Chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, Rep. Jayapal has been a tireless champion for working families, social justice, and economic equality. She’s fought for a more fair and humane immigration system, a $15 minimum wage, and is the lead sponsor of Medicare for All in the House of Representatives.
The Sunrise Movement has been at the forefront of the grassroots movement to solve the climate crisis. Led by young people across the country, Sunrise is fighting every day to make climate change an urgent priority for lawmakers and helping elect leaders up-and-down the ballot who will do the same. They understand, like me, that our future depends on our commitment to tackling this issue–and I look forward to working alongside them when I’m elected.
With less than a month until early voting starts, I’m so proud to be endorsed by one of our nation’s foremost progressive leaders and a youth movement that’s leading the charge to protect our planet.
Can you join Rep. Pramila Jayapal and the Sunrise Movement in supporting our campaign with $5 today? Every contribution makes a difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=01.18-email&amount=35]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=01.18-email&amount=35]Our campaign is working hard to reach every voter in TX-35 in the final month before early voting begins. We’re counting on supporters like you to help us get out the vote. If you can, consider pitching in $5 to support our get out the vote efforts. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=01.18-email&amount=35] Together we can win this race.
Thank you,
-Greg
P.S. Visit our campaign store [https://store.casarforcongress.com/] to get a bumper sticker, koozie, or t-shirt in exchange for your donation!
http://facebook.com/gregcasar [http://facebook.com/gregcasar] http://twitter.com/gregcasar [http://twitter.com/gregcasar] http://instagram.com/gregcasar [http://instagram.com/gregcasar]

Greg Casar for Congress

Austin, TX 78703
United States

| Hi Friend,

Please join me for our Congressional Kickoff event at Burrito Social in North Redington Beach on Wednesday, February 9th from 5:00-6:30p.m.

Join Pinellas County Mayors as we talk politics and enjoy delicious Mexican food! The Mayors and I will be discussing the upcoming mid-term elections and how we win this seat back for the GOP and flip back Congress!

We will be raffling off lunch with me and three Pinellas County Mayors at the event! You’ll need to be there to win!

I hope to see you on February 9th!

Amanda Makki

name: Marcus Flowers
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene is an embarrassment. I need your help to defeat her at the polls.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220118_mf_polls [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220118_mf_polls]https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220118_mf_polls [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220118_mf_polls]
On January 6 of last year I sat back and watched as Marjorie Taylor Greene and the radical-right openly encouraged the insurrection that was happening in the halls of Congress.
It was at that moment I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines any longer -- so I threw my hat in the ring to run against her.
I believe that Georgia deserves a Representative who will fight to DEFEND our democracy, unlike Marjorie Taylor Greene who is constantly fighting to undermine it.
This race is critically important, and that’s why I’m asking for your help.
To win this race, we need supporters from across the country to stand up. Will you contribute today to help my campaign reach as many voters as possible between now and Election Day? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220118_mf_polls]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220118_mf_polls]
Marjorie Taylor Greene is the darling of the radical-right, but we won’t let that stop us. We’re working every single day to flip this seat, and supporters like you keep the engine running.
Let's do this,
Marcus Flowers
Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
Marcus for Georgia
PO Box 725
Bremen, GA 30110
United States

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Are you on Team Herschel?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you're with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b6a11adbe1e94216acd361e544cd7429&_e=qw8QPR38xxWqbAGj-Vaf-_KLdrbgwjiZ5eisS7b7_0kJxrKO_LCjePYgnLsx6NaHSyhuwVlVYEjRyDZWIrBubVO-2II4d4ZWeO_lkVzoSL8ftB-m33l1qYBqeq4cV3tNLuY4R6_hxuyo6Hr7MnCUPNwM4WSCNEdgN-1R2Irh68Zz2yTASVlH6YR-V7IDJ81rWrF6neBURd5pQLNWNk---JJzrLel8omOmyf8uu1E2uFUU1pDVn56yVs5frPbQXmRRpw2baUzkNsOtCbren5Yh5RCRvjXEnwWkoqg3uKyMvaOw3EaPuQ9zArxTgjMnONQz2Ai_feMciPSribKDyuUIeDniTY3S6RFXH3b5jL2X2sc8quv38T2JAfiK92cDgWhsZleY9PgyfjYYtUF0jFdElaHTCaSjpUG7RAQqj1hVsuV6VnBfYFJQQ5Ss6bQbcFz9jmJXlfS1dUKuczKQ7jDDQ%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

I've been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Peter, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b6a11adbe1e94216acd361e544cd7429&_e=qw8QPR38xxWqbAGj-Vaf-_KLdrbgwjiZ5eisS7b7_0kJxrKO_LCjePYgnLsx6NaHSyhuwVlVYEjRyDZWIrBubVO-2II4d4ZWeO_lkVzoSL8ftB-m33l1qYBqeq4cV3tNLuY4R6_hxuyo6Hr7MnCUPNwM4WSCNEdgN-1R2Irh68Zz2yTASVlH6YR-V7IDJ81rWrF6neBURd5pQLNWNk---JJzrLel8omOmyf8uu1E2uFUU1pDVn56yVs5frPbQXmRHUyXhQRsJRodu49ksKSZ-cDJx40Eo6wbSNxtRHLIVozBEgtZTkuDGT1ZTA-uLCjDcLMDRiSmAA6pdDz5h5XOMiyFdFEPubQXe0GCmrbOiTaC-nWvHC9oMhgSBQjodkUim-8ITeZ5tDjFi7LTnSSltxgeFFkxgnq4sCYRJ8826in14TK36-exfugfTLpRgItTCEFb7R7TMjYqcaR8cOVHpQ%3D%3D) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b6a11adbe1e94216acd361e544cd7429&_e=qw8QPR38xxWqbAGj-Vaf-_KLdrbgwjiZ5eisS7b7_0kJxrKO_LCjePYgnLsx6NaHSyhuwVlVYEjRyDZWIrBubVO-2II4d4ZWeO_lkVzoSL8ftB-m33l1qYBqeq4cV3tNLuY4R6_hxuyo6Hr7MnCUPNwM4WSCNEdgN-1R2Irh68Zz2yTASVlH6YR-V7IDJ81rWrF6neBURd5pQLNWNk---JJzrLel8omOmyf8uu1E2uFUU1pDVn56yVs5frPbQXmRdEmJIn3_Iq9XXxHJG8fIzl3hD1J_UyYa1dzJLK7TdyyrFrcWofx8ZS2sF_TsRoidzLmDTyX5zB39JETLha7TTACupibPreTH9WgbOcC-te54ztGr2fcJV7vUXezDeKxOf2T4gkPAQHGJkLmXxAd3MGFc6qrQT158r_VfAkuaAG9JZP3VJEVHzCuMmTuUBd6zbZHirL1WWMNgoWdWkrlwVA%3D%3D)
I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He's a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that's come across his desk in Washington.

He's pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That's just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you're with me, Peter. That's why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b6a11adbe1e94216acd361e544cd7429&_e=qw8QPR38xxWqbAGj-Vaf-_KLdrbgwjiZ5eisS7b7_0kJxrKO_LCjePYgnLsx6NaHSyhuwVlVYEjRyDZWIrBubVO-2II4d4ZWeO_lkVzoSL8ftB-m33l1qYBqeq4cV3tNLuY4R6_hxuyo6Hr7MnCUPNwM4WSCNEdgN-1R2Irh68Zz2yTASVlH6YR-V7IDJ81rWrF6neBURd5pQLNWNk---JJzrLel8omOmyf8uu1E2uFUU1pDVn56yVs5frPbQXmRhPG9wxo9Gctjv28-mhbdPSNqHofyslbcNKfjxz91QZDPb0vX5PjqHMzz9gQUVzn_y4ANdct4JHzFDzoExpPF8ln-wkbhGhJ9xOrHIlbXo4uF5pasa54fyOk_kSwSuf9h2z3F-efFc_rHBQ4jWYHGlJD7PMeDCBWd24K-ld7QcSwh9AyoyojnIGqaFO3pCunBdJmfO-xbHQR2SCEHKQXE9g%3D%3D) **

I've been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I've ever been a part of. Peter, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you'll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority.

Thanks,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b6a11adbe1e94216acd361e544cd7429&_e=qw8QPR38xxWqbAGj-Vaf-_KLdrbgwjiZ5eisS7b7_0kJxrKO_LCjePYgnLsx6NaHSyhuwVlVYEjRyDZWIrBubVO-2II4d4ZWeO_lkVzoSL8ftB-m33l1qYBqeq4cV3tNLuY4R6_hxuyo6Hr7MnCUPNwM4WSCNEdgN-1R2Irh68Zz2yTASVlH6YR-V7IDJ81rWrF6neBURd5pQLNWNk---JJzrLel8omOmyf8uu1E2uFUU1pDVn56yVs5frPbQXmRv2rpKqKkpDDiFVzlqS6XAgjpyIH57_1_4U7So-G8VaPNIrDuGX0MxrrloONqMWRuxjDglJdDlDU311q94uHdnqCSl_LPZ7jtkApqlBDSjbJP-kdPZbeN2x2VXaxoSQimQAEqW5PWo9EZtZyBajxvKA0XzoEG7BJnWbGH3okZIQTVPUvL2OH2Hxj6pr7X3NZTHbKbbc6DmUor4GxRscD2jg%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker

clean_body: If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you're with me. Join Team Herschel today! | Peter, I've been on a lot of teams. From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, I know what makes a good teammate. We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win. Peter, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia. I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He's a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that's come across his desk in Washington. He's pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government. This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That's just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. Georgians deserve better.America deserves better. As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you're with me, Peter. That's why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team. I've been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I've ever been a part of. Peter, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you'll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Kevin Kwan
subject: Join me at a special event in support of Marco Lopez (D)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
Only a few more days to RSVP!
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40808863/326052850/-1589231112?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk405-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjM2ODA3OC1hNjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JvP8NxjysULXLF_oAkgUqsD6o1gGxollowgyCVB3yHc=)
---
Friend, I'm Kevin Kwan, author of Crazy Rich Asians. Usually when I reach out to someone for a favor, I'm asking them to read a new book draft I'm working on. But today, I'm asking you to do something a little different, but just as important:
**Will you join me and California State Treasurer Fiona Ma on Jan. 20 at 4 p.m. PT | 7 p.m. ET for a virtual event in support of Democrat Marco Lopez , the _only_ immigrant candidate for governor in the entire country and soon to be Arizona's next governor? **
| | [RSVP NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40808864/326052851/-1589231112?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk405-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjM2ODA3OC1hNjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JvP8NxjysULXLF_oAkgUqsD6o1gGxollowgyCVB3yHc=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40808865/326052852/-1589231112?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk405-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjM2ODA3OC1hNjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JvP8NxjysULXLF_oAkgUqsD6o1gGxollowgyCVB3yHc=)
Marco is exactly the governor Arizona needs. He's a former border city mayor, Obama administration alum and small business owner who has dedicated his entire career to making things better for real people.

I may have written about Crazy Rich Asians, but Marco's opponent is backed by crazy rich Republican megadonors who think they can buy this governorship. The event we're holding on Jan. 20 is going to kick off this election year and make clear – Arizona is not for sale.
It's going to take all of us working together to elect Marco and protect Arizona's future from dangerous extremism. **[So please, RSVP now to join the event on Jan. 20, and I'll see you there!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40808866/326052853/-1589231112?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk405-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjM2ODA3OC1hNjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JvP8NxjysULXLF_oAkgUqsD6o1gGxollowgyCVB3yHc=)**
| | [RSVP NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40808867/326052854/-1589231112?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk405-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjM2ODA3OC1hNjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JvP8NxjysULXLF_oAkgUqsD6o1gGxollowgyCVB3yHc=)
---
Thank you,

Kevin Kwan
NYT bestselling author
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40808868/326052855/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk405-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjM2ODA3OC1hNjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JvP8NxjysULXLF_oAkgUqsD6o1gGxollowgyCVB3yHc=) Thank you so much.
– Marco Lopez | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40808869/326052856/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk405-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjM2ODA3OC1hNjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JvP8NxjysULXLF_oAkgUqsD6o1gGxollowgyCVB3yHc=)

name: Official Left Action Petition
subject: Liz Cheney: Trump “can never be anywhere near the Oval Office ever again."
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign your name: Demand Congress invoke the 14th Amendment and BAN Trump from office >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1f66330-2841-4e88-ba98-a27a13dd0928/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T627d76b8-ee1c-4a6c-a669-06b4cea976da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump’s presidency was a complete disaster. The thought of him spending another four years in the White House is terrifying – it would spell the end of our democracy. Republican Rep. Liz Cheney, vice chair of the January 6th Committee, says Donald Trump is **" clearly unfit for future office [and] clearly can never be anywhere near the Oval Office ever again."** We wouldn’t put it past Trump to run again in 2024 – so we need to take action to ensure he never sets foot in the White House again. There’s only one solution: **We need Congress to BAN him from holding office ever again. ** Under Section 3 of the 14th Amendment, “No person shall be a Senator or Representative in Congress... or hold any office...who, having previously taken an oath...to support the Constitution of the United States, shall have engaged in insurrection or rebellion against the [Constitution].” [Sign your name: Demand Congress invoke the 14th Amendment and BAN Trump from office >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0008c447-44e3-4ac0-bb62-628b5b24d70c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d93937d-688a-4233-9c88-942187efe5e4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |

subject: I need you to know three critical things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **[I'm about to give you three critical updates on the state of our House Majority. But first, I'm asking you to become a 2022 Democratic Member. This election is going to make or break our House Majority, and I need you to understand exactly what's at stake so I can earn your support. Will you read until the very end and then chip in $3 to confirm your Democratic Membership? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-CN_)**

Please read carefully: These three quick updates explain why my Democratic Members are so important.

**1.** Trump hinted he'll run for President if Republicans flip the House.

**2.** Republicans and Democrats are currently TIED in the polls.

**3.** And GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy just hauled in **$400,000** to give Republicans the upper hand.

**[I'm fighting to make sure Republican schemes never become reality. But the GOP has raised RECORD-BREAKING amounts of money to defeat our Majority. That's why rounding up the support of my strongest grassroots Democrats is so important. I'm calling for 20 more 2022 Democratic Members from your state to step up before my midnight deadline, close this budget gap, and SAVE our Majority from a Republican takeover. Can I count on you? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-YTZLp7VH_)** | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)
2022 DEMOCRATIC MEMBERSHIP STATUS: **PENDING**

subject: fwd: Will you personally endorse my campaign?
body:
Incredible response | Friend,

On Sunday night, Max reached out asking for your personal endorsement of our campaign to unseat Doug LaMalfa. _The response was incredible!_

**Hundreds stepped up. We only need 47 more supporters to add their names to hit our goal of 250 grassroots endorsers.**

**[Read Max’s note below, then help us kick off the election year with strength by adding your name to personally endorse Max’s campaign to unseat Doug LaMalfa.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40809228/326054656/-184704588?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE3N2ZlMy1hODc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NSz1FzdgZY4k3LhNGHRhyO7B_2UxK3RT8gbknz6nM1o=&emci=fad26978-a478-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ea177fe3-a878-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=11663292)**

Thanks!

Team Steiner HQ

**Begin Forwarded Message:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40809229/326054659/-184704588?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE3N2ZlMy1hODc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NSz1FzdgZY4k3LhNGHRhyO7B_2UxK3RT8gbknz6nM1o=&emci=fad26978-a478-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ea177fe3-a878-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=11663292)
Hey there, friend.

It's been a busy few weeks on the campaign trail here in CA-01. This month alone we've held campaign office hours in Redding and Chico. I also hosted a press conference calling out Doug LaMalfa's betrayal of our Democracy after Jan 6th.

I'm so proud that I've been able to run an issues-focused campaign centered on the needs of the people. The pundits and establishment want to write us off, but they can't write off the passion I'm seeing in this community and what we're for.

We've outraised and outworked Doug LaMalfa, and we're sending a message that we are ready for bold, forward-thinking leadership in the North State. You are why this campaign has made it this far -- and frankly, we are only growing!

**[So today I have a special request: Will you add your name to say you personally endorse my campaign for Congress? We are hoping to lock in 250 grassroots endorsers to kick off the election year with strength.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40809231/326054660/-184704588?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE3N2ZlMy1hODc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NSz1FzdgZY4k3LhNGHRhyO7B_2UxK3RT8gbknz6nM1o=&emci=fad26978-a478-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ea177fe3-a878-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=11663292)**
| **[Endorse Max »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40809232/326054661/-184704588?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE3N2ZlMy1hODc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NSz1FzdgZY4k3LhNGHRhyO7B_2UxK3RT8gbknz6nM1o=&emci=fad26978-a478-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ea177fe3-a878-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=11663292)**
---

I'm under no illusion that we have a long road ahead, but we’re going to keep showing up and listening to what folks have to say. Unlike LaMalfa, we’re taking local issues seriously -- chief among them are family-sustaining wages, forest and water management, and preventing wildland fires.

**[I hope you're as energized as I am for the election ahead. In the meantime, help us kick off 2022 with strength by adding your personal endorsement of our campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40809233/326054662/-184704588?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE3N2ZlMy1hODc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NSz1FzdgZY4k3LhNGHRhyO7B_2UxK3RT8gbknz6nM1o=&emci=fad26978-a478-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ea177fe3-a878-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=11663292)**

Thanks in advance,

Max Steiner
Combat Veteran for Congress
**[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40809234/326054663/360059203?refcode=em-1.18.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE3N2ZlMy1hODc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NSz1FzdgZY4k3LhNGHRhyO7B_2UxK3RT8gbknz6nM1o=)**

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40809235/326054664/390307162?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE3N2ZlMy1hODc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NSz1FzdgZY4k3LhNGHRhyO7B_2UxK3RT8gbknz6nM1o=)
