name: Governor Steve Sisolak
subject: I’m damn proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Our progress will come to a screeching halt if we don’t keep Nevada blue this next election.
#
Friends,
My core value of public service, and why I ran for Governor, comes from a lesson my dad used to tell me:**You need to leave your community better than you found it.**
As a GM line worker, he taught me that it takes hard work and grit. Those lessons were what I used to work my way through college, build my own business from scratch here, and raise my two girls as a single dad in this community.
I believe in the power of opportunity. Nevada has been a place of opportunity for myself and my family, and I ran to make our state a place of opportunity for everyone -- no matter who you are or where you’re from.
And **I’m damn proud of what we’ve accomplished so far.**
During my time as Nevada governor, we’ve fought back against state Republicans’ relentless attempts to suppress the vote and undermine our democracy. And then, we**permanently expanded mail-in voting.**

We’ve banded together to overcome the GOP’s reckless handling of the COVID-19 pandemic,**ensuring folks had personal protection equipment and ample access to the vaccine.**
We stood with labor unions and workers during this unprecedented moment by rebuilding an economy that uplifts working families and**guaranteed a return to lost jobs.**
We’ve increased access to public health services by **becoming only the second state to pass a Public Health Care Option** and **increased funding for public education** so that every child has an opportunity to succeed.
But our progress will come to a __screeching halt__ if we don’t keep Nevada blue this next election. Election experts have ranked Nevada as one of the states most at-risk to flip red, and National Republicans are spending millions to make that a reality.
**[So I’m asking for your help to continue building a stronger Nevada and keep our battleground state blue. Can I count on to chip in $5 to my re-election campaign and Jacky Rosen? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40809282/326055099/1509421597?refcode=jr_em_nd_220118_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmYwOTI4Ni1hOTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x7nPBUB_E1e0s0KPpIKLQNMcf3OrHwzZ6Xz61qkuX6c=)**
Thank you for standing with me,
Steve

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40809283/326055100/1509421597?refcode=jr_em_nd_220118_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmYwOTI4Ni1hOTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x7nPBUB_E1e0s0KPpIKLQNMcf3OrHwzZ6Xz61qkuX6c=)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from this email list: [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d0e5fd64-9878-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/46f09286-a978-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmYwOTI4Ni1hOTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x7nPBUB_E1e0s0KPpIKLQNMcf3OrHwzZ6Xz61qkuX6c=&id=105090150)

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

| | Dear Friend,

**It's been 40 years since Oregon elected its last Republican governor.** This year, I would like to help change the course of history and at the same time make history by electing Jessica Gomez our next governor. You can help do the same in less than a minute by voting for Jessica in the [Oregon Catalyst's latest gubernatorial straw poll](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=b55f27372a&e=7e91be8cad).

---
| [Vote Now!](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=661456a6e0&e=7e91be8cad "Vote Now!")
---
| Oregon is at a crossroads, and Jessica Gomez is the leader who can bring people together for thoughtful solutions to the challenges of everyday Oregonians. **Jessica is the only one who can defeat the Democratic machine and restore balance to our beloved state. **Please take a few seconds to support Jessica in [this poll](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=74b68b6ca6&e=7e91be8cad). Your vote will help demonstrate our momentum in the Republican primary, and put us one step closer to sending a Republican back to the governor's office this November.

I hope we can count on your support. Enough of failed leadership!

Terri Moffett
Lane Co. Precinct Committee Person

Friend,
In only one year of a Joe Biden administration, we have suffered through a:

● Inflation Crisis ● Border Crisis ● Crime Crisis ● Supply Chain Crisis ● Opioid Crisis ● Gas Prices Crisis ● Covid Crisis ● Afghanistan Withdrawal Crisis

clean_body: | | | | What was the worst? | Friend, In only one year of a Joe Biden administration, we have suffered through a: ● Inflation Crisis ● Border Crisis ● Crime Crisis ● Supply Chain Crisis ● Opioid Crisis ● Gas Prices Crisis ● Covid Crisis ● Afghanistan Withdrawal Crisis And this is just the start of four long years. But we can fight back by electing Real Republicans, Like Harriet Hageman, to Congress. And while those other DC politicians only listen to the media and the coastal elite. Harriet knows it’s true Americans, like YOU, that matter! That is why we want to know what you thought of Joe Biden and his Administration's job of 2021. 1) What was Joe Biden’s worst crisis? Tomorrow we will go over all responses and review the results. Please make sure your response is fully filled out and submitted on time. Harriet is looking forward to receiving your input, friend. Thank you, Hageman Polling | | | |

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40809911/326057781/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDFlNTE1Yi1hYjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOpNgxrj8ff0TLF_GXqzWE2PRhRzTa5_mWY39YpAPVE=&emci=d6905dac-9378-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4d1e515b-ab78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=11385749)

Dear Peter,

It is the beginning of an election year, Peter, and I know your inboxes are going to be flooded with more and more emails, text messages, and asks for donations all competing for your attention.

I know they get a little annoying, but I'm going to be blunt – with voting rights, reproductive rights, the state of democracy, climate change, COVID-19, and so much more on the line, we cannot risk being silent. Not when this seat is one of the few toss-up districts in the country.

**[If you also think there's too much at stake to sit this out, chip in what you can today, and let's start this election year stronger than ever>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40809912/326057782/1907459259?refcode=em22_220118_MM1Resend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDFlNTE1Yi1hYjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOpNgxrj8ff0TLF_GXqzWE2PRhRzTa5_mWY39YpAPVE=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40809913/326057783/1907459259?refcode=em22_220118_MM1Resend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDFlNTE1Yi1hYjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOpNgxrj8ff0TLF_GXqzWE2PRhRzTa5_mWY39YpAPVE=) The truth is, **it was only through the massive mobilization and organizing efforts that millions of people turned out to create the Blue Wave in 2018 and defeat Trump in 2020.** We _must_ do it again, but I have to admit I'm a little concerned.

Our campaign just isn't seeing the fundraising numbers or the unprecedented level of engagement that turned so many people out to vote the last two cycles. It's going to take an even bigger turnout to maintain Democratic control of the House and Senate -- I know we can do it, but **we cannot slow down now.**

**[You've always pulled through when we needed you, and now I'm asking again- pitch in to keep up the Blue Wave momentum in 2022 so we can finally have the Democratic majorities we need to bring the bold changes our country needs>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40809914/326057784/1907459259?refcode=em22_220118_MM1Resend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDFlNTE1Yi1hYjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOpNgxrj8ff0TLF_GXqzWE2PRhRzTa5_mWY39YpAPVE=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40809915/326057785/1907459259?refcode=em22_220118_MM1Resend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDFlNTE1Yi1hYjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOpNgxrj8ff0TLF_GXqzWE2PRhRzTa5_mWY39YpAPVE=) [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40809916/326057786/1907459259?refcode=em22_220118_MM1Resend&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDFlNTE1Yi1hYjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOpNgxrj8ff0TLF_GXqzWE2PRhRzTa5_mWY39YpAPVE=) I know it's easy to get burned out with the seemingly endless campaigning and nonstop electioneering. I wish it didn't have to be this way, but when Republicans continue to rely on wealthy super-donors and corporate PAC money, Democrats simply have no choice.

Our grassroots donors are the backbone of this campaign, and your time, energy, and -- yes, donations -- is how we will win. **Let's make the 2022 Blue Wave even bigger, together.**

Thank you so much for your support,

Christy [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40809917/326057787/1907459259?refcode=em22_220118_MM1Resend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDFlNTE1Yi1hYjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOpNgxrj8ff0TLF_GXqzWE2PRhRzTa5_mWY39YpAPVE=)

clean_body: | Dear Peter, It is the beginning of an election year, Peter, and I know your inboxes are going to be flooded with more and more emails, text messages, and asks for donations all competing for your attention. I know they get a little annoying, but I'm going to be blunt – with voting rights, reproductive rights, the state of democracy, climate change, COVID-19, and so much more on the line, we cannot risk being silent. Not when this seat is one of the few toss-up districts in the country. = = The truth is, it was only through the massive mobilization and organizing efforts that millions of people turned out to create the Blue Wave in 2018 and defeat Trump in 2020. We must do it again, but I have to admit I'm a little concerned. Our campaign just isn't seeing the fundraising numbers or the unprecedented level of engagement that turned so many people out to vote the last two cycles. It's going to take an even bigger turnout to maintain Democratic control of the House and Senate -- I know we can do it, but we cannot slow down now. = = = I know it's easy to get burned out with the seemingly endless campaigning and nonstop electioneering. I wish it didn't have to be this way, but when Republicans continue to rely on wealthy super-donors and corporate PAC money, Democrats simply have no choice. Our grassroots donors are the backbone of this campaign, and your time, energy, and -- yes, donations -- is how we will win. Let's make the 2022 Blue Wave even bigger, together. Thank you so much for your support, Christy = *

name: Angela
subject: Lunch ✓ Backpack ✓ Masks ✓
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANGELA ANGEL FOR MARYLAND PO Box 471455
body:
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40809969/326058307/-1658601434?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTdlM2IwZi1hYzc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5GqpHpX1zFyGpNQYAeJHjs5ulHfBAuKyliAY-PmbL4s=&emci=d943bc44-7978-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=197e3b0f-ac78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=8410825)
---
Friend,

As a mom, today marked a familiar feeling for me. Getting their lunches ready, backpacks organized, and outfits ready to go. It was the first day back to school, just like any other January, but this year, in so many ways, it was not.

Through nearly two years of this pandemic, I, like so many other parents of children in school, have had to adapt to realities we could never have imagined for ourselves. We've tried virtual learning, we've tried hybrid learning, and even now that we are learning in-person – everything looks and feels just a little different.

When I saw Yael and Josiah off to their bus this morning, it was after we had first taken a COVID-19 test at home, and they arrived not to a sea of excited faces, but to a sea of masks. I could imagine some of their smiles underneath, and I understand how important it is for our children to return to the classroom, but **we must do so safely.**

In our community, Prince George's County public schools have implemented new safety regulations for the return to in-person learning, such as **testing requirements, access to at-home tests and KN95 masks for students and teachers, updated quarantine measures after exposure, and limits of crowds at athletic and other events.** But I know many of us still have questions and understandable concerns about the safety of our own families, and our entire community. I know that even with new, stringent regulations, sending our children back to school amidst an ever-changing pandemic is agonizing.

That's why I'm fully committed, both as a mom and as your next Congresswoman, to doing whatever it takes to make sure _every child_ can return to school without fear, and that every parent or caretaker can worry a bit less about their child's safety and health while in the care of our educators. Today should be a day where a child's biggest concern is how much homework they're going to have, or whether or not they share a class with their best friend, _not_ whether or not they have enough masks to stay safe, or if they're going to get sick from going to school.

As our kids pack their school bags, don their masks, and bravely walk the halls amidst a ruthless pandemic, it's the responsibility of our leaders to step up and do what it takes to make sure our kids, teachers, and all public school employees are safe.

I hope I will have your support.

– Angela Angel

[PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40809970/326058308/-1610819762?refcode=em22_footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTdlM2IwZi1hYzc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5GqpHpX1zFyGpNQYAeJHjs5ulHfBAuKyliAY-PmbL4s=) PAID FOR BY ANGELA ANGEL FOR MARYLAND PO Box 471455
District Heights, MD 20753
240-293-2552 This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
You can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d943bc44-7978-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/197e3b0f-ac78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTdlM2IwZi1hYzc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5GqpHpX1zFyGpNQYAeJHjs5ulHfBAuKyliAY-PmbL4s=&id=110829508).

name: Charles Graham
subject: This is a long email about the Battle of Hayes Pond, and by the time you're done reading it, I hope I will have inspired you to chip in to my campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charles Graham for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40810004/326058345/-325589832?refcode=gra_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzdlM2IwZi1hYzc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QqTWP18xZ4EpPaqj-CM9XDZTqR_1Psd4wr83uo_OI2c=)

| | Friend, I’m writing to you today on the 64th anniversary of the Battle of Hayes Pond to share my story about why I’m running for Congress. I hope you’ll take a moment out of your day to keep reading – it would mean a lot. [**When you finish reading, I hope I will have inspired you to chip in $25 or whatever you can to help us reach our mid-month goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40810005/326058347/1028796401?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_220118_FR_HayesPondAnniversary_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzdlM2IwZi1hYzc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QqTWP18xZ4EpPaqj-CM9XDZTqR_1Psd4wr83uo_OI2c=) **Now, here’s my story:** When I was just a boy, the Ku Klux Klan announced a night rally in my home county of Robeson, North Carolina – a poor farming community made up of Black, white, and American Indian folks like my family and me – proud members of the Lumbee tribe. The Klan called the Lumbees “mongrels” and “half breeds” – and, despite warnings from the police chief that our community would not tolerate their hate, 50 Klan members arrived at Hayes Pond the night of January 18th, 1958. Not a bad turn out for a winter night – the problem is, **they were surrounded by 400 Lumbees.** Hundreds of regular folks – barbers, expectant mothers – banded together to fight back against hate and ignorance. The Klan got run out of town, and after the press ran with the story of one town beating the Klan, the Battle of Hayes Pond became a forgotten part of history. I decided to make the Battle of Hayes Pond a centerpiece of my campaign because of what it represents: when we look out for each other, we can defeat hate. I’m running to remind folks that we can trust our neighbors, that we don’t have to live in fear. The people who stood up at Hayes Pond refused to be afraid. And I want to share that lesson with every North Carolinian and every American – that human dignity is a human right. [**So today, in honor of the 64th anniversary of the Battle of Hayes Pond, will you chip in $25 or whatever you can to help me become the first Native American to represent North Carolina in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40810006/326058348/1028796401?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_220118_FR_HayesPondAnniversary_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzdlM2IwZi1hYzc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QqTWP18xZ4EpPaqj-CM9XDZTqR_1Psd4wr83uo_OI2c=) Thank you,
Charles

name: Mike Collier
subject: This is not how Democracy ought to work.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Folks, **Our democracy is under attack.** Republican lawmakers have seized on the Big Lie and are using false claims as cover to introduce hundreds of voter suppression bills in state legislatures across the country and gerrymandering legislative districts, especially here in Texas. Here’s the bottom line: Lawmakers like Dan Patrick are trying to deny thousands of Texans their inalienable right to vote to avoid accountability for their years of failures. Just this week, election offices from across the state have reported that nearly half of applications to vote by mail have been rejected due to changes in the law championed by Dan Patrick. Instead of focusing on supporting hospitals and health care workers overwhelmed by the recent surge of COVID-19 cases or fixing the damn grid, Texas Republicans are pouring all their energy into evading accountability and staying in power through gerrymandering and suppressing the vote. That is NOT how Democracy ought to work. **Folks, the right to vote is sacred, and we must fight to keep it that way.** That's why I unequivocally support federal legislation to immediately protect voting rights, such as the _Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act._ [**This is an all-hands-on-deck moment, and our democracy hangs in the balance. That’s why I’m asking you to join me today in raising your voice. Add your name next to mine and tell Congress: Take immediate action to protect the right to vote:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40810018/326058362/-149756772?refcode=AU_MC_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTdlM2IwZi1hYzc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yVQwiyRof6KVFVIKpMILourgNqoKeJF-bu5518Axr1I=&emci=86d37741-8c78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=157e3b0f-ac78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=7689298) | [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40810019/326058363/-149756772?refcode=AU_MC_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220118_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTdlM2IwZi1hYzc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yVQwiyRof6KVFVIKpMILourgNqoKeJF-bu5518Axr1I=&emci=86d37741-8c78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=157e3b0f-ac78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=7689298)

name: Jason Miller
subject: 💢 Gerrymandered Maps Pass Committee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

“Democrats in Tennessee are about 40% of the vote but get about 11% of representation under Tennessee Republicans' proposed Congressional map.”

Peter, the Republicans' gerrymandered masks passed the House and Senate committees today, despite community testimonial pointing out just how rigged they are. Constituents from across Tennessee joined the committee meetings today to push back against these unfair district maps, but the Republican majority railroaded them through anyway. They even put forward and passed amendments last minute that members hadn't even seen the language for yet.

Tennessee Democrats pushed back. Senator Brenda Gilmore pushed back on Nashville being split into three Congressional districts, Senator Katrina Robinson called Republicans out for not being transparent about their legal council, and Senator Jeff Yarbro proposed maps that are mathematically superior in every way — AND they keep communities whole.

We are preparing to sue Tennessee Republicans for rigging the maps in their favor, but we need a big boost in our legal fund to get there. Can you chip in $25 now to help us reach our $30,000 goal by the end of the month? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]

OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

We are doing everything we can to push back against these maps, but it's going to take a huge push to mount a legal case against the Republicans.

Help us get there — can you chip in $25 now to help us reach our $30,000 goal so we can sue Tennessee Republicans for rigging the system in their favor? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

Thanks as always,

Jason Miller

name: shontelbrown.com
subject: ICYMI: Another Ohio Supreme Court decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
The Ohio Supreme Court released another decision, this time about our Congressional maps.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40810122/326058828/230165891?refcode=EM_FR_220118Maps_N_SB_ALL_5_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGVkNzQ3NC1hZDc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TcYKOUgFF19Vgaw-kIGDWBr8-2leiGUzbuTYh_Pjvx8=) **_FIRST:_** The Ohio GOP drew legislative maps heavily gerrymandered to rig elections in their favor.

**_THEN:_** The Ohio Supreme Court struck down the proposed state legislative maps saying they violated the state’s constitution.

**_NOW:_** The Ohio Supreme Court just _**struck down**_ the Congressional maps as well!

This is a big victory for democracy and the voters of Ohio. Now the state legislature has 30 days to draw new maps.

[**_These new maps could dramatically change Shontel’s district. We need to be prepared for everything. name: Cora Neumann
subject: Re: Affordable housing in Montana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
No one should be priced out of their hometown. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40810380/326059948/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWExOGMwMi1hZjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=__83tZ4zrH36IShZ01RvY-Yx_l_Ikh2K2ZD2LQfFj_U=) Friend, I got into this race to help ensure Montana families have access to the jobs, housing, and healthcare they need to thrive. Unfortunately, we’re experiencing a housing crisis that is hurting all of our communities, as covered in this recent story:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40810381/326059949/1251803550?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWExOGMwMi1hZjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=__83tZ4zrH36IShZ01RvY-Yx_l_Ikh2K2ZD2LQfFj_U=&emci=1917586e-ab78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=eea18c02-af78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=37373330) Last week, I met with a young, single mom who was evicted from her Belgrade apartment after living there for 12 years. She was only given 24 hours notice. I hear stories like this in every town across our district. It’s heartbreaking, and it’s unacceptable.

The unprecedented growth in Montana should benefit Montanans – not push them out of our state. No one should be priced out of their hometown. We need more affordable housing options, and we need them now. Luckily, we have grassroots and local leaders leading the charge – but they need leaders in Congress who will show up, listen, and help bring federal support and incentives to the table.

When it comes to our main streets, our small businesses, and our economy, I will fight every day to make sure Montana families can thrive and folks who live and work here can afford to stay.

**I’m ready to be an advocate for affordable housing in Congress, and I’m committed to creating solutions at the federal level that support our efforts locally. But it’s important that I hear from you, first:**

[**What are some of your ideas on how we can address Montana’s housing issues? If you have personal experience dealing with the affordable housing crisis, I’d love to hear from you, too.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40810382/326059950/1251803550?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWExOGMwMi1hZjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=__83tZ4zrH36IShZ01RvY-Yx_l_Ikh2K2ZD2LQfFj_U=&emci=1917586e-ab78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=eea18c02-af78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=37373330)
| **[Share Your Thoughts](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40810383/326059951/1251803550?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWExOGMwMi1hZjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=__83tZ4zrH36IShZ01RvY-Yx_l_Ikh2K2ZD2LQfFj_U=&emci=1917586e-ab78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=eea18c02-af78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=37373330)**
---

I really appreciate your input and support,

_Cora_

**[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40810384/326059952/655314317?refcode=em-1.18.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWExOGMwMi1hZjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=__83tZ4zrH36IShZ01RvY-Yx_l_Ikh2K2ZD2LQfFj_U=)**
---
Paid for by Cora for Montana
---
Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. To learn more about Cora, visit her website [here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40810385/326059953/-1800721441?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWExOGMwMi1hZjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=__83tZ4zrH36IShZ01RvY-Yx_l_Ikh2K2ZD2LQfFj_U=&emci=1917586e-ab78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=eea18c02-af78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=37373330) Consider supporting Cora's campaign [by making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40810386/326059954/1820125544?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWExOGMwMi1hZjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=__83tZ4zrH36IShZ01RvY-Yx_l_Ikh2K2ZD2LQfFj_U=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/1917586e-ab78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/eea18c02-af78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWExOGMwMi1hZjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=__83tZ4zrH36IShZ01RvY-Yx_l_Ikh2K2ZD2LQfFj_U=&id=143536037).

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Please forgive me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend, please excuse how blunt I’m about to be, but desperate times call for desperate measures. Listen...
I’ve begged. I’ve pleaded. I’ve humbly asked.
|
---
| | | Friend, please excuse how blunt I'm about to be, but desperate times call for desperate measures. Listen...

I've begged.
I've pleaded.
I've humbly asked.
I've even listed out the stakes - I'm the most vulnerable Republican Senator running for re-election, my race will determine control of the Senate.

_**All this - and you STILL haven 't stepped up.**_

Maybe you haven't stepped up because you think Florida is a shoo-in but that couldn't be further from the truth. Florida's last Senate election went to a recount and Republicans BARELY won. My race is virtually tied, Friend, I'm depending on you...

I'll ask one more time, can I count on you? I really **really** need this year to start off strong.

**[SEND DESPERATELY NEEDED HELP>>](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6p21edamdquvtsmvclhnj1ok0lo8lu1h46as0vg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clgmao34c1h2bs)**

Thank you for your support,

Marco Rubio

| _A personal note from Marco Rubio_ :

Friend, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race?

Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. Schumer and his cronies are propping her up with their multi-million dollar warchests all because they know she'll be a RUBBER STAMP for their radical agenda. If we let up and the Democrats win in Florida, they will KEEP control of the Senate and continue to force their dangerous agenda through Congress.

It is up to us to stop this, Friend. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6807fu4uis56mp5srmn56sq3p0lce2c63t0moao_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clgmao34c1h2bs "please click here to donate now.")**

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

name: Holly McCormack
subject: Where is Marjorie Taylor Greene?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40810452/326060105/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzNjYWE0NC1hZjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0X6mvQ_jufKjDpRLwQFUPOJfg9Ooev4CDN7VYeFQ5j0=&emci=a26f0ef9-a578-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=033caa44-af78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=23594672) | |
---
Peter, it's Holly. Today I wanted to take a moment to discuss one of the key issues in GA-14, and frankly across the nation: **Childcare**.

Childcare is an invaluable resource to the families in our community, yet there is little to no access to childcare for many Northwest Georgian families, including my own. When I had my second child, my husband and I had to work opposite shifts for years because we simply couldn’t afford it. My story is not a unique one, it’s one that millions of families experience across the country.

A couple of months ago I sat down with Leanne, a childcare worker in Whitfield County. Whitfield County has only three childcare facilities, with a capacity of 35 children per center. Leanne has had mothers crying and begging for childcare because they are desperate for quality care. And now, the Childcare Tax Credit is about to run out. **This needs to be fixed now and my question is: where is Marjorie Taylor Greene?**

As communities like my own experience childcare shortages, their local economies and workforces are crumbling. **This is exactly why we created the Rural Revival Plan.** A plan that will establish preschool programs and extend the Childcare Tax Credit so that families, women, and children in my district and all across the nation, can have the opportunity to flourish.

I’m running for this seat not just because of Marjorie’s atrocious behavior, but because I wish our representatives cared about the debilitating issues plaguing our communities. Marjorie Taylor Greene has voted **NO** on any and all plans that establish resources for families. Marjorie Taylor Greene’s ego is too big to put aside partisanship and think about her own constituents.

It is well past time that someone kicked her out of Congress. **[Chip in $14 today, and we can provide life changing policies for families across this country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40810453/326060106/-804235033?refcode=em0118c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzNjYWE0NC1hZjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0X6mvQ_jufKjDpRLwQFUPOJfg9Ooev4CDN7VYeFQ5j0=)** We’re going to win this, because we can’t afford not to.

Talk soon,
Holly McCormack.
|

name: John King
subject: I couldn’t stay silent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Friend,

When I see injustice around me, I call it out. That’s why I called out Governor Larry Hogan’s new dog-whistling crime policies.

He came after Baltimore and started pushing initiatives that direct half a BILLION dollars toward policies of mass incarceration that the evidence shows do not effectively improve public safety. That’s why last week I released a statement saying that Governor Hogan has had two terms to address violent crime, but chose to spend his time refusing to partner with local leaders, actively stripping vital resources away from communities, playing dog-whistle politics, and scapegoating Baltimore — a divisive approach that will not make us safer.

READ THE STATEMENT: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_rrf_em?source=email-ngp-20220118-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&refcode=email-ngp-20220118-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&utm_campaign=20220118&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&utm_term=JK_S1_C1

As governor, I would never play these political games or scapegoat communities for my own gain. Peter, Hogan’s actions make it clearer than ever that this November we cannot elect another Republican leader who is more focused on politics than the public good. That’s why I’m asking for your support today.

CONTRIBUTE: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_siri_em?source=email-ngp-20220118-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220118-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220118&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&refcode2=4c473bda-ae78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442]

As I said in my statement, I’ll do what the governor should have done — build on the policing reforms passed by the state legislature and reimagine public safety. I will work with the General Assembly to make the investments we need in proven violence prevention programs, addiction treatment, reentry support for citizens returning from incarceration, mental health services, summer jobs programs for teenagers, and apprenticeship programs for young adults. If you agree that we need change, I invite you to contribute to my campaign for governor today.

Thank you,

John King

name: Mike Gallagher
subject: I’m with Ron.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_support_mg_3&n=1)
---
Friend -- Ron Johnson just announced that he is seeking re-election to represent us in the U.S. Senate. This is great news. Ron believes our country's best solutions are not found or created in Washington, but in the places that matter most: our neighborhoods, businesses, schools, and churches. He knows that America's strength starts from the bottom-up and he's determined to make Washington realize that. Most important of all, Ron will make the case to voters that America is a place for good and one worth forever fighting for. That's the type of fighter Ron Johnson is and it is why I am proud to support him. [**HELP RON KICK-START HIS CAMPAIGN**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVBc3m2irbPb_ULq5yjDAjw8Sp9xuvSZC3xwB4kCoPAm8JZr8jF6cWbmDN1D_mER4I&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_support_mg_3&n=2) But that's not what you'll hear from the far-Left candidates and political pundits who have made it their mission to destroy him. Just look at his last two races. They dragged him through the mud, said there was no way he could win, and spent millions to defeat him. But here's the thing: Wisconsinites knew better and showed up for Ron. We need to do that again this year. In 2022, with so much at stake and with the Senate majority possibly hinging on Wisconsin, we need you to get involved early. I’m asking you to stand with Ron Johnson and help his campaign get off to a fast start. [**SHOW RON YOU'RE WITH HIM**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVBc3m2irbPb_ULq5yjDAjw8Sp9xuvSZC3xwB4kCoPAm8JZr8jF6cWbmDN1D_mER4I&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_support_mg_3&n=3) With your help, we will turn Wisconsin red and prove the pundits, media, and far-Left wrong again by electing Ron Johnson in November.
-Mike Gallagher
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_support_mg_3&n=4) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_support_mg_3&n=5) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_support_mg_3&n=6) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rj_support_mg_3&n=7)

name: Eddie Geller for Congress
subject: We’re extremely ticked off at Joe Manchin & Kyrsten Sinema, but the GOP is why we’re here in the first place
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40810501/326060309/-1761186797?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220118savingdemoc2_EG4C_op_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTkxNGRkMi1hZjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZvVPrjqUIziCU3yba8bbW81JOs_4bR3vownMCjIMnP8=)
---
Hey friends — yesterday was Martin Luther King Jr. Day, a day set aside for Americans everywhere to reflect on the legacy of one of the most important civil rights leaders in our nation’s history.
**Unfortunately, it’s also a day on which Republicans’ hypocrisy and cynicism were on full display, even more so than usual.**

subject: Government is failing us!

body:
We must defeat the radical left in ‘22!
Dear Friend,

Time and time again I hear from folks across the state “the government is failing me.” In 2022 we [MUST](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fjanuary-2022/1/0100017e6e521076-815dab28-06b6-48a7-9929-6f1680ed6054-000000/pNNKwUGNTp7B9aED8tEByUtfYDQ=253) elect Republicans up and down the ballot. We had huge accomplishments in 2020 but clearly was not enough to stop the radical left.

Strengthening our ranks in the legislature, keeping the Governor’s office and Executive Council red, flipping both congressional districts, and **FIRING** Maggie Hassan are our goals in 2022. [These goals are NOT SMALL AND WE CANNOT DO IT WITHOUT YOUR HELP.....](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fjanuary-2022/2/0100017e6e521076-815dab28-06b6-48a7-9929-6f1680ed6054-000000/TX5q4wLSbdYKXSKujrD996z7fBA=253)

name: Giffords.org
subject: Gabby’s story
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
January 8th was a dark day in history that turned into an opportunity for change and to save lives.
#

Recently, it was the 11th anniversary of the Tucson shooting, where a gunman opened fire on Gabby and 18 other innocent people. Six innocent lives were lost in the attack.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22?refcode=em220118-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1459_3935704_glh_0i&akid=1459%2E3935704%2Eglh_0i)
Gabby visited the new memorial in Tucson in honor of the lives lost and the strength of the survivors, including Gabby, to move forward and save lives.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22?refcode=em220118-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1459_3935704_glh_0i&akid=1459%2E3935704%2Eglh_0i)
At the memorial, a bell rang 19 times—once for each person shot that day.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22?refcode=em220118-1-15&t=3&refcode2=1459_3935704_glh_0i&akid=1459%2E3935704%2Eglh_0i)
After Gabby began her recovery, January 8th also became the day that Giffords PAC was founded. Gabby views January 8th as a way to remember why we move forward—working to make our community and our country better.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22?refcode=em220118-1-15&t=4&refcode2=1459_3935704_glh_0i&akid=1459%2E3935704%2Eglh_0i)
Gabby has shown all of us that with hard work, strength, and the power of community, we can all face and overcome challenges together.
Together, we have made strides of change to save lives. We still face an uphill battle. But just as Gabby is a model of strength and hope, we know that together we can emerge victorious.
[**Will you join Gabby and our team in this fight? If so, please make a $3 contribution today. Your donation will immediately be put to work in a campaign to pass universal background checks, elect a gun safety Congress, and hold the gun lobby accountable for encouraging and enabling violence in our communities.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22?refcode=em220118-1-15&t=5&refcode2=1459_3935704_glh_0i&akid=1459%2E3935704%2Eglh_0i)
Thank you for doing your part to save lives.
The team at Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22?refcode=em220118-1-15&t=6&refcode2=1459_3935704_glh_0i&akid=1459%2E3935704%2Eglh_0i)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1459%2E3935704%2Eglh_0i) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

At the memorial, a bell rang 19 times—once for each person shot that day. After Gabby began her recovery, January 8th also became the day that Giffords PAC was founded. Gabby views January 8th as a way to remember why we move forward—working to make our community and our country better. Gabby has shown all of us that with hard work, strength, and the power of community, we can all face and overcome challenges together. Together, we have made strides of change to save lives. Fellow patriot,

As a conservative, I know you’ll appreciate this. **History suggests that Republicans will take back the majority in the House in the 2022 midterm election** but we have one problem; the Left has never controlled the media quite like they do today.

To pull this off, we’ll need a team effort from conservatives everywhere, including you Fellow patriot. That’s why I need you to know about my fellow Texan, a conservative running for Congress, Monica De La Cruz. **[If there’s ever been a candidate that deserves your support in this election, it’s Monica](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ab48b4b1b21d401aabd0541060d62927&_e=Ip2GFS5IGSc9rybi6wrHDsAXsQD6d1x9XUxu7cu4JGC1RStonXrzfCwcdXpBsLEMN5lYWo5DQg3EB4Mz7TnMZd9W309mopRINY7GdxupsZ3vH2YmzxiiI7BHuhJK8Entbe6iHgfubptzQTlcrJ6QNWwTzFaqwJMDfHiFHZcZ-up9nnvLGvui-qVD2vPfudpUznjiBPwik7yWo8ucx_PWxg0gkj2Fh7qKyaUHykiwcS81khoejbnYMf0sC48Gt9ccJ02-Opa0ATXICqL1iUQL2dvfG4aeI6dCtaRI2A-9rKx2aYK-d1sZjhbIjBY0tI-HFn_Tj3OR1oyIB19Tn4LgHycB68j1O44Kmooa3GnMXUcuCypaqTSOM7L2Uq70K7f2ixpv0kCha5qWXQjuAlpSNlCWoDmCXDVjmh-9fIR6XlCqzRQrguP7cvhUf4Bud4IWi-GNr5mK4BUMt6Xb8yDnkx095p8QIwlfLgQJdY5Hu_whDbdWCPAgpVSaSZruGHrt)**.

In the 2020 election, Monica narrowly fell short of winning a congressional seat in South Texas, narrowly missing out on becoming the _first ever conservative Hispanic woman elected to Congress from her district_!

When I say she narrowly lost, I mean it.**Monica fell short by just 6,588 votes – out of more than 228,000 votes cast - and my team and I believe she has a very solid chance of winning this time around.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ab48b4b1b21d401aabd0541060d62927&_e=Ip2GFS5IGSc9rybi6wrHDsAXsQD6d1x9XUxu7cu4JGC1RStonXrzfCwcdXpBsLEMN5lYWo5DQg3EB4Mz7TnMZd9W309mopRINY7GdxupsZ3vH2YmzxiiI7BHuhJK8Entbe6iHgfubptzQTlcrJ6QNWwTzFaqwJMDfHiFHZcZ-up9nnvLGvui-qVD2vPfudpUznjiBPwik7yWo8ucx_PWxg0gkj2Fh7qKyaUHykiwcS81khoejbnYMf0sC48Gt9ccJ02-Opa0ATXICqL1iUQL2RGBour5skhAhne_jQR4wb8QONhP2DYYi4eM8nGOlJQE0zUNK_t2ab6jNMW9ux_J3uUKl2vk8fcp6k_tF53ptWQHvtpvej2UtWqJ1UCUgzHeoHca4ZRR5ZXlqdBEpDQCRbHPSf4ZuNqUOdgFQrukVxwZcNJd2KV3iB1XK55LO0HTDuORHO3ethBXup5nYpanxv2CmtqQ7lvMrMluYqSk12UQir8Kp4qTzqYjg3wGP_Ck)

**With the Democrats completely ignoring our border communities right now, Monica should be able to overcome the 6,000-vote deficit and if she does, she’ll play an instrumental role in the Republican Party re-establishing a House majority.**

Can you think of anyone better to be the Republican Party's spokesperson on border issues than a resident of a border community? I can't.

That's why w**e must do everything that we personally can** do to help Monica succeed in her congressional race.

But none of this can happen without **[YOUR HELP](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ab48b4b1b21d401aabd0541060d62927&_e=Ip2GFS5IGSc9rybi6wrHDsAXsQD6d1x9XUxu7cu4JGC1RStonXrzfCwcdXpBsLEMN5lYWo5DQg3EB4Mz7TnMZd9W309mopRINY7GdxupsZ3vH2YmzxiiI7BHuhJK8Entbe6iHgfubptzQTlcrJ6QNWwTzFaqwJMDfHiFHZcZ-up9nnvLGvui-qVD2vPfudpUznjiBPwik7yWo8ucx_PWxg0gkj2Fh7qKyaUHykiwcS81khoejbnYMf0sC48Gt9ccJ02-Opa0ATXICqL1iUQL2aW2Y8xy7Eq_sAIcatvp5FpC94djH8iKNXTHuiue3ACWNhla7u1VOZIOEwDafVYPXGUraY7uG5t-l3Oeq5NfBKbMVRmxGa5L9SN8oJ1UWzTykb7leapKoU0SjE_VaRkgy6KK2CIDGezsdNlP5T7ALwhWUZSi3s9wvvo8WsfFE48WUiDExAOuytKaoSKRmAmsKqUceGurWFc-EYGOLfqDxALcy4W59UYuLxQbzfBIAZ4h)**.

**[Can I count on you to support one of the strongest candidates I know? She has my full support, now I need my supporters to have her back too.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ab48b4b1b21d401aabd0541060d62927&_e=Ip2GFS5IGSc9rybi6wrHDsAXsQD6d1x9XUxu7cu4JGC1RStonXrzfCwcdXpBsLEMN5lYWo5DQg3EB4Mz7TnMZd9W309mopRINY7GdxupsZ3vH2YmzxiiI7BHuhJK8Entbe6iHgfubptzQTlcrJ6QNWwTzFaqwJMDfHiFHZcZ-up9nnvLGvui-qVD2vPfudpUznjiBPwik7yWo8ucx_PWxg0gkj2Fh7qKyaUHykiwcS81khoejbnYMf0sC48Gt9ccJ02-Opa0ATXICqL1iUQL2c3jIGMiERbuKWV7n8EyYcaYJ5NGOukjZVtIwwdkxJW2nYDlmjebNu_uTw1UulCo6holk95RXEK9qS36HjSpmfBL2c7bTmRFprCDXGxdeTEG7JHaWK7UoqvgArtbhbdV5gDODtLqVTis-FS3Hmo2loE0cQhcFDX1ANA0KU6MFFClshj7QnYy7czZdCAYvuW290a8xCyUh7vOEuVLeGIfI3WCGLFmzHKYiZguU_BNUOpK)**

| [**HELP ME GET MONICA TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ab48b4b1b21d401aabd0541060d62927&_e=Ip2GFS5IGSc9rybi6wrHDsAXsQD6d1x9XUxu7cu4JGC1RStonXrzfCwcdXpBsLEMN5lYWo5DQg3EB4Mz7TnMZd9W309mopRINY7GdxupsZ3vH2YmzxiiI7BHuhJK8Entbe6iHgfubptzQTlcrJ6QNWwTzFaqwJMDfHiFHZcZ-up9nnvLGvui-qVD2vPfudpUznjiBPwik7yWo8ucx_PWxg0gkj2Fh7qKyaUHykiwcS81khoejbnYMf0sC48Gt9ccJ02-Opa0ATXICqL1iUQL2V7WbmAOz5ValB9_ujKqhWEXWMMLqSTeE5EFajRqrMktGtRyV59DmiHuGnSflMKv9D-jCl4AI7__XfyyPhMqZ4h8Kgn2G8DelDLocAEtfSjcUfQ1U2MIgxj6QHiuC200TVQYyLdZGnayrwRborsqXEdZiUaq2ocs_NHUzZHEZKmM4fV1EXHOue7E5LqMcDSKNTNYxx3T6m6ILup-X9MY0X9oLB-P9Gg8N4Iu9S9G1DpU)
---

Like me, Monica is a strong proponent of equal opportunity but, equal outcomes on the other hand don’t come without hard work. She is truly one of the strongest and determined people that I know, and**I need her in Congress with me**.

Monica knows the value of hard work and sacrifice firsthand. Raised by her mother in a South Texas border town, she didn’t have it easy growing up, but she was determined to achieve the American Dream

Monica is someone who knows how to GET THINGS DONE and she would make an **excellent addition** to Congress.

History suggests that Republicans will take back the majority in the House in the 2022 midterm election but we have one problem; the Left has never controlled the media quite like they do today. To pull this off, we’ll need a team effort from conservatives everywhere, including you Fellow patriot. That’s why I need you to know about my fellow Texan, a conservative running for Congress, Monica De La Cruz. . In the 2020 election, Monica narrowly fell short of winning a congressional seat in South Texas, narrowly missing out on becoming the first ever conservative Hispanic woman elected to Congress from her district! When I say she narrowly lost, I mean it.Monica fell short by just 6,588 votes – out of more than 228,000 votes cast - and my team and I believe she has a very solid chance of winning this time around. With the Democrats completely ignoring our border communities right now, Monica should be able to overcome the 6,000-vote deficit and if she does, she’ll play an instrumental role in the Republican Party re-establishing a House majority. Can you think of anyone better to be the Republican Party's spokesperson on border issues than a resident of a border community? I can't. That's why we must do everything that we personally can do to help Monica succeed in her congressional race. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Defeat The Mandates March in DC on 1/23!
body:
| |
---
I’m excited to pass on the information below about the [Defeat The Mandates](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) march in Washington, D.C on January 23, 2022. If you can attend, especially those of you within driving distance, please attend! See the bottom of the email for a longer description of what this is and why they are holding it.

[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)

This march is being co-sponsored by many Covid-treating doctor organizations and an organization called World Wide Demonstration that is planning protests around the globe on 1/23/22.

More about World Wide Demonstration –

_World Wide Demonstration is a peaceful, apolitical, internationally-syndicated community demonstration dedicated to emboldening grassroots citizens to push back against Covid-related restrictions in their own local cities. January 23, 2022, marks the sixth World Wide Rally for Freedom._

Please visit their website for all of the details. They have details about security, hotels, where to eat, the march route, etc. They have hotel and restaurant recommendations for Arlington, VA as well as D.C., so that regardless of vaccination status, attendees can stay and eat, as D.C. now has a vaccine mandate.

**Note that this is to be a peaceful march and they expect all attendees to abide by this commitment to peaceful protest.**
[DEFEAT THE MANDATES](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
Also, [please visit our website](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._c4aCLi-w) where we have upcoming local medical freedom rallies and protests around the country to see if there is one happening near you soon!
**DESCRIPTION**

We are free.
And we will not surrender our freedoms out of fear.
We are Americans and we come from every walk of life.

We link arms, Vaccinated and Unvaccinated
Democrats, Republicans, and Independents
Mothers, Fathers and Grandparents
College Students, Teachers,
Nurses, Doctors, Small business owners
Artists, Tradesmen, and the Retired.

To stop the Covid vaccine mandates.
To say never again to the lockdowns!

We are free people.
No longer taking our freedoms for granted.

The mandated Covid vaccines haven’t worked.
Our civil liberties have not returned.

Mandates are a last resort.
They are not the American way.

This is a pivotal moment in our global history.
The time to act is now!

People around the world are rising up,
To protect freedoms that originated here in America.
It is high time we joined them.

We are brothers and sisters
Of every color, creed, and political stripe.

We are not against the vaccinated.
Many of us are the vaccinated.
We are against forcing vaccinations on Americans.

Enough is enough.
We’re coming home.
In peace we March!
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwMTgtMzI0NWM4N2U3NjRhNDEzZmFmZGJkZWJmMmEwYjIxMjEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8_bWlkPTQ0ODI5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/7f6gxJ17rgXxb0iUWbv6iQ)
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)

© 2022 [Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-GPBVlg)
80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003

| | | Dear Peter,

Come out to Millhurst Charhouse in Oakbrook Terrace on Thursday, February 17th, and support Conforti for Congress!

This election is critical to the future of our nation! Let's work together and take our country back!

I look forward to meeting you!!

Be sure to enter the event through the black awning on the south side of the office building.
[Click here](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=ca37ddf2d0&e=25f4fa3311) to get your tickets now.

---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District

name: Team Nikki
subject: Floridians deserve a voice
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,

Surprise, surprise.

One week into the legislative session, Ron DeSantis is once again trying to rob us of our voices, suppress our votes, and disenfranchise underrepresented Floridians.

Last year, he signed one of the most extreme voter suppression laws since Jim Crow. Now, he’s proposing a Congressional map that will dilute Hispanic and Black voting power and silence underrepresented voters.

We need to fight back, Peter. Click here to stand with Nikki in the fight for fair representation and make a donation today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jan-2022?refcode=desantismap]

For three years, DeSantis has made it crystal clear that he’s not working for Florida families and workers. And with this map, he’s doubling down, proving that he has no respect for the diverse voices that make our state the unique, vibrant place that it is.

All this map does is silence Black and Hispanic voices, shore up the GOP’s power, and solidify DeSantis’ authoritarian reign over our state. And we deserve better.

ALL Floridians deserve a voice and a Governor who will make our voices heard. And that’s exactly what Nikki will do. If you’re with us in the fight for fair representation, click here to chip in $10 and help us defeat Ron DeSantis. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jan-2022?refcode=desantismap]

Thank you for your support.

— Team Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor

Miami, FL 33143

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: What are you doing for freedom today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hello, When I was younger, my Dad used to look over the corner of his newspaper at the breakfast table and ask my siblings and me, “What are you doing for freedom today?” [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40811561/326064583/-1281091919?refcode=e20220118_mwh-personal&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzBiNjhjNy1iMjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e_36EFwgTICAuzMrm79OfLxOkrMLymV5T2iBHzjf9jI=) That’s a big question for three kids who are just trying to finish their cereal before the school bus arrives, but it’s one I think about to this day – and make a point to answer. As Senator, I strive to make our democracy more inclusive and more accessible each and every day – and Republicans are attacking me for it. I need you to have my back. **[Will you please donate $5 or whatever you can to my reelection campaign so that together, we can protect our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40811562/326064584/-1281091919?refcode=e20220118_mwh-personal&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzBiNjhjNy1iMjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e_36EFwgTICAuzMrm79OfLxOkrMLymV5T2iBHzjf9jI=)** I’m fighting to change the Senate rules to protect voting rights. I’m fighting to protect the freedom to make reproductive health care choices for generations to come. I’m fighting for our shared values, everyone, but I can’t do it alone. **And frankly, my last election was the closest in the country, so Republicans are doing everything they can to stop our fight by targeting my seat.** **[I need you to please chip in $5 or as much as you’re comfortable with to win in New Hampshire and continue our fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40811563/326064585/-1281091919?refcode=e20220118_mwh-personal&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzBiNjhjNy1iMjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e_36EFwgTICAuzMrm79OfLxOkrMLymV5T2iBHzjf9jI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40811564/326064586/-1281091919?refcode=e20220118_mwh-personal&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzBiNjhjNy1iMjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e_36EFwgTICAuzMrm79OfLxOkrMLymV5T2iBHzjf9jI=)

body:
I’m running for Congress because we need real, tested leadership representing our district.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7cujfiaqk8ipfdgjc7d4egkh1l64iku35hr59m8_rp22sh2s8i66ob2clgm6or4s1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbor3cj2chq68t1heho75c31chh32ob5mlp7attiedo62ttgskpj4d1k61im7d1gcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti69j33dplmdjr4sb6ehgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp2bs)
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb6c491q7eqmhca97nf367agsfe2b6a8i3u4vtu8_) Friend, I’m running for Congress because we need real, tested leadership representing our district. **_As a family business owner, I see what the left’s radical policies are doing to our citizens. And it isn’t good._** But if we take back just 10 House seats, we can STOP far-left policies, and in 2022, NJ-03 is a CRUCIAL battleground race. **[_With that being said, we’re running a bit behind on our January MID-MONTH fundraising push, and I really need your support. If we can get 246 New Jersey patriots to chip in $16.50 today, we will be back on track. Can I count on you?_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z30flbg1npi3fdidpc8co77rcerk7nb5cfab0p8g_)** [**Donate $16.50**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbdgi2gfjtor9rdre3tlv13vf1bhqpckefhe16jg_) [**Donate $25**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlatui33629n7gbhrs2f5qd65alh70scv9o80tqo_) [**Donate $50**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr1bvpvm4dv0fdffcqtcvbiuqbdau511jon3brmg_) Friend, we need level-headed family-oriented legislators in DC, and my opponent Andy Kim is nothing of the sort. **He even sides with self-proclaimed socialists.** **_Andy Kim has voted with Squad radicals like AOC over 90% of the time in Congress!_** He just doesn’t represent our values, and the records show it. We have to MAKE SURE we win this race in 2022 not just for New Jersey families and businesses, but for America. **_If we hit our mid-month fundraising goal by TONIGHT, we will be right on track._** **[_RUSH A DONATION >>>_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zugvuucf5c4tpslagb5f1bknqh7apktib8sinr88_)** Thanks, Bob Healey |

name: Team Booker
subject: Called out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Just this past week, Rand Paul once again used his position on the Senate
Health Committee to attack Dr. Fauci. But this time, he got called out for
exactly what we’ve all known for months: he is using the pandemic for his
own political gain.

He even brought screenshots of Rand’s website, which shows how the Senator
is trying to fundraise off of getting Dr. Fauci fired.

Take a look:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14610?refcode=em20220118-1462&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1462%2E346206%2ENqE478 ][IMG]

This committee hearing with Dr. Fauci was intended to be a meeting for
lawmakers, to figure out how to best support the American people during
this recent surge of the coronavirus.

But instead of making important headway in that conversation, Rand once
again chose to focus his time on levying irrelevant, personal attacks on
Dr. Fauci.

We’re all tired,
Peter — and we’re especially
tired of Rand Paul’s obsession with spreading COVID-19 misinformation, all
while voting against even the most basic aid for Kentuckians. We’re tired
of his political games for political gain.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14610?refcode=em20220118-1462&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1462%2E346206%2ENqE478 ]Please take a moment to watch and share this video. And after you’re
done watching, will you please chip in $5 or whatever you
can so we can end Rand Paul’s failed leadership in the Senate once and for
all this year? Kentuckians deserve better than this, plain and simple.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14610?refcode=em20220118-1462&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1462%2E346206%2ENqE478 ]Contribute $5

— Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220118-1462-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1462_346206_NqE478&akid=1462%2E346206%2ENqE478

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1462%2E346206%2ENqE478

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

body:
Sending Mandela Barnes to Washington isn’t just the smart choice, it’s the only choice. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40812158/326066942/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ2X_TAN_E_20220118_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjUxN2M5YS1iNjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IKEO8J1uHdhBWLjNpfcmyCCPipwNi5NAp-aATG0sLC8=&emci=79442294-b678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=c2517c9a-b678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9027908)
---
Far-right Republican Senator Ron Johnson announced that he’s running for re-election, going back on his word that he wouldn’t be seeking another term in office. Now, I’m not all that surprised by Ron Johnson’s dishonesty — he’s proven to be one of the leading spreaders of misinformation in the Trump era, on everything from election integrity to the coronavirus pandemic. What did catch my eye, however, was his rationale for wanting to remain in office. According to Johnson, Democratic governance is why he’s chosen to go back on his word, because of “the disastrous policies [the Democrats] have already inflicted on America and the world.” The way I see it, we need even more progressive policies and more progressive Democrats in the Senate who are willing to fight for them. And replacing far-right Republicans like Ron Johnson with progressives like my friend Mandela Barnes is a good place to start. [_**The Wisconsin Senate race is a prime opportunity not only to maintain our Senate majority, but to expand it even further. Will you help flip this seat for Democrats and elect Mandela Barnes this fall? If you’re able to, please split $3 or more between Mandela Barnes and Warren Democrats right away.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40812159/326066943/2011303260?refcode=EMZ2X_TAN_E_20220118_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjUxN2M5YS1iNjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IKEO8J1uHdhBWLjNpfcmyCCPipwNi5NAp-aATG0sLC8=&emci=79442294-b678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=c2517c9a-b678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9027908) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

I could go on and on and on and on about Ron Johnson’s history of falsehoods and lies. His brand of politics continues to threaten the very fabric of our democracy. Who knows how much more damage he can cause given another six years?
I know the heart of Mandela Barnes, and that’s why I’ve been especially excited to support his campaign to unseat Ron Johnson and become Wisconsin’s next Senator. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: If I defeat Sen. Grassley, I will serve for two terms in the Senate. You have my word.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40812247/326067256/327283057?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jkt609-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjRhYjMzYi1iNzc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zIQdg_YKndP_KCgLntPzUl9KWOh-4aS85Q1ySO3QuQY=&emci=435322d1-aa78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=624ab33b-b778-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=13784334)
Peter, throughout his time in Washington, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) has told Iowans time and again that he supports term limits for members of Congress. But it's been 47 years, nearly a half century, since Iowa first sent him there. After first serving three terms in the House, he moved on to the Senate where he is now running for an _eighth _consecutive term.
Forty-seven years is too damn long – no matter who you are. **That's why you have my word on this: If I'm elected as Iowa's next senator, I will term-limit myself and serve no more than two terms. Period.**

I mean what I say. I'll get the job done, and quite frankly, I don't need – nor do I want! – 47 years in Washington to do it. In fact, there's no better example of why we need term limits than Sen. Grassley himself. After all his years in Congress, Sen. Grassley has left Iowa's working families behind. He's allowed protections for workers and unions to go on the chopping block. He's stood in lockstep with his party as they launched a coordinated attack on voting rights.
Making life better for those in your community isn't about the number of years you can rack up – or in Sen. Grassley's case, the fancy house you can buy in Washington, D.C. It's about seeing work to be done and _doing_ it. It's about dedication and willpower. It's about service.
**If you're with me, if you believe it's time for Sen. Grassley to fix what's broken in Washington, then I need a massive display of grassroots action right now. Will you please make your voice heard by responding to my live poll?**
**Do you support term limits for members of Congress?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40812248/326067257/327283057?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jkt609-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjRhYjMzYi1iNzc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zIQdg_YKndP_KCgLntPzUl9KWOh-4aS85Q1ySO3QuQY=&emci=435322d1-aa78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=624ab33b-b778-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=13784334)

name: Bill de Blasio
subject: A decision about running for Governor
body:
[ https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/79?t=1001&akid=138%2E39519%2ElaECdr ][IMG]

Friends -

In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign committee. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.

First and foremost, let me answer the question I get a lot of these days: Am I going to run for Governor of New York?

The honest answer is, I am thinking about it. Very seriously.

I am thinking about it because I believe we can revolutionize public education in this state. We can guarantee 3-K and Pre-K, after-school programs and summer enrichment for every child who wants it in this state — just like we did in New York City.

I am thinking about it because I believe we can more effectively take on the fossil fuel industry that prioritizes their profits ahead of the very habitability of this planet for future generations — just like we have in New York City.

And I am thinking about it because I believe if we are going to do anything to move New York State forward, the wealthy simply must pay their fair share — which many in Albany refuse to even consider.

In the coming weeks, I want to talk about these issues and more. But I cannot do that, and I certainly cannot run, without your support. So I am asking:

Can you please make a contribution — of any amount you can afford — to my campaign committee today? If you believe we can and must act with urgency to end the Tale of Two States, please chip in what you can.

https://act.billdeblasio.com/go/123?t=1002&akid=138%2E39519%2ElaECdr

Thank you. Your support means the world to me.

Bill de Blasio

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.billdeblasio.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=138%2E39519%2ElaECdr

name: Team Lira
subject: Let’s break it down
body:
Peter, this election is going to be extremely critical for a couple reasons. Let us break it down for you:
**First, this is a race that could help in the mission to turn Texas blue.** Current Representative Tony Gonzales is a perfect example of Republican leadership that is outdated and unresponsive to the change that Texans want to see. Together, we can elect a leader like John who is ready to listen and prioritize the people — and no one else.
**Second, this is a race that could help determine our U.S. House Majority.** Political experts and pundits have been warning us that we could lose our slim majority in the House — and we are taking that seriously. What happens in TX-23 leads to winning the seat that keeps us in power in Washington to advance legislation John is ready to support
**And finally, this is a race that could help redefine the future for TX-23.** John Lira is not only the candidate that can go up against Tony Gonzales in November and _win_ — but has the ideas and determination to progress on issues like small business support, voter protection rights, long-term immigration reform with a pathway to citizenship, access to quality, affordable health care, and more.
[_**As you can see, there is so much riding on the outcome of this race but we know, with your support, we can carry this campaign over the victory line. Can you make a donation now to power our on the ground efforts ahead of the March 1 primary? We only have a few weeks to reach out to as many Texans as possible.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40812656/326069213/1614789554?refcode=em20220118&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmVmZjY4OC1iYTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PmckNsYYAGAu5D2ZBhdfo5fzaRK9CK7rqnJ7cYSW-Pg=)
**[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40812657/326069215/1614789554?refcode=em20220118&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmVmZjY4OC1iYTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PmckNsYYAGAu5D2ZBhdfo5fzaRK9CK7rqnJ7cYSW-Pg=)**
TX-23 is one of the biggest districts in terms of land and a majority rural, causing it to be pushed aside for years. But we know just how important this district, and the people who make it what it is, has been.
And with this race, people are finally starting to see the value of TX-23 and together, we can use that power to secure another Democratic seat for Texas and for the rest of the country.
**It’s time to unite as TX-23 to win back our district, our state and our country.[Make a donation right now to help power our grassroots efforts in one of the most critical races in the state and in the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40812658/326069216/1614789554?refcode=em20220118&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmVmZjY4OC1iYTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PmckNsYYAGAu5D2ZBhdfo5fzaRK9CK7rqnJ7cYSW-Pg=)**
Let’s get to work,
Team Lira

But we know just how important this district, and the people who make it what it is, has been. And with this race, people are finally starting to see the value of TX-23 and together, we can use that power to secure another Democratic seat for Texas and for the rest of the country. It’s time to unite as TX-23 to win back our district, our state and our country.= Let’s get to work, Team Lira = | ---|--- John Lira for Congress 1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120 #8096 San Antonio, TX 78220 United States John Lira is a retired member of the US Marines. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Marines or the Department of Defense. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with our supporters. But, if you'd you need to remove yourself from our email list, you can unsubscribe here:

subject: MLK's Wife Coretta Scott King: Illegal Immigration Undercuts 'American Jobs and Living Standards'
body:
