subject: With Republicans like this, who needs Democrats?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
My opponent thinks Trump supporters are terrorists. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066081?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=eacb072082&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

On January 6, peaceful Trump supporters gathered to hear the President speak. Some of these Trump supporters eventually made their way to the Capitol, where they protested the brazen **_THEFT_** of the 2020 “election,” the greatest fraud ever perpetrated against our nation.

At the Capitol, undercover FBI agents and informants incited a riot. Capitol Police officers let Trump supporters into the building and then acted as if they had broken in.

For the crime of being a Trump supporter and protesting the illegal Democrat _**COUP**_ , Air Force veteran Ashli Babbitt— _an unarmed woman_ —was assassinated in cold blood. Her killer is celebrated as a hero by Democrats and RINOs alike.

Ashli wasn’t the only Trump supporter murdered that day—video has emerged of the Capitol Police killing another woman, Roseanne Boyland, apparently _beating her to death_. The Capitol Police is also responsible for the brutal deaths of other Trump supporters that day, like Kevin Greeson.

Before January 6th, my worthless traitor opponent, Deep State Steve Womack, announced that he would certify the fraudulent “election” results, falsely claiming that President Trump’s election fraud lawsuits had been “soundly defeated.” Swamp Scum Steve declared that we have to “accept the results.”

After the Fed-incited riot at the Capitol, Deep State Steve fully blamed President Trump for the chaos, calling it a “deadly attack.” He accused the President of making a “locker room speech” to get his supporters “stoked up” to storm the Capitol.

Womack belittled Trump supporters—his own constituents—as “extremists,” and referred to claims of election fraud as “a whole lot of promises and expectations that just simply were not true,” ignoring the overwhelming evidence that the 2020 election was stolen.

**Deep State Steve called President Trump “somebody who basically doesn’t have regard for the Constitution, or the rule of law, where it comes to protecting [his] grip on power.”**

Womack went on the local news and bloviated that “this is not who we are,” _sounding more like Michelle Obama than a conservative Arkansan._

He wouldn’t stop smearing the Trump supporters protesting the 2020 Coup, calling them “just as un-American and unpatriotic as anything I've ever seen.”

**Who does Steve represent? It certainly isn’t us.**

He called my good friend Richard “Bigo” Barnett, one of his very own constituents, whom you know as the legend who kicked back at Pelosi’s ill-gotten desk, a “sickening embarrassment,” adding that he “must be held accountable and face the fullest extent of the law.”

Where was Womack as the blood drained from Ashli Babbitt and Roseanne Boyland’s bodies? He was rewarding the demonic Capitol Police with more funding, calling these cold-blooded killers “brave.”

Where was Womack as Trump supporters from grandmothers to disabled veterans were rounded up and tossed into the DC Gulag, where they are _still _being held in solitary confinement and _tortured_?

Take Ryan Samsel, for instance.

_Sadistic_ prison guards came into Ryan’s cell one night, zip-tied his hands behind his back so tightly that they _took the skin off_ of his wrists, _threw _him to the concrete floor and _beat his face_ _in_. His right eye was damaged so severely that it’s _permanently blinded_. His nose and jaw were broken, and he will suffer seizures for the rest of his life.

Remember: Antifa and BLM looted, burned, raped, and murdered across _dozens_ of cities last summer, and _not a single person was ever punished_.

Now, rather than fight for the January 6th Patriots’ civil rights, Deep State Steve voted with _Nancy Pelosi_ to create a 9/11-style commission to serve the Democrats’ _witch hunt_ and perpetuate their “insurrection” _hoax_ , _legitimizing _the treatment of Trump supporters as terrorists.

**RINOs like him will happily toss us in gulags and throw away the keys. It’s _us_ against _them_ , and he’s with _them_.**

Steve Womack called January 6th a “national embarrassment.”

**The only national embarrassment I see is the treason of a so-called Republican Congressman aiding and abetting a criminal coup, facilitating the Democrats’ theft of the United States Government.

The only national embarrassment I see is the pure evil of a so-called Republican Congressman willfully turning a blind eye to the torture and murder of innocent Trump supporters in our nation’s capital.**

_**Deep State Steve is the real national embarrassment. He is a disgrace to the Constitution, to America, and to Arkansas.**_

**[_Punish him by __electing_ _ me.

Send this vile traitor packing and elect a real Fighter who will NEVER turn his back on you_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=a6187614d2&e=eda539b26b)****.**

[**_Help me send Deep __State_ _ Steve a message that his time is UP -- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=4c3b1879af&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**STOP** the politicized Regime DOJ from persecuting and ruining the lives of conservative Americans, not Wishy-Washy Wimps like Womack._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1c1ef5240c&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=494fa3e707&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---
| |
---

name: Andrew Regalado, Country First
subject: Join Your State Chapter of Country First!
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mega_ne_invite&n=1)
---
Friend -- The time has come -- you are officially invited to attend your very first **State Chapter meeting** next Tuesday, January 25th at 7:30pm Eastern. The meeting will be hosted virtually over Zoom. Country First is establishing chapters throughout the country to connect our members regionally, and provide leadership opportunities to volunteer organizers through their state committees. Here’s what we will be doing together at the first state meeting:
* Getting to know one another to further build this empowering community
* Sharing ideas about what kinds of programs you want to see in your state
* Learning about how to join your State Organizing Committee

| [](https://www.country1st.com/launch_northeast?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mega_ne_invite&n=2 "RSVP Now!") [RSVP Now!](https://www.country1st.com/launch_northeast?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mega_ne_invite&n=2)
---
Do not miss this great opportunity to start getting to know others good people and to join in on the conversation. If you have any questions, please feel free to respond directly and a member of the Volunteer Team will get back to you.
We look forward to seeing you next Tuesday!
All things Country First,

Andrew Regalado
Grassroots Director
Country First · PO Box 2385, Ottawa, IL 61350, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.country1st.com/unsubscribe?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mega_ne_invite&n=3).

name: Team Hern
subject: Biden’s failure on energy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Skyrocketing energy costs in America are a direct result of Biden’s failed policies. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/b9e84d3ef5ae34cf/42c790b90cfaccd7c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, Joe Biden’s presidency has been a disaster for American energy. Before he took office, we were on track for energy independence, and fuel prices were low. How did we go from that to Biden recently begging OPEC to increase oil exports? It’s a direct result of Joe Biden’s failed energy policies. He’s basically declared war on American energy production by shutting down pipelines and not allowing new leases for natural gas and oil exploration on federal lands. **We need to reverse course immediately and implement energy policies that benefit all Americans.**** ** Energy is the lifeblood of our economy. It takes fuel to keep our nation’s farms and ranches going, fuel to truck food from our producers to our stores, fuel to keep the stores open ... in 2022, there is very little we do that doesn’t involve fuel in some way. Who is really paying for Biden’s failed energy policies? It is ordinary, everyday Americans who are paying more to gas their cars, more for food, more for housing, more for everything. I am committed to opposing any and all policies that don’t get us closer to American energy independence once again, but I can’t do it without you. Please chip in what you can right now if you are sick of paying out the nose for energy in America.
---

name: Amanda Makki
subject: This Weekend On Newsmax TV!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Makki For Congress
body:
I talked about Joe Biden's way less than a stellar week. | [](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=4825a0eb0304470ca648d4c330a420ac&_e=ywalPa8PapkiQZf2Y5V3_SySj1XmXRSX3F2jFMRcOEw6FGJ03aaHo9J98RVShF6wxtbbo7AV7YhzCRam255OMH56A0Z5BEQj1GWDmzjgpg37MVrptT0nVzZr-h5mLm8k01ZmS3EKmJJ5JoDCbqttBZc64TVHG_GFvzRwzv_myHSIPc2H7f7qVWRQAYKNharxhkCZHBm7618drQguZSFkfaljKuDg8UXwlAyLESQchp3TI1TffObWBojXHI8b-AAD-0xt1o7fCSPzzWZBstdqqtkxAKVh9ta7cWVRc7ZCH-jr5XBXthkAXO_ACnpgkrSE7DHMijTsLKgs_BIkHxs-VMEpPr1u3JKeidgXhFwS-vdaLs1ECdPEF3u952uLpRAsu2sjHjBH78QfbGYaZBr6eC16lG-AMXbx952U4DvIkpBmiaJ_8yAFvOH4Q1oZ2ctM)
---
Peter -

Over the weekend, I was a panelist on Newsmax TV's **_Wake Up America!_** I talked about Joe Biden's _(way)_ less than a stellar week.

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/39114d78ef49/join-me-saturday-in-provo-6670569?e=10c1db3257)

| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=8d4dc05670&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Friends, **Today marks the beginning of the Utah Legislature’s 45-day annual legislative session** , and I want to wish all my former colleagues in the legislature well as they begin the essential work of writing and passing legislation for our state. From 2009 to 2018, I represented District 20 in the Utah State House. I am so grateful for the relationships I formed with my colleagues and constituents, and for the legislation I was able to pass to better the lives of all Utahns.

**Now I'm ready to take the skills I developed in the Utah State House to the United States Senate.** Having served in the Utah State Legislature makes me uniquely qualified to represent Utah on the national level. I know how to build coalitions, solve problems, and lead with productive, proactive, and inclusive solutions. **Will you donate $45, $145, or $245 to help me take my expertise to Washington DC?**
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=39b51395fa&e=10c1db3257 "DONATE NOW")
---
| I look forward to building on the lessons I learned and the relationships I formed in the Utah Legislature as your next senator.

Thank you for your support!

Peter,

One year ago today—in between the insurrection and the inauguration—I launched BACKROADS PAC. It was a fitting time, as both moments underscored just how important Democratic control of Congress is for our democracy and the progress we’ve been fighting for.

BACKROADS PAC’s mission is to support rural Democrats around the country as they take on Republican incumbents. As a former candidate, I know first-hand how Democrats in rural areas have been left behind for decades, lacking infrastructure, organization, and resources. [_**That’s what we are working to change.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40813453/326081473/1955960298?refcode=BLU-BRP-20220118-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWQwNjllZS1iZTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2I9Qf2BMiUnNEa1FJQW5B1Tcefvm2t2pOVm-ALzmF10=)

Thanks to your support over the past year, we have made exciting inroads towards our mission:
* We raised over $360,000 from 8,640 contributions
* We endorsed and raised money for three Democratic frontline incumbents and four challengers
* We invested in nationwide research and polling in key swing districts in states like Arizona, Georgia, North Carolina, Pennsylvania and Wisconsin

We now have just 41 weeks between now and Election Day to ramp up our efforts and make sure Democrats have the resources to protect and expand our House majority. The GOP has a real shot of taking back the House in November, and if you’ve been reading my emails, you already know how dangerous that would be. = | = I’m so grateful to travel this road with you, Tedra * | | = Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. BACKROADS PAC PO Box 713 Canton, NY 13617 United States | = = BACKROADS PAC is an organization dedicated to giving rural Democrats the resources to run for office and defeat Republicans everywhere. name: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
NEWS: Greg Abbott and Beto O’Rourke fundraising numbers just released. We’ve got good news and bad news.
#
Hey, it’s Nick again.
I wanted to check in real quick because Greg Abbott just released his end-of-year fundraising numbers from the last Texas Ethics Commission (TEC) deadline. It’s a bit of a good news, bad news situation.
Candidate | Raised through 12/31 | Time frame
---|---|---
Beto O'Rourke | $7.2 million | 46 days
Greg Abbott | $18.9 million | 6 months
1) **Good news:** We’re raising money faster than Abbott. If we can accelerate the pace, we can close the gap and have a much better shot at victory.
2) **Bad news:** Greg Abbott has been in this race a much longer time. With this new money added, he now has over $65 million on hand to spend.
On Thursday we have our next TEC deadline (yes, already!). Everything we raise through Jan. 20th will be made public.
**Let me be blunt. People want to know if Beto can win.** We need to show we can fundraise a lot faster than Abbott to give people the confidence. Let’s show we can pick up the pace right now.
**[Make a $3 contribution to Beto today. With less than 72 hours to the TEC deadline, we need a big surge these next couple of days to show we can out-raise Greg Abbott day-by-day and close the gap between us and him.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51730?refcode=ema20220118-172193&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=172193%2E444211%2Em4B_dE)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51730?refcode=ema20220118-172193&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=172193%2E444211%2Em4B_dE)**
I don’t expect us to match Greg Abbott’s total campaign spending by November. He obviously started fundraising much earlier than Beto.
And yes, I know we have some advantages.
First off, we didn’t screw up the power grid.
We didn’t botch the COVID response.
And we didn’t pass a brazen and unconstitutional attack on the right to abortion.
We have a winning message. Plus, we’re launching the biggest organizing program Texas has ever seen — outdoing even what we built in 2018 when Beto came just a couple points shy of winning statewide.
**But if we’re going to win, we can’t suffer a blowout on the money side.** We’re going to have to close the gap a good chunk to prevent Greg Abbott from drowning us out on TV, digital, and radio ads heading into the election.
Our only chance to close the gap is through strong grassroots fundraising. That’s why I’m emailing you today. **[Please add a $3 contribution before our Thursday TEC deadline to help us close the gap between us and Abbott.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51730?refcode=ema20220118-172193&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=172193%2E444211%2Em4B_dE)**
Thanks for everything you do,
Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220118-172193-footer&t=22&refcode2=172193_444211_m4B_dE&akid=172193%2E444211%2Em4B_dE)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=172193%2E444211%2Em4B_dE)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=172193%2E444211%2Em4B_dE)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

Peter,

In 2021, Kim and her Democratic colleagues in the House delivered real progress for families across the country. They passed legislation to invest in our infrastructure, provide COVID-19 relief, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and so much more.

But as we begin the new year, we have a lot of work ahead of us. Kim remains focused on finding solutions to the issues that matter most to you in Congress. **To best represent your interests, Kim wants to hear directly from you.**

**[Will you take our short priorities survey now and share with Kim the issues that matter most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40813773/326091590/-1013040117?ms=em22_220118_survrs_esrv_gq_nopn___ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220118_survrs_esrv_gq_nopn___ts_ettx&source=em22_220118_survrs_esrv_gq_nopn___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220118_survrs_esrv_gq_nopn___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=%2FZNMxHyT4OMCx%2Bqx8l%2B%2Fhx00E2nza87WmZVOayW4ppHdHGk5IpCu%2BGZKp3wVE5EOnRjIv%2BPhGsCWwCVOmR48Y%2BONJMEsT9e4e6T550wyoHNu8RmHNncnr%2FHsx8fMGaW25qr2Alz5ruy010l0nQ5LJ9PeVFhVcHhiSnlAex0MCR8%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODI3OGIxYi1jMzc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rRtkZHbTcxFjAfM3JXqVWZrib3F5ldFjtuCcj4WwDdI=&emci=2c258354-9378-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=e8278b1b-c378-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15820338) ** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40813775/326091591/-1013040117?ms=em22_220118_survrs_esrv_gq_nopn___ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220118_survrs_esrv_gq_nopn___ts_ettx&source=em22_220118_survrs_esrv_gq_nopn___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220118_survrs_esrv_gq_nopn___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=%2FZNMxHyT4OMCx%2Bqx8l%2B%2Fhx00E2nza87WmZVOayW4ppHdHGk5IpCu%2BGZKp3wVE5EOnRjIv%2BPhGsCWwCVOmR48Y%2BONJMEsT9e4e6T550wyoHNu8RmHNncnr%2FHsx8fMGaW25qr2Alz5ruy010l0nQ5LJ9PeVFhVcHhiSnlAex0MCR8%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODI3OGIxYi1jMzc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rRtkZHbTcxFjAfM3JXqVWZrib3F5ldFjtuCcj4WwDdI=&emci=2c258354-9378-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=e8278b1b-c378-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15820338)

Kim knows how important it is to listen to the people she's been elected to serve, and she wants everyone to have the chance to make their voices heard. That's why last year, Kim held 16 town halls and drove over 5,400 miles visiting businesses, farms, first responders, veterans, and vaccine clinics across our district.

We'll be sharing your feedback with her in just a few days, so don't miss your chance to let Kim know what's on your mind.

**[Take our 2022 Priorities Survey now, and let Kim know what issues you would like to see her address in Congress this year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40813776/326091594/-1013040117?ms=em22_220118_survrs_esrv_gq_nopn___ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220118_survrs_esrv_gq_nopn___ts_ettx&source=em22_220118_survrs_esrv_gq_nopn___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220118_survrs_esrv_gq_nopn___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=%2FZNMxHyT4OMCx%2Bqx8l%2B%2Fhx00E2nza87WmZVOayW4ppHdHGk5IpCu%2BGZKp3wVE5EOnRjIv%2BPhGsCWwCVOmR48Y%2BONJMEsT9e4e6T550wyoHNu8RmHNncnr%2FHsx8fMGaW25qr2Alz5ruy010l0nQ5LJ9PeVFhVcHhiSnlAex0MCR8%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODI3OGIxYi1jMzc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rRtkZHbTcxFjAfM3JXqVWZrib3F5ldFjtuCcj4WwDdI=&emci=2c258354-9378-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=e8278b1b-c378-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15820338)**

clean_body: In 2021, Kim and her Democratic colleagues in the House delivered real progress for families across the country. They passed legislation to invest in our infrastructure, provide COVID-19 relief, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and so much more. Peter, In 2021, Kim and her Democratic colleagues in the House delivered real progress for families across the country. They passed legislation to invest in our infrastructure, provide COVID-19 relief, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and so much more. But as we begin the new year, we have a lot of work ahead of us. Kim remains focused on finding solutions to the issues that matter most to you in Congress. To best represent your interests, Kim wants to hear directly from you. | Kim knows how important it is to listen to the people she's been elected to serve, and she wants everyone to have the chance to make their voices heard. That's why last year, Kim held 16 town halls and drove over 5,400 miles visiting businesses, farms, first responders, veterans, and vaccine clinics across our district. We'll be sharing your feedback with her in just a few days, so don't miss your chance to let Kim know what's on your mind. Thanks, Team Schrier To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier in WA-08. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a62ed81fe8a3/lets-send-a-pro-trump-conservative-leader-to-congress?e=061a1ea0d5)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,

I'm Timothy Barr - Republican candidate for Congress in Georgia's 10th District.

I'm a Christian, husband, father, small business owner
I'm the only candidate in this race endorsed by Congressman Jody Hice AND Congressman Andrew Clyde
I DON'T co-parent with the Government and my children won't learn CRT
My family and business will NOT follow ANY vaccine mandate
I am a member of the Georgia House Freedom Caucus
In the State House, I co-sponsored Constitutional Carry, the Heartbeat Bill, and the FairTax
I LOVE Freedom and the First Amendment
I am pro-Trump and my signs say "Trump Won Georgia"
I believe we need a 159 county audit of the 2020 election
SB202 (Georgia's Election Integrity Bill) is not in ANY way racist, and I was proud to vote for it
Our campaign has the support of 5 U.S. House Freedom Caucus members
I believe President Biden should be impeached
---
|
---
| Our values are under attack by the radical Left more and more every day. We MUST elect a staunch defender of freedom to represent GA-10 and safeguard the future of our great country.

[Will you help us send a pro-Trump, conservative leader to Congress?](https://VoteBarr.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0aae7015df298a880b9f30703&id=fe88f72e75&e=061a1ea0d5)

Together, we can "Stand for America and Fight for Liberty."

For Freedom,

name: Tim Ryan
subject: I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We do things a little differently around here.
#
Peter,
A lot of politicians run for office for money, power, or fame. **That’s not me.**
I was raised by a single mother who worked twice as hard to make sure we had dinner on the table every night. I grew up outside Youngstown, Ohio where I watched steel mills close and jobs ship overseas that devastated my family members, friends, and neighbors.
I first ran for office because I didn’t see many people in power sticking up for families like mine. All they ever cared about was pleasing wealthy donors and shady special interests who wrote them campaign checks.
**That’s why we do things a little differently around here. We rely on grassroots supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $25 at a time to fuel this campaign. But right now, we’re falling behind our fundraising goal.**
**[Can you make a contribution today to help our campaign and Senator Murray’s reach our fundraising goals? I wouldn’t ask if it didn't make a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40814176/326097405/-872279638?refcode=pm_em_220118_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDA0MjgzNi1jNTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hHM-9jrahBCOaQ5W72yD20nRBdjeIYegjJAw6XcQpnA=)**
Thank you so much for your support. I hope you know how grateful I am to have this team by my side.
\-- Tim
** **
** **
** **

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40814177/326097406/-872279638?refcode=pm_em_220118_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDA0MjgzNi1jNTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hHM-9jrahBCOaQ5W72yD20nRBdjeIYegjJAw6XcQpnA=)****

clean_body: We do things a little differently around here. Peter, A lot of politicians run for office for money, power, or fame. That’s not me. I was raised by a single mother who worked twice as hard to make sure we had dinner on the table every night. I grew up outside Youngstown, Ohio where I watched steel mills close and jobs ship overseas that devastated my family members, friends, and neighbors. I first ran for office because I didn’t see many people in power sticking up for families like mine. All they ever cared about was pleasing wealthy donors and shady special interests who wrote them campaign checks. That’s why we do things a little differently around here. We rely on grassroots supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $25 at a time to fuel this campaign. But right now, we’re falling behind our fundraising goal. = Thank you so much for your support. I hope you know how grateful I am to have this team by my side. \-- Tim **= As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

clean_body: | | | The AZ GOP = Trump | | | Team, we knew when Donald Trump announced his first rally of 2022 in Arizona, the lies and nonsense would be off the charts. But the headlines coming off Trump’s visit cut through all of it and show the real reason for Trump’s visit: to make sure the AZ GOP continues to promote Trump’s lies no matter how much it hurts our democracy. | ?linkid=2&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-if-we-dont-hit-this-goal-az-looks-like-trump-territory&emailreferrer=email1413399_subject1862369&emailsubject=the-headlines-tell-the-truth-about-trumps-rally | ?linkid=4&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-if-we-dont-hit-this-goal-az-looks-like-trump-territory&emailreferrer=email1413399_subject1862369&emailsubject=the-headlines-tell-the-truth-about-trumps-rally It’s clear what happened this weekend wasn’t a rally. name: Mike Johnson
subject: What a difference a year makes!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
The dramatic contrast between Republican snd Democrat leadership has never been so clear. | [ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3ca277852d524b089c2a61beda900ee6&_e=wUyh49CdraPCh_44uU0Zv-8U6BaVWIpn6lQgNcOyWARn3Fpqo8yk3FHgixGIXQ1UQbbNv6Oxy8OObQIxWJfdeuK5Q3fpQxb1_1zW6-WUzFAHQQ_Ze1SJ22qp4bMHImK4JELzSX_f5cjXQx-8gQWSDyb0sw3YBFe-0BH53WZr-b06PgcV3HCM4s3xMApQlsDHnsUP-RjTCsHygKAUjVEw50ruCCSWHanO1mPm-ps5K0z9e_O_eo0UdGerECNBwO41tT__JKIJbp0AF5ZCPINhdwQkzaJfIaTrJQJO4YJikenSM-cJGS42Vw-qlpFssJK5jmeaeqRLtxihnK4pynUvY2dJySnGC2zcEQcL6-zWAuKP-T1oYQuB5HkMSp_IWu4u)
---
Think back to a year ago, Fellow American.
* Our southern border was secure
* Groceries were on the shelves
* Gas didn’t cost an arm and a leg
* Vaccine mandates were a liberal fantasy
* Inflation wasn’t an issue
* Americans weren’t trapped in Afghanistan
* Ships at our ports weren’t delayed for months

In short... life was better under Republican leadership and before Joe Biden came into office. And yet, Democrats continue to campaign as the party that "cares."

Fellow American, our nation will not survive under the radical Left’s control: they want to turn this country into a socialist playground, where they control all the power. I refuse to give up on freedom. We have a chance, Fellow American, a chance to save this country and to put America first once again.

Our campaign has been focused on educating Texas voters about the new redistricting maps, how our state has been further gerrymandered, and taking Donna’s solutions message to voters' doors. **The truth is we’re very behind on fundraising and we need your help so we can finish what we started — reaching out to voters where they are. ** That means putting more organizers and canvassers on the ground, and equipping our field team with important voter information so they can get the message to voters. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Did you see the huge Arizona Trump rally?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Proud to stand with 45 |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f68c465c0d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I am proud, honored, and humbled to have been a part of President Trump’s FIRST 2022 rally in Arizona, and to have been a keynote speaker!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b037c2c5ef&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| And what a success!

**I took the stage along with many fellow patriots and leaders in the election integrity movement, including Kari Lake, Senator Sonny Borrelli, Senator Wendy Rogers, Mike Lindell, and, of course, President Trump.**

The crowd was massive. It proved that Arizona is a **_Trump State._** A **_Conservative State_**. A **_State that loves America!_**

We set up ourselves for success in 2022, and success in 2024! All I need is your support to win Secretary of State and to save our elections!

If you missed the rally, check out this transcript from an excerpt of my speech on Saturday:

Mark Finchem: _Thank you very much. Ladies and gentlemen I just want to take a few seconds. Turn around and look at the welcome that Donald Trump is getting from God. Is that not a beautiful Arizona sky?_

_Good evening. I did not know that a little over a year ago the act of standing up for you about a suspicious election that has since been proven to be irredeemably compromised would ignite a nationwide populist movement to regain control over our government and to trigger my pursuit to be your next Secretary of State._

_My focus has been on and always will continue to be on making it easy to vote, but hard to cheat. After all, elections belong to the people. They don’t belong to the government. _
_You know the Bible has a number of warnings in it about how to lead a good life, good advice. Try this one on for size. “Select capable men from the people. Men who fear God, trustworthy men who hate dishonest gain to lead the thousands, the hundreds, the fifties, the tens.” Is that who we have in office these days in Congress?_
_...._
_They attack Donald Trump because he messed with their cash flow. They attack Donald Trump because he exposed them and their evil deeds. They attack Donald Trump because he would not sit down and shut up._

_I want to say thank you, President Trump, for the leadership that you have shown – where so many others failed. No elected official that I can think of has taken more hits for his country than Mr. Trump._

_And, sir, that is why the people love you._

_When we strip away all the various ways that cheating showed up in the 2020 election, when we consider both the criminality and the incompetence, the margin of error exceeds the margin of victory._

_Ladies and gentlemen, we know it, and they know it. Donald Trump won._
_..._
_But we’re also talking about a regular audit process, not the Maricopa audit, but a systematic review of elections. When you give the consent to be governed, you do not give up the right to examine the result. We’re also talking about making ballot images a public record._

_Why wouldn’t they be? They’re yours. It’s your election. Election transparency in a very meaningful way. These are the responses to the Maricopa Audit._

_Well some folks would say nothing came out of that. Well I beg your pardon. We have a lot of good public policy that came out of that. But the Democrats are doing everything they can to stop it._

_So we are going to ask you to put pressure not just on Republicans. Light up Democrat phone numbers. Elections are a system run by the people. And they depend on your involvement. So I urge you, become a poll worker, become a PC. Be involved in the election system._

_Because when you are not involved in the election system, we will have election officials that will tell you we need to have electronic tabulation because we can’t get enough people. I see a lot of people out here that I think would like to be involved with elections. Yes?_

_From Maricopa County to Pima County, and yes even down to Yuma, we have a systematic problem. I’m not talking about voter fraud, I’m talking about election fraud. We’re always going to have voters that cheat. But we have systems that are broken and we need to repair those systems, take care of those systems, and maintain those systems._

_You deserve a Secretary of State that will put your interests first, who will diligently promote voter list clean-up, watermarks on ballots, a verifiable audit trail, and to refer criminality to the Attorney General’s office when it is found._
_We must take what we’ve learned in the audit and restore your confidence in your elections but I’m going to need your help. I look forward to the day that we set aside an irredeemably flawed election. That’s the election of 2020. _
---
|
---
| We are well on our way to a victory in 2022. We must win Secretary of State to protect our elections, secure our ballots, and refer criminal activity to the Attorney General’s office – none of which we have now.

**But I absolutely cannot do this without your help. Elections are critically and necessarily of the people and by the people and for the people. [This means I cannot do this without you. Help me help you.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e6a6ed2ae7&e=44b8c466b0)**

[_Please help me keep up the good fight by donating today. I am fighting to have watermarked, currency grade, fool proof ballots instituted in Arizona and across the country, and I need you to help the cause!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=999d40eb3a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3846c8dfa6&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d6f4a4998c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. [Please contribute today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6e37f6380a&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=b3d9c88a91) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=b3d9c88a91).
---

They attack Donald Trump because he would not sit down and shut up. I want to say thank you, President Trump, for the leadership that you have shown – where so many others failed. No elected official that I can think of has taken more hits for his country than Mr. Trump. And, sir, that is why the people love you. When we strip away all the various ways that cheating showed up in the 2020 election, when we consider both the criminality and the incompetence, the margin of error exceeds the margin of victory. Ladies and gentlemen, we know it, and they know it. Donald Trump won. ... But we’re also talking about a regular audit process, not the Maricopa audit, but a systematic review of elections. When you give the consent to be governed, you do not give up the right to examine the result. We’re also talking about making ballot images a public record. Why wouldn’t they be? They’re yours. It’s your election. Election transparency in a very meaningful way. These are the responses to the Maricopa Audit. Well some folks would say nothing came out of that. Well I beg your pardon. We have a lot of good public policy that came out of that. But the Democrats are doing everything they can to stop it. So we are going to ask you to put pressure not just on Republicans. Light up Democrat phone numbers. Elections are a system run by the people. And they depend on your involvement. So I urge you, become a poll worker, become a PC. Be involved in the election system. Because when you are not involved in the election system, we will have election officials that will tell you we need to have electronic tabulation because we can’t get enough people. I see a lot of people out here that I think would like to be involved with elections. Yes? From Maricopa County to Pima County, and yes even down to Yuma, we have a systematic problem. I’m not talking about voter fraud, I’m talking about election fraud. We’re always going to have voters that cheat. But we have systems that are broken and we need to repair those systems, take care of those systems, and maintain those systems. You deserve a Secretary of State that will put your interests first, who will diligently promote voter list clean-up, watermarks on ballots, a verifiable audit trail, and to refer criminality to the Attorney General’s office when it is found. We must take what we’ve learned in the audit and restore your confidence in your elections but I’m going to need your help. I look forward to the day that we set aside an irredeemably flawed election. That’s the election of 2020. | | We are well on our way to a victory in 2022. We must win Secretary of State to protect our elections, secure our ballots, and refer criminal activity to the Attorney General’s office – none of which we have now. But I absolutely cannot do this without your help. Elections are critically and necessarily of the people and by the people and for the people. | | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot P.S. . PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2022 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

What has Team Sullivan been up to this week? Check out our highlights below!

🇺🇸 **HAPPY MARTIN LUTHER KING, JR. DAY!**

Dr. King knew that unifying our society would require looking past race and living together as sons and daughters of God.

[Jesse spoke at a rally to oppose mandates](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=ee8d99a93b644aee8c24c08484b6ff51&_e=XpjMcLd4trljsAZ4o2RwcuxzUkUJwWq48O9YROY55tf82OeOXT_CLi3D3gu7_dgDJBaZworUXJBn6N3LPGakW-NcFmRMmqVgPI7yc_vC22YWO39VzH_Xbko2fMLY9weLbaxSHGRwSOn18t6A638-mm9VE09cTROhQmqz-ILcP5KNLm8LckLlFIaZLBNbh_UR_o4m3ABC9Nt5Pa7UoHe310OXqi6Tajvfvc_vpLItfVBDY4u9Y_Bey-yo1OVVXOVz180jD-n4Qan9Uyus1wq2NDZwvRwWyV-wxQCI4VQ7fbhO3u1CyJCfOWZopOBgh81UFfPbvtsNvfI8LxS8FzuU35FSNC5yCbQja12yJi0oEujHKd74ox1CVrU2UQEOdhvhwtFwLpUE0wrGQBTS0cetYio2Vhz93cwLvN53sXsrsVe3bqHgC1xPyL-EQuJwLxDqDCdGivadKHSsjGNPM8fZqyWJA-c0wdfv6L8UVWIuRig%3D). 📲 **SULLY** **TV**

Faith. Family. Service. These are Jesse’s values—and he strives to live up to them. But what does that look like in real life?

He went on The Answer to talk about just that in a radio interview recently. Hear Jesse talk about reemphasizing fatherhood, fixing the foster care and adoption system, and saving babies from abortion.

Peter,

I’ve officially launched my Congressional campaign to defeat liberal Democrat Mike Levin in California’s new 49th District House seat, and I wanted you to be among the first to know.

This target swing seat was represented by Republicans for years before Democrats managed to flip it in the 2016 “blue wave.” **Now, it’s one of our top-target seats to win back and give Republicans the majority in the House –[and I need your help to get it done.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=21c739912c174d3eadcf4aaa1dced6c1&_e=6p6mVdaGV35_4FUAbLOi5C__GkL8Zsp98Z66s0CsNIHckD6fY__ms7vuMDY3dKEEfl656a95U31NWAI3JM-Km9sK42TV1_giNWPZvb9OT5pMG_KEYTrOyVeUCA_SlvOIvwni3RhqEZ9B5imeTnEHBoaTm3MbmpA5ytFjREPGtVGbgZXO4ovwuRkPVx4OMXVSCchehpUGjnjS4nNpyGa8bzL-6vsFSKCNUnwunudKYclx85F1GX1bOIAk5gsMqrL0GPUxhwNe-9JHbcB_x7R91_OGV6ZKirD_KtNQF5RGs8E_E-cxdPtm1TT0WpSXvnDlQxlSlavVHuepchMoz7EJ2R1zdREWUBwfS3mF3VuBfdmfj6vMpOuvfDjGYsnSp0ZTigf9hU6LAY_AaVT0pNfFpdoTN03YrzGZMPiuLgkOvRt71y3MARgHRVFBWjCQ1Q53P_XLS_252d5MiSBo24H_mw%3D%3D)**

As an executive and businesswoman, I spent decades leading teams, delivering results, and always setting the highest standards of excellence for myself and those around me.

As a County Supervisor, I successfully led Orange County, California through the pandemic by opposing draconian lockdowns and opposing unconstitutional mandates that would have hurt our economy and threatened personal freedoms.

I need your help to end Levin’s and the Democrats’ radical agenda, restore conservative leadership in America, **and even become the first Japanese American REPUBLICAN to serve in Congress in over three decades!**

[**Will you join me in my fight to flip this majority-critical House seat in CA-49 with a campaign kick-off contribution of $10, $25, $40 or more now?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=21c739912c174d3eadcf4aaa1dced6c1&_e=6p6mVdaGV35_4FUAbLOi5C__GkL8Zsp98Z66s0CsNIHckD6fY__ms7vuMDY3dKEEfl656a95U31NWAI3JM-Km9sK42TV1_giNWPZvb9OT5pMG_KEYTrOyVeUCA_SlvOIvwni3RhqEZ9B5imeTnEHBoaTm3MbmpA5ytFjREPGtVGbgZXO4ovwuRkPVx4OMXVSCchehpUGjnjS4nNpyGa8bzL-6vsFSKCNUnwunudKYclx85F1GX1bOIAk5gsMqrL0Ejx-1wJt_DPjtCRM2qzV133kTHfwgUOLQ10GNsjbUeaGa0tUjgNTdfOr8U040kUR1lTzm9w-1mQsaJRnQkKgnOeeolhR1i5vEb0lMGVPfxm5p_1bvutsu7mAuVJyCHka5T-l7WyDmYxd0Gp1Sghqfyw6xSO4jNszgE4kEH_XARWEqXSigFTpFiSHxAk4fwFC7__RVUUtFLce7nb8qWetkw%3D%3D)

I want to emphasize that this House seat is a **Republican top target in the 2022 midterms.** It’s one of our best opportunities to pick up a seat and take back the House.

But Pelosi, Kamala and Biden are all working to protect Mike Levin, which means your conservative grassroots support – _especially as we kick off our campaign_ – will be absolutely essential to taking this seat back.

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Let’s do the math
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John is *the* candidate to win statewide in November. Here’s why.
#
We *know* that John Fetterman has what it takes to win in Pennsylvania, Derek — **because he’s already done it.**
In 2018, John ran, won, and became Lt. Governor of Pennsylvania. John's statewide run in the democratic primary that year was the *first time ever* in Pennsylvania history that an incumbent Lieutenant Governor was defeated. **😎**
He then joined Governor Wolf on the ticket, and they went on to win by over 855,000 votes in the General Election, 2 years after former President Trump won PA by 44,000 votes.
**The facts speak for themselves, Derek. John will likely be the**** _only_****candidate to enter this race, Democrat or Republican, to have already won a statewide election in our Commonwealth.**
**[John has what it takes to flip this seat and protect our Democratic Senate majority — but only IF our people-powered campaign has his back every step of the way. Will you do your part today, Derek? Chip in your very first $5 to help elect John right now →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40871?refcode=ema20220118-4247&t=1&akid=4247%2E434096%2ECia-jP)**
Seriously, just look at all the beautiful Fetterman green areas on this map of the 2018 Lt. Gov. Democratic primary results:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40871?refcode=ema20220118-4247&t=2&akid=4247%2E434096%2ECia-jP)
But it gets even better: In the general election, John and Governor Tom Wolf went on to beat their Republican opponents by 855,000 votes — **blowing past the previous record for the highest number of votes ever won as a ticket in a gubernatorial election.** Additionally, with Fetterman as his running mate, Gov. Wolf gained almost a million more votes than he did when he ran in 2014. 🤯
**John Fetterman may not be your typical candidate for US Senate...and that’s exactly why he’s won the trust and the votes of Pennsylvanians time and time again.**
**[Will you chip in to support John, who has a record of winning statewide? Every single cent you donate will continue to help us stay ahead of GOP opponents like Dr. Oz and elect John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40871?refcode=ema20220118-4247&t=3&akid=4247%2E434096%2ECia-jP)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40871?refcode=em20220118-4247&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4247%2E434096%2ECia-jP)**
Thank you so much for being here. We’ve got a tough road ahead, and your support is how we’re going to make it all the way to victory on Election Day.
— Team Fetterman
P.S. John’s our absolute best shot at flipping this seat blue in 2022. But making sure we can build a strong, honest, and inclusive campaign for all 67 PA counties that has what it takes to scale up quickly will depend on you, Derek. **[Will you chip in your first-ever $5 donation right now to help grow our campaign to flip this seat blue by electing John in 2022?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40871?refcode=ema20220118-4247&t=23&akid=4247%2E434096%2ECia-jP)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220118-4247-footer&t=24&refcode2=4247_434096_Cia-jP&akid=4247%2E434096%2ECia-jP)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

Hi friends, **I'm endorsing Doug Gansler as Maryland's next Governor.** I've known Doug for years and was fortunate to work with him on a broad range of issues during my time as Annapolis Mayor.

| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlYEBRuv3LZltPZnpT13Z_ZvnJe4nH_WOjWTJhkaafbzWiKbvAlNKuHIaT7F3uJ5Gzl-lhrhW5R8yYKntu8unbf6oo0OUpUIIIT5e3v29j322WxIWNR7-YF4gQ9NU6WCSm2goLdUIm2BVsQ054kV5Kz9MRxw7tcLC0t4CCMbEH5xLxVDEz7uANl9t9GSn6TJRYUVqIBZebCcn4T6tzYOoK3_KjiG54f4H-C3ATmG3soDbxITfw70MzL5uvB7M3aP7k/3it/6RdVCH47Sbm-mF7kobjLEQ/h1/bdplJQik3IzyQ2pVzUzgHVSg9mlvYPsYvPXcGlotxTw)
---
We recently met for coffee at 49 West in Annapolis.
---
Doug's experience and record speak for itself. During his 16 years in office -- first as the top prosecutor for Maryland's largest county, then two terms as Maryland's Attorney General -- he proved himself to be a progressive leader who got things done. Always ahead of his time, Doug made our communities safer by strengthening domestic violence protections for victims, launching a dedicated gang prosecution unit, and establishing a drug court to support drug offenders on the road to recovery. His leadership extended beyond the justice system, too, standing up for marriage equality, championing the Bay, leading the fight to protect civil rights, and delivering over a billion dollars to keep Marylanders in their homes during the foreclosure crisis. Now, Doug is putting himself forward to lead our state's recovery out of the pandemic with policies that reflect our shared values by:
* Providing affordable childcare to every Maryland family;
* Boldly acting on climate change by embracing 100% clean energy and delivering a 21st century workforce of good paying cleantech jobs;
* Universalizing pre-K to close gaps in opportunity; and
* Legalizing and taxing cannabis to pay for the investments our state needs.

I'm proud to support Doug's campaign because he is the right candidate to meet this moment. He knows every corner of our state and has the forward-thinking vision and proven governing experience we need in our next Governor. If you're ready to join me in endorsing Doug, **[add your name as a Gansler community endorser today!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlYEBRuv3LZltPZnpT13Z_ZvnJe4nH_WOjWTJhkaafbzWiKbvAlNKuHIaT7F3uJ5GzlDsk8RpO1BwRIVPAYaga6iVRXvA3JmrY3Tln_zQrIG0ABe2wdpWrvTvFxFyZxs0tWKmlrUUsw1iBswPJX9yigQdWdzUrJAiM9r6X5zpEsIU7JkzZ_CSdMpsiyopT9Z5gInVTQX71NbhdZ6kmNvdZ6cwG2-eT3xc0jFL0ravFch0PLwqa7heCd1nMDkM74poE/3it/6RdVCH47Sbm-mF7kobjLEQ/h2/VHClUstZ8hv8i38JxWqtxurcqOj_RTuyJTPK5t34EsM)**

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: They cannot silence our voices.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Republican state legislators in North Carolina drew extremely
gerrymandered Congressional districts, robbing thousands of North
Carolinians — particularly Black and brown voters — of representation for
their political advantage.

Erica Smith is running to represent NC-02 — a once-safe Democratic
district that is now a toss-up thanks to Republican efforts to silence
voters.

And, we were just dealt a major setback. Earlier this month, a majority
Republican court ruled to uphold the GOP gerrymander of North Carolina’s
congressional district lines.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/em-20220118-filibuster-voting-rights/?source=em20220118-784&t=1001&akid=784%2E3698%2EiRxoLl ]Republicans should not have the ability to erase our communities’
voices through these extreme partisan gerrymanders. Add your name to our
urgent petition today calling on the Senate to eliminate the filibuster
and pass the Democracy-saving Freedom to Vote Act.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/em-20220118-filibuster-voting-rights/?source=em20220118-784&t=1002&akid=784%2E3698%2EiRxoLl ]Add your name

These anti-democratic efforts are taking place all across the country, and
they threaten the very foundation of our democracy.

We must not let Republicans get away with their attempts at rigging the
2022 election — and that means passing the Freedom to Vote Act to
safeguard our sacred right to vote from these anti-democratic efforts.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/em-20220118-filibuster-voting-rights/?source=em20220118-784&t=1003&akid=784%2E3698%2EiRxoLl ]Will you sign on to our petition demanding the Senate takes urgent
action to protect our communities from Republican efforts to silence our
voices?

Thank you,

Team Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220118-784-footer&t=1004&refcode2=784_3698_iRxoLl&akid=784%2E3698%2EiRxoLl

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=784%2E3698%2EiRxoLl

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

subject: Susan Wild stooped that low
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
The other day Senator Sinema gave a speech defending her belief that we should NOT remove the legislative filibuster, which is on par with what we as Peter, The other day Senator Sinema gave a speech defending her belief that we should NOT remove the legislative filibuster, which is on par with what we as a nation have abided by for YEARS. Up until recently, this has been a bipartisan agreement that the filibuster is fundamental to our nation’s governing process. Shortly after Senator Sinema’s speech, my opponent Susan Wild sent out a fundraising email **SLAMMING** a member of her own party for not agreeing with their socialist agenda. Yes, you didn’t hear that wrong. **Susan Wild SLAMMED Senator Sinema – a United States Senator from her SAME party!** [**The very woman who said she was going to be for the people of the Lehigh Valley has never been more in step with Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden, and even Chuck Schumer. **](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=4bb2cc35fd674332b93999e152e5deef&_e=kMbR6t8Tn2_nONrGPpAzbz21qVoN2jULiAUnip5k8NDG3GK_FGilFnhRR1dEyvvFJMGnFv5aixmi6eB9OUGE9h4xhHS7dhRFVIL3de91mdj9rjn3262bMb0kuIVQm-s3uqV3mp390yxMI0wGn_eSmjiG09YxgM0WgqwMkVA1bsQprEUdL0X4xcXneAI8rFHII5UMF3s3xVQthCSjgzi9-7IrW45F-0JHyc9PBmWtuENqSA7IKW8oqxvLQ2-SyQu0TnqLwkbmZzdLGHE8wcOQ-y9vA1dxtGc7NFmBoHrcsuP9qMAyN1zVVYhdPMfB2y1dz8dEdyTCY58c2jYsDZa4DRYmjHg4OjaXpNWF40aLJl-cY8bZYiPYUwLF0QtiElOFr83AuJt45AH6Ux_00RT6yMMlt4iLVaQjO6CySpMOx5ZuYByFe_LmKG6dRgrb-1tWhENWEEniDs0-V6kNzeKA0Y8nUfdLkmtD50AgSMipW1XCKwSDsJLuRdfWRJ2-jla3) The Democratic party has never been more divided. clean_body: The other day Senator Sinema gave a speech defending her belief that we should NOT remove the legislative filibuster, which is on par with what we as Peter, The other day Senator Sinema gave a speech defending her belief that we should NOT remove the legislative filibuster, which is on par with what we as a nation have abided by for YEARS. Up until recently, this has been a bipartisan agreement that the filibuster is fundamental to our nation’s governing process. Shortly after Senator Sinema’s speech, my opponent Susan Wild sent out a fundraising email SLAMMING a member of her own party for not agreeing with their socialist agenda. Yes, you didn’t hear that wrong. Susan Wild SLAMMED Senator Sinema – a United States Senator from her SAME party! The Democratic party has never been more divided. Joe Biden’s policies are failing and Susan Wild and Nancy Pelosi are doing ANYTHING they can to hang on to his socialist agenda. - It could not be more clear that we need a new Congresswoman to represent Pennsylvania, one who will fight against Joe Biden’s agenda and will not attack members of our party. It’s going to take all of us working together as a STRONG Republican party to take back the House this November and that’s why I’m counting on YOUR help, Peter. I know that together, we can take back our conservative majority and bring the American people relief from these outrageous spending bills. Are you in? Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

body:
In case you missed it, we wanted to remind you that we recently released... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indgop/icymi-2022-congress-of-counties-tentative-agenda?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_ICYMI: Tentative Agenda for the
2022 Congress of Counties_**
---
| Hoosier Republican,

In case you missed it, we wanted to remind you that we recently released the _tentative_ agenda for our 2022 Congress of Counties! This ultimate, two-day training event for Republicans is now just _**38 days away**_ , and you **won’t** want to miss it.

You’ll have the opportunity to attend breakout sessions led by some of the most knowledgeable insiders on a variety of topics, including:
* Campaign fundraising
* Understanding social media
* Candidate recruitment and launching a campaign
* Campaign finance and reporting
* Data analytics
* County officer training
* And so much more

We have a great two days lined up for you that include hospitality suites, a networking lounge, vendors, and plenty of opportunities to interact with your fellow Republicans.

If you’re a candidate, grassroots activist, party officer, volunteer, or are just looking to get more involved, the **2022 Congress of Counties** is the event for **you**.

Thanks,
The Indiana Republican Party
---
|
---
| |
---
| [View the Tentative Agenda](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9b25866aee&e=1acd9bb3d6 "View the Tentative Agenda")
---
| [Reserve Your Spot](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6ddf6f5a81&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Reserve Your Spot")
---
|
---
| **P.S.** The room block at the French Lick Resort is **open**! To reserve your room at a special rate call the French Lick Resort directly at [1-888-936-9360.](tel:1-855-435-4167) You **must** inform the booking agent that you are with the Indiana Republican Party Congress of Counties when making your reservation in order to receive the special rate. Our group code is 0222IRP. **The deadline to book your room is Friday, February 4, 2022.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ed=20Thelander?=
subject: 294 DAYS UNTIL ELECTION DAY!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by The Committee to Elect Ed Thelander for Congress, Inc
body:
Are you able to help the campaign with $1/day donation today? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6ffcd3658734/a-strong-finish-to-8793769?e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| | [ ](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=1238eb28d3&e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| |
> * * *
>
>
>
> "It's time for all of us to step up – Maine needs representation in Congress that cares about the same things we do! I'm worried about our country and our state. I don’t have to look far to see what happens when government goes too far: my wife, Liliana, is from Venezuela. All that government’s promises of free medical care and discounted food turned out to be lies, and a country that was once prosperous and free quickly became an impoverished tyranny.
>
> Government can’t solve all our problems either, but it’s trying to take more control of our lives here in America every day. My wife and I want our children to get a world class education that prepares them for the jobs of tomorrow, but if we don’t step forward and make our voices heard, we will all continue falling further behind. I’m committed to common sense solutions. Together we can build a bright future for all Mainers.” _ **– Ed**_
>
> **[Are you able to help with a donation of $25, $50, $100, $250 or even $500 dollars today?](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=3fa34e1094&e=f8a0a76a2b)**
>
> * * *
> _Ed Thelander is a Retired Navy SEAL, Volunteer Firefighter and a Reserve Deputy Sheriff who will lead by example to restore common sense, honesty and real Maine priorities to the United States Congress. Ed pledges to work to: _
* _Improve our education system, ensuring that our children grow up with the skills required to be successful in life _
* _Fix our broken border policy once and for all _
* _Restore domestic energy production and manufacturing to America _
* _Stop reckless government spending and over-reach _
* _Protect Maine's fishing and lobster industries from overbearing regulations_

> _ Just as he defended America’s liberty and security when deployed in our service overseas, Ed will work tirelessly to make sure Congress acts meaningfully on our priorities — not those of special interests._
> * * *
>
> **Visit the Team Thelander Storefront and get your Thelander Swag! Wear your support for Ed on your sleeve, or your head, or your favorite beverage with the Thelander coozie!**
>
> [](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=a648a42bd6&e=f8a0a76a2b)
> **When you get your swag, please take a picture and send it to info@thelanderforcongress.com!**
---

clean_body: I need your help, but first let me explain why this election matters. I need your help, but first let me explain why this election matters. | Fellow American, In a second, I'm going to ask you to make a $4 donation to our campaign, but first let me explain why this is so important. 1. The Senate race in Georgia WILL DETERMINE who controls the Senate majority. 2. The race is a DEAD HEAT. A recent poll shows us leading 49%-48%. 3. However, we are being OUTRAISED BY MILLIONS by the Democrat incumbent. 4. Our campaign is behind our monthly donor goal by 107 conservatives. | | | | The stakes are too high for our campaign to fall short. The Democrats are using their Senate majority to fundamentally change our nation the wrong way, so we need your help to unite Americans and get our country back on the right track. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | | | | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

subject: [Shock] School caught BRIBING teachers to push Critical Race Theory...
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59287226:JMovpKENY:m:1:3253819041:EFF5F28003FC4C606E7E5459EE347530:r)
---
| Peter,
---
| The taxpayer-funded University of Memphis was caught red-handed... **BRIBING college professors to push Critical Race Theory mind poisoning in the classroom.**

According to a faculty-wide email, Professors will receive a _**$3,000 BONUS**_**if they teach Left-Wing propaganda** (you know, instead of dumb things like history, literature, or math.)

Make no mistake: **this is happening at a public school in _Tennessee_** ... a state overwhelmingly filled with _**conservatives**_ , who are _**paying these bribes with their tax-dollars.**_

Turning Point Action activists are the most powerful conservative grassroots army in America... but as you know, **we 're at our _biggest_ and _most impactful_ on college campuses.**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: What do we do about Democratic inaction?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

We’re approaching one full year since Democrats have been in power in the
House, Senate and White House, but we still don’t have much to show for
it. Here’s the reality,
Peter.

President Biden reflects the ideological center of Congressional
Democrats, who’ve moved leftward as progressives (like Justice Democrats)
have won primaries. But the ideological center of Congressional Democrats
still doesn’t reflect the policy views of a majority of Democratic voters.

In poll after poll, we see a majority of Democrats, and even a majority of
overall voters, support policies like a Green New Deal, Medicare for All,
and a $15 minimum wage. Yet, Democrats in the House and Senate failed this
last year to take action on crucial issues like paid family leave, climate
action, student debt relief, and so much more.

What do we do about this? Elect our 2022 slate of Justice Democrats who
will join AOC, Jamaal, Cori, and other Justice Democrats in the fight for
transformational policies for working people.

So, Peter, can you
make your first
contribution to fight for our agenda and get more Justice Democrats
elected to Congress? We’re counting on our movement to power our primaries
and make our agenda a reality.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/89268?refcode=em20220118-21549&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=21549%2E1203867%2E5nbdjf ]→ Yes, I can donate $3 to Justice Democrats today to
elect more Justice Democrats and fight for our progressive priorities.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/89268?refcode=em20220118-21549&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21549%2E1203867%2E5nbdjf ]Contribute $3

Justice Democrats showed their fighting power this year, but we need to be
in the best possible position to expand our coalition and get things done
for the American people.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=21549%2E1203867%2E5nbdjf ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=21549%2E1203867%2E5nbdjf ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220118-21549-footer&t=1024&refcode2=21549_1203867_5nbdjf&akid=21549%2E1203867%2E5nbdjf

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=21549%2E1203867%2E5nbdjf

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:

Hey friends,

As a working mother and the only woman in this Ohio Senate race, I feel an obligation to show other women that anything is possible in this country.

### **_[WOMEN FOR GOP!](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=000ad8e780e94cdcabbe48134b2314da&_m=1f11b37d49454795a6725782f764a1d7&_e=Rhf1DwJ5S8ZoAOXaRs61p1mkq8F5RKAQOM5h7TNWk83E5nzJZB1p0gH3kDwkUZBEm8hdRFN6plTGDPj7nfKWOvu6UE5Z1j7wQhNjJdD80RRLThVSiFgUuLR2T3n_t3qj0xFyyke5g9IsLO8TuBSE0wyLJeU4hbeSRAOueohD4QmT0NDX9v-RRJWtbz3gtqsN297gYJIREZSYRt8sHn-lgcZY2XDEk3kKZGI0Poj5Wl5Sn3BmFz1F3Xm2tSF4ugi4yuvqyi0MacexqYPdWoSez98OLgeFqC-ZXB3-r2RcSrzO4TwJbv6k9ErLpX2fvZ9sVmw1kCOQ1JryAIcVxxO66SNyCX5KX1BpdkY_XL73TOG1m6giSni_x1P6s9A2F8VVvmUSrGBYHdDN-Mljd8dKaaL7r-jK8nIPyoDvwLDiR8SQD5_AOt3x2n0zszyXBQMJfkZPM6Sx27OcE7MeuuyzcnYm-84BVrh_n2WnVe0_wCih2rh4Gymc-mH9CPdL7_7H)_**

**That’s why I am honored to be named to Elise Stefanik E-PAC’s _First U.S. Senate Candidate Endorsement list to recruit and elect more Republican women to Congress!_** | | [**I MADE THE FIRST LIST**](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=000ad8e780e94cdcabbe48134b2314da&_m=1f11b37d49454795a6725782f764a1d7&_e=Rhf1DwJ5S8ZoAOXaRs61p1mkq8F5RKAQOM5h7TNWk83E5nzJZB1p0gH3kDwkUZBEm8hdRFN6plTGDPj7nfKWOvu6UE5Z1j7wQhNjJdD80RRLThVSiFgUuLR2T3n_t3qj0xFyyke5g9IsLO8TuBSE0wyLJeU4hbeSRAOueohD4QmT0NDX9v-RRJWtbz3gtqsN297gYJIREZSYRt8sHn-lgcZY2XDEk3kKZGI0Poj5Wl5Sn3BmFz1F3Xm2tSF4ugi4yuvqyi0MacexqYPdWoSez98OLgeFqC-ZXB3-r2RcSryaRZMbvndZkKEv_QDT3LEWOqoqnWq1tuSddEVgImGpx4KM0GZxNPZjXh1wTPVBoFGcvVEz4wQpzXCzDMuQLK8PmjlqPiRErZ_HNDDhoTUxUbUvnlrq7jp6XbEbKgkFbcpl07u-r4Vhnt3vqoQK4ga1Q2x-n60CUGbio_emS7feaaOBiW06GV_uxXPEztT5xgKvUQgzrpuCCNf7N7A-AxAu)
---
| [**WOMEN FOR 2022**](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=000ad8e780e94cdcabbe48134b2314da&_m=1f11b37d49454795a6725782f764a1d7&_e=Rhf1DwJ5S8ZoAOXaRs61p1mkq8F5RKAQOM5h7TNWk83E5nzJZB1p0gH3kDwkUZBEm8hdRFN6plTGDPj7nfKWOvu6UE5Z1j7wQhNjJdD80RRLThVSiFgUuLR2T3n_t3qj0xFyyke5g9IsLO8TuBSE0wyLJeU4hbeSRAOueohD4QmT0NDX9v-RRJWtbz3gtqsN297gYJIREZSYRt8sHn-lgcZY2XDEk3kKZGI0Poj5Wl5Sn3BmFz1F3Xm2tSF4ugi4yuvqyi0MacexqYPdWoSez98OLgeFqC-ZXB3-r2RcSrzRQO1A-hqd4kbLTGY9BGVIiGKDm-cEKqk_lsVTHR9Ro51CMWcNA7p21Sm7uaagEGVMygJ_Cayk5vmTqUpdETBnRx6kUwhbQUyjbcNzpKcdQcYcbnrlmIS7DK4vEfldLsnQO6DhcFGSnvmkitRDT0sdB-54ncIHr4V0I5zQ-4Uh1j5PkSZbcuMfIdq6QKYrQTuJ3KOqSq-w9Co4S21KS2ft)
---

This marked Stefanik’s **FIRST** formal endorsement of a Senate Candidate in E-PAC’s history!

**_This is getting serious — my momentum isn’t slowing down._

If I’m sure of anything, it’s that GOP Women will be the first ones through the breach to restore the AMERICA FIRST AGENDA once and for all. **
[**AMERICA FIRST IN 2022**](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=000ad8e780e94cdcabbe48134b2314da&_m=1f11b37d49454795a6725782f764a1d7&_e=Rhf1DwJ5S8ZoAOXaRs61p1mkq8F5RKAQOM5h7TNWk83E5nzJZB1p0gH3kDwkUZBEm8hdRFN6plTGDPj7nfKWOvu6UE5Z1j7wQhNjJdD80RRLThVSiFgUuLR2T3n_t3qj0xFyyke5g9IsLO8TuBSE0wyLJeU4hbeSRAOueohD4QmT0NDX9v-RRJWtbz3gtqsN297gYJIREZSYRt8sHn-lgcZY2XDEk3kKZGI0Poj5Wl5Sn3BmFz1F3Xm2tSF4ugi4yuvqyi0MacexqYPdWoSez98OLgeFqC-ZXB3-r2RcSrwrD1_OdqfCMBK7OqVEcmYmkldWyGN6bw3unLrevMzzRRN0ZHtbAR-3dkAcdiW51dnwI7-uRxG0SDm1nSz-HW9pQLNeK2oiogjTKD81kS0sUsdDwHEh1_8a6KIUP6ftRGspw_p3CCNxPz6WUF-ff2YZUWvklz01tfun12jLTdexUSKBDYKdk6nto9TRk7_KtQEo_RFkTMd0DyWLd_NhrU-z)

body:
Nevada schools are failing under Governor Sisolak | |
---

[](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=4712a31abc5e432a9e7d5b34523bec52&_e=p9jIqILyvxjgJCeeTUTKTSUX6UfpkKel6MDH2Lj4sVFrNUlo2lnwH1OIUWntMlrY5r77tJs98AhO4zApeSOcsk2kt9VY__CuC842edfswClYZJtx3qz096Hv6BPqcB9iWbup_aeAWFjZ7hWNH0eaRgrADlksFOL2q-I31hXPOr9Vm6R07ypSm9ylles4NlxNNQNBWUVO9R0K_KWusHr-3eRP8Ui45TL94C3_oCvcW7IaWMFD4SeiH3dxElW0qNS3TPeGfV1GPdIdZYHCtX3p_mH3rklhLrkYIUaejob_MAL56th7baWb7WwqByX37IFs5BIiWMSKBWxlVzjLz7H_W9LAdWKOFV_C5FZDa1r40L_I-MjLjhStKhvajCzPqmA3jK7ldxlRwdtNwXDpQC0hgytYARgrbhnSAA7rTwvmWUWE2ih4khP1I6Rrg385DQjnTIxZbj_6F85NsjtvgJvMdMd2Jsc8-CpbU9bK65vkdF2hhL1QDw-tOLNdL_6iP6Wk)

Nevada is making headlines for all the wrong reasons under Governor Sisolak.

Las Vegas public schools were just ranked the **2nd WORST** in the country –– and frankly, the rest of the state isn’t doing much better.

[](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=4712a31abc5e432a9e7d5b34523bec52&_e=p9jIqILyvxjgJCeeTUTKTSUX6UfpkKel6MDH2Lj4sVFrNUlo2lnwH1OIUWntMlrY5r77tJs98AhO4zApeSOcsk2kt9VY__CuC842edfswClYZJtx3qz096Hv6BPqcB9iWbup_aeAWFjZ7hWNH0eaRgrADlksFOL2q-I31hXPOr9Vm6R07ypSm9ylles4NlxNNQNBWUVO9R0K_KWusHr-3eRP8Ui45TL94C3_oCvcW7IaWMFD4SeiH3dxElW0qNS3TPeGfV1GPdIdZYHCtX3p_mH3rklhLrkYIUaejob_MAJzK_dTABxjRFpo8ldHKoj_sBLOI1MCIUwl9ncvE59G6eqod9PJUBd1ybCswGu0eWf4BBomA2ICB1RaEVHJzPhYADJnuKFcb-RzhGy4MHeEL2xxypgEhlt8UP5D3Vuk3KRb3HTnGGycMVRJaLU0vzE7BdVco_lyXJi8__wjfX-nyr9T5I4hhb68VqlpFU_sXqDNvSF9bLvjsrvmJ-Byiivg)

Peter, it’s obvious why our schools are failing.

**Our education system is run by liberal politicians who think parents should sit down and shut up.**

Parents are being ignored every time they protest against school closures, hysterical COVID restrictions, or far-left ideas like Critical Race Theory.

_As governor, I’ll listen to parents who are so passionate about getting our schools back on track and preparing our students for the future._

**There’s no better time than now to start ––**[ _**what do you believe is the #1 issue we need to address in Nevada’s schools?**_](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=4712a31abc5e432a9e7d5b34523bec52&_e=p9jIqILyvxjgJCeeTUTKTSUX6UfpkKel6MDH2Lj4sVFrNUlo2lnwH1OIUWntMlrY5r77tJs98AhO4zApeSOcsk2kt9VY__CuC842edfswClYZJtx3qz096Hv6BPqcB9iWbup_aeAWFjZ7hWNH0eaRgrADlksFOL2q-I31hXPOr9Vm6R07ypSm9ylles4NlxNNQNBWUVO9R0K_KWusHr-3eRP8Ui45TL94C3_oCvcW7IaWMFD4SeiH3dxElW0qNS3TPeGfV1GPdIdZYHCtX3p_mH3rklhLrkYIUaejob_MALsbZTxf7PHCFy0tdS782VH6tMrix1SjG7vaT-1vKFFcNqkvSbPXt0_cxF1vDobGnQ6PxZh_bi3mhqLPASyhaOnphp4G_sedPnc6OJS3o3wa10eovW9mCJXeyIZv51GU-rZ3PDJeqhJnlB6tOgkUdWYivQ8e7Pv8RlYDrRFj8K11Q1M1pRfoDzuhRC8adSVNs9LyJDQ3BHExuEZFWt2lGoD)

[](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=4712a31abc5e432a9e7d5b34523bec52&_e=p9jIqILyvxjgJCeeTUTKTSUX6UfpkKel6MDH2Lj4sVFrNUlo2lnwH1OIUWntMlrY5r77tJs98AhO4zApeSOcsk2kt9VY__CuC842edfswClYZJtx3qz096Hv6BPqcB9iWbup_aeAWFjZ7hWNH0eaRgrADlksFOL2q-I31hXPOr9Vm6R07ypSm9ylles4NlxNNQNBWUVO9R0K_KWusHr-3eRP8Ui45TL94C3_oCvcW7IaWMFD4SeiH3dxElW0qNS3TPeGfV1GPdIdZYHCtX3p_mH3rklhLrkYIUaejob_MALfhAqibQJM41CmPdf6dtdvTWa2ySgLWdJ2nH-yLtLl2hnzCRfQsgi7qFqZBJzvdeBh96kyFI2a5ZI3WInbQtAOjHJLGCtaEoBLyv6uwbAF6G880LrUllmJiVwygniazK1yUZxam4cvuPeNly_Boxo-e6tjr4cieAwS4FkiquBFYuHQDmd51CZt41X3iEiN-vxupLYvUvaa_SjdMltQd07k)

Looking forward to your input,

Dean Heller

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Fellow American,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden and Democrats in Congress are of the mindset that forcing through legislation on party-line votes is the way to go.

That just doesn’t fly. In Congress, our mandate from the American people is simple: Don’t do anything dumb. Democrats haven’t gotten the memo.

**Democrats have the narrowest congressional majority in the last 50 years, yet they’re acting as if they have a supermajority**.

Clearly Pelosi, Schumer, and Biden don’t remember what happened in 2010 after they went rogue and passed Obamacare without a single Republican vote. Need a reminder? **Republicans picked up 63 seats in the House and flipped the majority.**

Democrats are at it once again. They’ve added more than $2 trillion to our national debt in just twelve months and they’re eyeing an additional $3 trillion in spending in the coming months - with zero plans to negotiate with Republicans.

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=409c0f377bc349d5ab6bc6ae680ea653&_e=akwbmCJ-l_vhiWW8VzPMYhTfCh1UGPgpQ4LL_ClfE86Hsffky2wEjqHgh-ty5E00aAQg3Z4GebS-Mn_Ui2US5pIvJL5gCdKR-D7IjuADBQmVyzUShgiXXTX0icWgLM6cj8Kby1HDyAgxaMzgUoUqmCPNDgtdak8JbS7ClXLTEgFFUkM_fBOXgGUCrgEzEMz4Krw7wNB-BmDUtb8P7HzCzVTi9jIAxrBheuu40bhXfRO1kk9ZTz1BuYsR_UaShafj8c6IHTTjA3yQbTQ2GNKgQq3_tp6BcxjLWMRR2mAQYGWttVr9o78TbUPgvj9alUFMyFQhsHjsn1mO5Rhkrdc03eHBLSLYiZF6gMP_Mb8NooHdSwv9UBtADUknANQen8mVMkeMcHbS4XGHdBWSiGbIssd0oLsY1n4GdZPDXLeSXsaKy1aOmWsQUGN6xlf1aI5EcG_W-pxyyl1QP7qQ2AJaYPgynnWhHk-0ojYUDUX7zVVDio28MoKQRgr_pPz9t85oN0oGq3rJ-rA_p5aZ1LruVw%3D%3D)
That’s a mistake.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need a few more Conservatives in the House to put the Democrats in the minority and prevent the Biden administration from doing more damage to our nation](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=409c0f377bc349d5ab6bc6ae680ea653&_e=akwbmCJ-l_vhiWW8VzPMYhTfCh1UGPgpQ4LL_ClfE86Hsffky2wEjqHgh-ty5E00aAQg3Z4GebS-Mn_Ui2US5pIvJL5gCdKR-D7IjuADBQmVyzUShgiXXTX0icWgLM6cj8Kby1HDyAgxaMzgUoUqmCPNDgtdak8JbS7ClXLTEgFFUkM_fBOXgGUCrgEzEMz4Krw7wNB-BmDUtb8P7HzCzVTi9jIAxrBheuu40bhXfRO1kk9ZTz1BuYsR_UaShafj8c6IHTTjA3yQbTQ2GNKgQq3_tp6BcxjLWMRR2mAQYGWttVr9o78TbUPgvj9alUFMO7WX4EheDbOfirQbDuzzS-x4zhjxoEIDsS8FFz92Kfq-TiouOhCuBDMXcpjlYkjZAYjl7jbCVvNVShw750JCVoL8ferGQsGRi6aHFkxsnnQ9B96zs6LeBmOzQ8mgWHl1L3yOA8Mj5yZpOPlK3yTo9nDXCM2UpXjWFnyyYwCOejcLUbtRAFvakqOV5bbxgL2MO5RBqmN7xN_RMDVQe-SdwA%3D%3D)**.

While the election may not be this month – **we must begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY**.

A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for **[100,000 conservatives to join our “2022 comeback team”](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=409c0f377bc349d5ab6bc6ae680ea653&_e=akwbmCJ-l_vhiWW8VzPMYhTfCh1UGPgpQ4LL_ClfE86Hsffky2wEjqHgh-ty5E00aAQg3Z4GebS-Mn_Ui2US5pIvJL5gCdKR-D7IjuADBQmVyzUShgiXXTX0icWgLM6cj8Kby1HDyAgxaMzgUoUqmCPNDgtdak8JbS7ClXLTEgFFUkM_fBOXgGUCrgEzEMz4Krw7wNB-BmDUtb8P7HzCzVTi9jIAxrBheuu40bhXfRO1kk9ZTz1BuYsR_UaShafj8c6IHTTjA3yQbTQ2GNKgQq3_tp6BcxjLWMRR2mAQYGWttVr9o78TbUPgvj9alUFMe7bZt2_Sc5gypB4wPgLrXyWo5KWGNLXBVhKUXhHFrMIy5Vm04-3G3WlFBfkIYpBGpNLya13406NkxmAH0YzKKyc_UV3ctL67JiuUZ0NJSh-LPrfgsr9UXQRM2rmNggG48TlhvCGlYFPPkQtQ_VPFTDhGZyKMdlXehw_tE7N8pxQLSiy6Q_T1CsjK2g_qfiDKt4k3KBHgfzYOH9TOHDGA4g%3D%3D)** in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back Congress this November. In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures.

We’re still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and **we’ve set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Tuesday, March 1st**.
