name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Join Speaker Pelosi for a Voting Rights Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Dear Friends:
With the Senate taking up voting rights this week, everything is at stake! As we mobilize to save our democracy, please join me and my special guests on Wednesday, January 19, 2022, at 7 pm ET / 4 pm PT on for a virtual update and discussion.
We must all stay engaged to do our part. As I said yesterday when I had the honor of joining the King family and voting rights advocates for Martin Luther King Day,
“We all want bipartisanship. We all strive for it. We have a responsibility to do so. But, when we cannot have it, we cannot confine our democracy to what might be bipartisanly possible.
So, I ask our colleagues in the Senate, respectfully, for what they think filibuster means, to compare that – to weigh the equities against our democracy. Because, nothing less is at stake than our democracy.”
To join us on Zoom, you can register here.
https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZUsd-yuqzgsH9V_LepYLSwm_2t-X8tkCnro [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZUsd-yuqzgsH9V_LepYLSwm_2t-X8tkCnro]
Let’s get voting rights passed. As we like to say: We don’t agonize, we organize. And when we do, we can win for the people.
NANCY
Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25] SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/332f88bb-cf78-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/b8eb3fe8-d478-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGViM2ZlOC1kNDc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=foIx9xyYLOWN4dGtAet1uppYv_gCRB6Vn1v2B-TTWDo=&id=117907000 .

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Just got off the air with Rachel Maddow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
I just got off the air with Rachel Maddow, folks, and I need you to hear this message: Our democracy depends on the existence of a free and fair casting and tallying of the votes. Yet, across the country, we are seeing extreme politicians attempt to throw out the votes and silence the voices of those with whom they disagree. **Without free and fair elections, the United States of America as we know it would not exist.** Congress has a responsibility to act now to ensure that the right of every American to vote is never taken away. But a set of arcane Senate rules are being used as an excuse not to move forward. That's why I am calling for my colleagues to change the rules to allow for a simple majority vote on legislation related to fundamental issues of our democracy. **With the future of our democracy at stake, we cannot afford to lose our Democratic majority in the Senate. But Republicans are doing everything they can to flip this seat and the Senate red.** I'm reaching out today because if we lose here in New Hampshire, we could lose our fragile Senate majority. I’m no stranger to tough fights, but the GOP has deep pockets – far-right donors and dark money super PACs have spent more money attacking me than any other Senate Democrat. **[With all eyes on New Hampshire, my team is setting an emergency goal of $10,000 to protect this seat and our democracy. Can I count on you to chip in $5 or whatever you can before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40814496/326102311/-1281091919?refcode=e20220118_mwh-maddow2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTM0YjFhOC1kNTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ALgZnFThFRJwIX-jk67D2VSpNhcRRy3q-hfsZMkFneQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40814497/326102312/-1281091919?refcode=e20220118_mwh-maddow2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTM0YjFhOC1kNTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ALgZnFThFRJwIX-jk67D2VSpNhcRRy3q-hfsZMkFneQ=)

Our mission is clear – we need to take back the House to STOP the Biden agenda, and the path to a new Republican majority runs through our district! Nate is the unwavering fight-to-win conservative who’s giving his all to get the job done. id:2022-01-13-14:08:07:817t | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Sandvig for Congress | |

| | Team,

In America, our democracy is our most valuable asset, the backbone of which is our sacred right to vote.

This indelible right must be guarded and guaranteed for **all citizens.** However, right-wing extremists are _hell-bent on eroding it_.

**[The John Lewis Voting Rights Act was designed to stop these efforts in their tracks, and expand access to the ballot box, and it's come before Congress again. We need to show broad support for this vital bill. Will you add your name and be counted as a supporter of voting rights? We need [150] signatures before Friday >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl-vRswUTt0wSRsVUTolC16l9rNwORN7xP9nUdMX4Sv8MvTXP3sBPk9e0y6o5HNa9vz6DWaq6k778pXpBM95m8RwsrTP8tRxTe4eMk_XJ5Jk3uMJ2d76HxKdZdCT5BKyMDBPARr8eMjiONB3zygwAuKC1MD9B26DYj9kyhUDlVhh44BB_rtmNYvce2YVoYz0s6yzxwVnRkoEefzK1FQa9sExwsP3AMsLRQEPYdmXetMTqXIjpRumFHYgIjQwWZ9bH0UuROG7MAAuqIqLQU_LW2RL0CBltSg4rLyugOFQIFUkJO9ywnQwwsQpPjLh5Y_UohM87dW20fMYFWh45Z5aJDF/3it/rCx2gF1WSIKpwuKJkwTYUg/h1/oiFoj_HtB_tnQNyqLouPy_h0i9Y_E4mADoOqlx3G53Y)**

body:
| | |
| [](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=OOqfIEhTnDQJzZWjTukiURLC%2FNYdKlNBCRMW17jqynkfZM03Lu8EQi581Ty2%2BM7TmnrGrCjF%2Bp3H7p6DE9C5iiCWdN%2B7Se%2F1oOyD7wCQ9B5BFlt4xScnrg%3D%3D&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FPGUSG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3DGkD_O0XPs4u4PTky_QJICsfb38IiCeNzu7cvGWz_6FQ9oYNruiuxxc9oyQtf1ofu0&I=20220118222841.000000199e7f%40smtp-ad3-45-phx&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjI0MzUwNjczNTk7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE5MTM0OTcxODs%3D&V=3&S=KlSF2hUSf06eF77jC-W82ZBmlsYXo7_NOTb94rRlknA)
---
| Friend,
---
| After nearly a year in office, it’s clear that President Biden simply isn’t up to the job. His unconstitutional vaccine mandate was struck down. Inflation is raging out of control. His attempt to abolish the filibuster failed. Our nation needs new leadership, and we need it now. That’s why the 2022 election is so important. We won’t be able to replace Biden this year, but we CAN Fire Speaker Pelosi, take back Congress, and stop Biden from making things worse. However, we can’t just assume this election will go our way. We have to keep working for it. We’re now halfway through January, [and we’re falling short of the fundraising pace we need to hit our goal for this month.](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=OOqfIEhTnDQJzZWjTukiURLC%2FNYdKlNBCRMW17jqynkfZM03Lu8EQi581Ty2%2BM7TmnrGrCjF%2Bp3H7p6DE9C5iiCWdN%2B7Se%2F1oOyD7wCQ9B5BFlt4xScnrg%3D%3D&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FPGUSG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3DGkD_O0XPs4u4PTky_QJICsfb38IiCeNzu7cvGWz_6FQ9oYNruiuxxc9oyQtf1ofu0&I=20220118222841.000000199e7f%40smtp-ad3-45-phx&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjI0MzUwNjczNTk7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE5MTM0OTcxODs%3D&V=3&S=KlSF2hUSf06eF77jC-W82ZBmlsYXo7_NOTb94rRlknA) [Please, chip $20.22 today so we can show Biden and his socialist squad that their time is up!](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=OOqfIEhTnDQJzZWjTukiURLC%2FNYdKlNBCRMW17jqynkfZM03Lu8EQi581Ty2%2BM7TmnrGrCjF%2Bp3H7p6DE9C5iiCWdN%2B7Se%2F1oOyD7wCQ9B5BFlt4xScnrg%3D%3D&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FPGUSG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3DDn9AL98bIAKtL3CdzaveCTy8xN9ZaGzlSRzZDUmgcC8B9idcj2p2GKHZB_sAV1zT0&I=20220118222841.000000199e7f%40smtp-ad3-45-phx&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjI0MzUwNjczNTk7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE5MTM0OTcxODs%3D&V=3&S=DwZ_oqg0HXXlfylLWYB3f2-GZVmk_urjQfTZ8VwLJ7A) I need to hear from you today. clean_body: | | | | | Friend, | After nearly a year in office, it’s clear that President Biden simply isn’t up to the job. His unconstitutional vaccine mandate was struck down. Inflation is raging out of control. His attempt to abolish the filibuster failed. Our nation needs new leadership, and we need it now. That’s why the 2022 election is so important. We won’t be able to replace Biden this year, but we CAN Fire Speaker Pelosi, take back Congress, and stop Biden from making things worse. However, we can’t just assume this election will go our way. We have to keep working for it. We’re now halfway through January, I need to hear from you today. Randy | | | | Paid for by Feenstra for Congress Not interested in email updates from Feenstra For Congress? To ensure delivery to your inbox please add to your address book.641 2nd St., Hull, IA 51239

name: Tim Ryan
subject: My friend, Emilia Sykes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2050%2E3611125%2EutN1pT ][IMG]

Hello,

I couldn’t be more excited to send this email. Today my good friend,
Emilia Sykes, launched her campaign for Congress.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6484?t=1007&akid=2050%2E3611125%2EutN1pT ]Will you join me in supporting her historic campaign? This will be a
tough fight, but if we can get 500 donors to step up in the next 24 hours,
Emilia will be in a strong position to win this race.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6485?t=1010&amount=25&akid=2050%2E3611125%2EutN1pT ]DONATE

Emilia is the leader Northeast Ohio deserves. I’ve seen firsthand how hard
she fights for Ohio’s families as House Minority Leader. Emilia is a
strong and unwavering champion in the fight for racial and economic
justice.

Bottom line? Emilia is someone you can trust to get the job done, someone
who truly cares about our community and who will work across the aisle to
accomplish progress for all Ohioans.

That’s exactly why the GOP will make her one of their top targets. They
know Emilia would put working people first—not wealthy special interests.
We need to help Emilia launch her campaign on the strongest foot possible
to make sure she’s ready for anything the GOP might throw her way.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6484?t=1008&akid=2050%2E3611125%2EutN1pT ]Will you make a split donation today in support of Emilia’s campaign?
We need 500 donors to step up in the next 24 hours.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6485?t=1011&amount=25&akid=2050%2E3611125%2EutN1pT ]DONATE

Let’s get it done.

—Tim Ryan

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=2050%2E3611125%2EutN1pT ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=2050%2E3611125%2EutN1pT ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1004&akid=2050%2E3611125%2EutN1pT ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1005&akid=2050%2E3611125%2EutN1pT ]Donate Once

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1006&akid=2050%2E3611125%2EutN1pT ][IMG]

Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Height of Delusion](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqlWAdE7aVci6VQdZpFYb8v1qtXnF1xThVzQ2cXBHZXDQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_18_final&n=1) Gavin Newsom has declared California “a model for the nation.” This is the height of delusion. His ruinous policies are a model for what the nation must avoid. Delusion is probably too kind of a word. The other day, Newsom claimed we’d have “40,000 more Californians dead” if we’d taken Florida’s approach to COVID. That is wildly and perversely false. There is truly no bottom for this Governor. But this much is true. California’s failures are spreading – and I’m not just referring to Kamala Harris. Newsom’s Labor Secretary also failed up to Washington, as did former AG Xavier Becerra, now in Biden’s cabinet. And of course, Newsom wants to be President himself (speaking of delusions). So it made perfect sense when, a few days ago, I learned one of Newsom’s top aides is preparing to run against me for Congress. I’m the last person he wants to have a national platform, being uniquely situated to show how he’s ruining California. He wants _his_ person in this seat, to peddle the “model for the nation” fantasy. Because if I'm elected, our movement will be a powerful force stopping Newsom’s policies – and Newsom himself – from going national. _[Please help me fight back with a quick and secure online donation.](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_18_final&n=2)_ Sincerely,
Kevin p.s. Thanks to the support of 2,250 citizen donors, we surpassed our Week 1 target. It’s now even more important that we keep up this pace. If you haven't had the chance to help yet, [you can do so here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_18_final&n=3).
Paid for by Kevin Kiley Congressional Committee 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_18_final&n=4).

subject: ICYMI: Jeanine Lawson ends 2021 strong, full steam ahead to #TakeBackVA10!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for by Lawson for Congress")
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/140fa958ce87/one-week-in-5394899?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
| **Team Lawson is excited to share our 2021 financial highlights as released in our press release yesterday afternoon:**
---
| [Jeanine Lawson ends 2021 strong, full steam ahead to #TakeBackVA10!](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=773ff06ebc&e=fc83fb200d "Jeanine Lawson ends 2021 strong, full steam ahead to #TakeBackVA10!")
---
| The Lawson for Congress campaign ended the year with $373,000 cash on hand (COH) putting Jeanine Lawson in a strong position to secure the Republican nomination and move on to defeating Jennifer Wexton this November and retiring Nancy Pelosi once and for all.
---
| [Let's Fire Nancy Pelosi & Her Rubber Stamp Jennifer Wexton](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=57f5d13a82&e=fc83fb200d "Let's Fire Nancy Pelosi & Her Rubber Stamp Jennifer Wexton")
---
| Lawson raised over $530,000 in her first six months on the campaign trail despite a litany of redistricting maps. She is unwavering in her commitment to win and bring common sense leadership back to Virginia’s 10th Congressional District. Her 20+ years of service to the Republican Party of Virginia, her solid conservative voting record on the Prince William County Board of Supervisors for the last seven years, and her strong campaign apparatus have the attention of many stalwart conservative leaders: House Republican Conference Chair, Congresswoman Elise Stefanik, former Virginia Governor Bob McDonnell, former Virginia Attorney General Ken Cuccinelli, former Virginia Delegate Tim Hugo and Delegate Nick Freitas, Penny Nance, President & CEO of Concerned Women for America, as well as the pro-liberty organization FreedomWorks for America PAC.
---
| [Join Team Lawson Today!](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=a5f140a813&e=fc83fb200d "Join Team Lawson Today!")
---
| That momentum is just a start, but Jennifer Wexton and her dark money liberal allies are ready to spend millions to keep the seat. Your continued support is critical to push back against their agenda.
---
| [Donate $5 Today](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=10a6ebcce2&e=fc83fb200d "Donate $5 Today")
---
| [Donate $10 Today](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=00edf3820b&e=fc83fb200d "Donate $10 Today")
---
| [Donate $25 Today](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=9e7b89f85c&e=fc83fb200d "Donate $25 Today")
---
| [Donate $50 Today](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=0651f7732e&e=fc83fb200d "Donate $50 Today")
---
| [Donate $100 Today](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=c23e978026&e=fc83fb200d "Donate $100 Today")
---
| _Jeanine Lawson said:_
“We have taken back Virginia, now’s the time we take back Congress! Locally, we have seen a need for reform. Where woke schools have pushed a toxic political agenda in the classroom, Governor Glenn Youngkin will return Virginia schools to teaching students how to think, not what to think. Where soft on crime commonwealth attorneys have failed parents and citizens, Virginia Attorney General Jason Miyares will ensure we keep our families safe. Congresswoman Jennifer Wexton has failed to place families and public safety first while remaining silent on the scandals our Republican ticket took on. The 10th District deserves better than Jennifer Wexton’s inaction. Those concerned about the safety of our children deserve better, and hardworking Virginians deserve better than her pushing higher utility bills and taxes on our families. We unseated the radicals who had taken over Richmond, and this November we will take back Congress and defeat Jennifer Wexton.”
---
| But the work is not finished. In fact, we're just getting started. If you'd like to join Team Lawson in taking back Virginia's 10th Congressional District, sign up to volunteer today[ here.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=acbd397616&e=fc83fb200d)

Thank you for all of your unwavering support. We're looking forward to working with YOU to #TakeBackVA10!

\-- Team Lawson
---

subject: Our 2022 Platform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
I need your input.
| [](https://links.salazar4florida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=a4ff0758cad24b32906c9fc19be32907&_e=Co8y185bqmShVq-KijHxF07Diw0zkfmjKy-0-aFLQN07Ufxlxsf6CqE0Ygyv8MWkwEcuJxJx40mslCLqv9Qs4FI26ReZQJ3J8JwFu5wDHl09JA4mYAou_EHB7YJbLE0N_lRicF70mcxOqRcSAVfEmi2wBlgutxVBM9Lr5pWWH8DnRhb3qStBeofooFMgaV53a6A3wcGqagXAfyzSxNqzBwiQ0FnxvkCp7-g2pQ7opRAj0NhVQ5mb1XzAuKRmFrxVG4jjs-T_g_m0jfcR4R9O7A8WpUoHGtmBm-XFL8vbGTvafnm1LCLhLL3sFkp-yhNht0KEsGtzauMeUrQRCDfqXbVV_wPslrGzzRN7mZ8gKxobpPwnu1XG7vGBghjpHC_z-z3vtYv8Ogy_3uaDBivbK04ye2O79K1X-x8j3Xwgu3Oqs6h30pgf7WpSRTlqu33gj8xubug065izRSZhvsynH8CyH_gdiuOyRbfIFZMubUqx4F3y8g9ZLhFZDtNbJwVt)
---
Peter,
---
The only way we'll win this bellwether race and take back the House this November is by listening to grassroots Americans like YOU.
---
_That's why I've commissioned this official survey to get your feedback on my campaign's official platform as we step up our efforts to win the hearts and minds of Americans._
---
[**Please take my “2022 Platform Survey: Restoring America’s Voice” to help shape my campaign’s official platform.**](https://links.salazar4florida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=a4ff0758cad24b32906c9fc19be32907&_e=Co8y185bqmShVq-KijHxF07Diw0zkfmjKy-0-aFLQN07Ufxlxsf6CqE0Ygyv8MWkwEcuJxJx40mslCLqv9Qs4FI26ReZQJ3J8JwFu5wDHl09JA4mYAou_EHB7YJbLE0N_lRicF70mcxOqRcSAVfEmi2wBlgutxVBM9Lr5pWWH8DnRhb3qStBeofooFMgaV53a6A3wcGqagXAfyzSxNqzBwiQ0FnxvkCp7-g2pQ7opRAj0NhVQ5mb1XzAuKRmFrxVG4jjs-T_g_m0jfcR4R9O7A8WpUoHGtmBm-XFL8vbGTtbxiw5goSsXDCU_DV3nP24l5_tlj57JFODTyMb-i74ElAHTi1IrQPHnWDw7wFjkT_XBV-85Z75p359QbEnAvnqNSLh9Hz8iOI8-zcQerVX9bd-DYCofNFPlnnzZxST-dJKso1q5gHfS-xKYLnmkY7k3LNGSum5MX76Pf-K5HLZ2C3RywI2YJAblg5XUZ2D8uN-hhEdAL4FPTfVGUWxW8pO)
---
**_2022 Platform Survey: Restoring America's Voice_** **Participant:** Peter **Status: Pending** **[TAKE THE SURVEY📝](https://links.salazar4florida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=a4ff0758cad24b32906c9fc19be32907&_e=Co8y185bqmShVq-KijHxF07Diw0zkfmjKy-0-aFLQN07Ufxlxsf6CqE0Ygyv8MWkwEcuJxJx40mslCLqv9Qs4FI26ReZQJ3J8JwFu5wDHl09JA4mYAou_EHB7YJbLE0N_lRicF70mcxOqRcSAVfEmi2wBlgutxVBM9Lr5pWWH8DnRhb3qStBeofooFMgaV53a6A3wcGqagXAfyzSxNqzBwiQ0FnxvkCp7-g2pQ7opRAj0NhVQ5mb1XzAuKRmFrxVG4jjs-T_g_m0jfcR4R9O7A8WpUoHGtmBm-XFL8vbGTuxCJRDCIAdakKMTD2fsZ1ZO3oEDFFyYlcs14UV-6x7KmyaSKJ-NwfjQU0GMnsqFncjK1ey525y871EJN5syQNngtYYw3I9AaSOlh4fbSp3SMGQOHsBvdBbsHWCabwKlmwd5t2iTqBrkPgHfm0fi3SI6o3M7tg0TRrL-bbffgK-DLc3h6Oa3pw0y3AHlYZ1ZBm7d2BP8835uhAGkvtd8u2T)**
---
Poll after poll has shown that Americans are pessimistic about the future of our country.
---
A majority of Americans are frustrated or disappointed with Biden’s presidency, and 75% think our country is doing “very or somewhat badly”.
---
_They're tired of socialism, open borders, and international humiliations._
---
_But we can't win by just running against Biden and Kamala's failures. We also have to propose solutions and prioritize solving the issues that matter most to grassroots Americans._
---
I'm counting on your input as I build a platform that achieves that, Peter.
---

body:
Right now, Middle Tennessee is in the fight of its life against new racist, anti-democratic gerrymandering. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aKi7nPZoMC1hdvv-aBtd_WQhF_HHr7R5OkEDrc_ZkrefEoBaZIk-KCtima0sxw7iUABYN1zHWl5A-ccapgCDWOBfwtA5bkNgzjhuSd_7jgl1blATW6QcX7IQhVjuwYmJd6xyLiNhkdPJXF0LU-sR2DYrb4p47k67e6s1__5w6EJqEcnsx3JZ3gP_jH_jWU5JG-DdnIiFfXO9brFcT581ngai4n22OQTtMXHSSGQOJNqqtVgf0wDI5L21qp7Nf4kvUlN2G4BkBZj38r-oDYD6DYxIEfDuWCVL--P60c952Sb5w/3it/7HgAvJCMTVKdBZf1V5OvmQ/h0/3TcqBSUMxgdS_aKD6HmdUlCvjUjB0-OUE729FXDtAQk)
| Right now, Middle Tennessee is in the fight of its life against new racist, anti-democratic gerrymandering. [**_Will you rush a donation to our campaign to help us fight back before the gerrymandered maps go to a final vote in just a few days? »_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiPTuDO3ttx4liQuoKDrHEA6XhmAFZFKsHIm5dOuFu6qWkaGPQU5VInBup4f-LkmxYeCc5XiixVlc3dTVr175-CcT2w9IBykcVmCZmm6MZVB33lcOMoB-N4cOJRLCjO8R1lihgeFQdz3VW13qRgjXca8IJyprOVyIESQ2PByI1RQIc8VRpMWZWxRynOB3nrvb8GksTECB5JbJlI1hfuTG1lcOdG7AIV8JJYo7-gY3auRxyli0aE4Q6WydHuhFA815moYfgBIvyO0p2rCwlAWLTzGGogfSMrUleauFT3tCZ7KFCuYvktPioaTcxaQrKcjZm4yHfZnHK4NsmUdfd9LQ7-Q/3it/7HgAvJCMTVKdBZf1V5OvmQ/h1/79gNcVNSvdKFGDPlBgVGYxR94LTI5wLpgaJhsZU3uhQ)
---
Peter,
Republicans have known for a long time they can’t win a countywide election in Nashville — **so now they’ve decided to cheat.**********
Draft maps released last week by the Republicans in the state legislature would crack Nashville apart, dividing our city and our Congressional district into three.

That’s why yesterday, I stood with hundreds of Tennesseans on the Capitol steps on Martin Luther King Jr. Day to fight back against these racist, gerrymandered maps. And today, I sat in committee hearing rooms to make sure our movement’s presence was felt.

clean_body: Right now, Middle Tennessee is in the fight of its life against new racist, anti-democratic gerrymandering. | | | | Right now, Middle Tennessee is in the fight of its life against new racist, anti-democratic gerrymandering. Peter, Republicans have known for a long time they can’t win a countywide election in Nashville — so now they’ve decided to cheat.****** Draft maps released last week by the Republicans in the state legislature would crack Nashville apart, dividing our city and our Congressional district into three. That’s why yesterday, I stood with hundreds of Tennesseans on the Capitol steps on Martin Luther King Jr. Day to fight back against these racist, gerrymandered maps. And today, I sat in committee hearing rooms to make sure our movement’s presence was felt. While I was at the Capitol fighting for justice, our campaign has been working to mobilize thousands of Tennessee voters to fight back against gerrymandering. But we’re up against a tight deadline — the maps are headed to a final vote on the House and Senate floor in just a few days. That means that now more than ever, we could really use your help, Peter.**** This attempt at gerrymandering is a move to intentionally destroy a Democratic progressive stronghold and dilute the power of our votes. It’s not just partisan — it’s a racist move to dilute the power of Black, brown and working class voters in our city. We’re not going to stand for it, and we’re so grateful for your support as we fight back.** We’ll be at the Capitol tracking the voting process closely, and as one of our top supporters, we’ll be sure to keep you updated on our next steps. In solidarity, Odessa Kelly To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

Friends-

It’s House Conservative, Congressman **Ken Buck**.

I’ve got some bad news. Democrats spent millions of dollars to try and take down Nicole Malliotakis last year, and now Nancy Pelosi’s campaign machine is gearing up to do the exact same thing in 2022. They’re even trotting out the same diminutive Defund the Police Democrat to run against Nicole.

**We cannot let that happen.**

Nicole represents a critical district in our fight to Take Back the House in 2022. She’s the only Republican member representing deep-blue New York City, **and now Max Rose (who she defeated in 2020) is going to spend millions of dollars to take this seat back for Nancy Pelosi.**

It is critical that we make sure Nicole’s campaign is as well-funded as possible going into 2022. **She’s standing up against the Socialist Squad and Max Rose.**

[****](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=13b01fc9a8e24e919d7c4e154c297ba6&_e=f8O_4GIW6ei6idMTN14w1HCSFeNsjZdDWW84HyYYMNziTuDVebVW1MM-eYTPX9psw7GaKB1dc4diFsnDJBuAxP6Pl6IdtEV0hVL7whzRirrBw_2c76njCUE-fJXdq5wEuUyCUeXlUSGuBq6r8bjNQip8O1dmO8fD1_wv6kwHuWv75h5W-ThLURMfdy2P8KUM8i2-00qNH2_gO6h46Owt1osR33MeV1z0eKMc3q_0JxfovN-YkQymtjgRc7jzoIBk1_wvbzd0bX4bkhSVNdpEM52AesuuKMGOc_lg3-etN34BQsX0SNpehsb-mvGTjS4wjNzJTbfFxu6BFkhDvhItaKEcUICf0GheTZH6gLp5Ui0S2lG2b-iHcUfuRP84h_v6WX3-3-sxEs14yX4xXJ224w%3D%3D)
Peter,
My husband and our governor, Ron DeSantis, has been a fearless leader for Florida.

subject: ALERT: Gov. Lujan Grisham Delivers State of the State Address Today
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
And we’re going to make sure she won’t have another opportunity in 2023! Peter, Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham delivered her State of the State address today. **But the true state of our state is that we are going in the wrong direction because of her failed leadership and New Mexico needs real change.** [**Answer her State of the State Address - Help Bring Real Change to NM**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=2a94145f5bcb4d1aab68b00d761dd758&_e=zDUPqPdWWhzadwf3L1jyCVZFl6Fa71m5APtuVPLs2dZMH_BXzg58hSsb6SFhq5hNLSL8CeddFFBqePEGoTC-Nlm4-tO-OjIjHhTPPLfsQA5CgSwYfAhOzwREcxNCo5DIBtgbTcjoWEbjsIn6FSYEk2cBhhwdgVNANNGM5NQZVuGiRgkK4GI2LXS_xegh-cBLPaZWg8dxxBDUbth5EvypS9NLDd08dh1XuI3t2MqYdhv2FT-GGH0vTnn6LTCDyntYl4g2N-XQRj3adWPVDm-md67_AfleHJBssWclip4PCCxJVuyGeefuKm1DxpZDgvk3ifxQSuPaqQDITkhmZGOMk3OIvtEQktdbNS9wXHEnv0nbiGr6va_ykn4gNE2d69hVE8vz6i_JK9csv0XI3yP3hkk6yILuphiZCCKpN-H8IPmr24vtUv5xoz7Oa_NFS3lnsL-qcWaJRxgRQdFe4MCYccz6axuDyBQ4Hi6_ZmpAB_4AHi2TXfy9lvI3940YT59RqMqBV4AKEsSPnEG0ytdBHg%3D%3D) The Governor’s draconian and unscientific COVID plan has failed. Cases are skyrocketing and our death rate is higher than nearly all of our neighboring states. Crime is out of control and police are under tougher scrutiny than criminals. Forty percent (40%) of small businesses closed for good and New Mexicans are getting crushed by rising prices. And finally, we are dead last in education with our kids even further behind because of the Governor’s extended school shutdown. Unfortunately, this session won’t be about solving real problems – it will be about the Governor trying to solve **her _political_ problems** with public relations gimmicks. She’ll claim to fight crime with tough-sounding bills without any real teeth. She’ll pour more money into education without any focus on results. She’ll continue her explosion of government growth and spending, while giving tiny tax cuts to New Mexicans. Tax cuts that will do little to help ease the pain of rising costs at the grocery store, or gas pump. And you won’t hear a word about our border crisis and all the fentanyl coming across that is destroying so many lives. We deserve much better. We deserve a governor who will fight crime by truly ending catch and release and going after criminals, not law-abiding citizens and our police. A governor who will help our children reach their full potential in schools, starting with a focus on helping them catch up from the school shutdowns. We deserve a governor who will put parents back in charge of their children’s education, instead of bureaucrats and union bosses. A governor who will rein in the wasteful government spending and provide real tax cuts to New Mexicans to help kickstart our economy and ease the pain caused by inflation. And finally, a governor who will fight to secure our borders by ending our sanctuary policies, deploying the national guard to the border, and going after the fentanyl-trafficking rings. [**Help Elect Mark by Pitching in NOW**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=2a94145f5bcb4d1aab68b00d761dd758&_e=zDUPqPdWWhzadwf3L1jyCVZFl6Fa71m5APtuVPLs2dZMH_BXzg58hSsb6SFhq5hNLSL8CeddFFBqePEGoTC-Nlm4-tO-OjIjHhTPPLfsQA5CgSwYfAhOzwREcxNCo5DIBtgbTcjoWEbjsIn6FSYEk2cBhhwdgVNANNGM5NQZVuGiRgkK4GI2LXS_xegh-cBLPaZWg8dxxBDUbth5EvypS9NLDd08dh1XuI3t2MqYdhv2FT-GGH0vTnn6LTCDyntYl4g2N-XQRj3adWPVDm-md67_AfleHJBssWclip4PCCxJVuyGeefuKm1DxpZDgvk3JhTZjhDusL-gY3TR6QnT7nU-rQB-gavBniVTYVKxVxW9wvw7Wu-U_xy6ulKW7JGKDi58Zi5YKxU9YjIfe0iQbwOZ7u9IKnjYmqEtVi1DYWj76tD5jWeUBXkQqpIATggYQ3p221L21zm47v87C8c2ww1w1IUlS6G9jIhQPAj89iIfBuDrtuFXChDB4qqjpXlR04tW2Am-Vwlm5g8iIZoWRQ%3D%3D) Our campaign has tremendous momentum because New Mexicans aren’t being fooled by the Governor. But we can’t let up. clean_body: And we’re going to make sure she won’t have another opportunity in 2023! Peter, Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham delivered her State of the State address today. But the true state of our state is that we are going in the wrong direction because of her failed leadership and New Mexico needs real change. The Governor’s draconian and unscientific COVID plan has failed. Cases are skyrocketing and our death rate is higher than nearly all of our neighboring states. Crime is out of control and police are under tougher scrutiny than criminals. Forty percent (40%) of small businesses closed for good and New Mexicans are getting crushed by rising prices. And finally, we are dead last in education with our kids even further behind because of the Governor’s extended school shutdown. Unfortunately, this session won’t be about solving real problems – it will be about the Governor trying to solve her political problems with public relations gimmicks. She’ll claim to fight crime with tough-sounding bills without any real teeth. She’ll pour more money into education without any focus on results. She’ll continue her explosion of government growth and spending, while giving tiny tax cuts to New Mexicans. Tax cuts that will do little to help ease the pain of rising costs at the grocery store, or gas pump. And you won’t hear a word about our border crisis and all the fentanyl coming across that is destroying so many lives. We deserve much better. We deserve a governor who will fight crime by truly ending catch and release and going after criminals, not law-abiding citizens and our police. A governor who will help our children reach their full potential in schools, starting with a focus on helping them catch up from the school shutdowns. We deserve a governor who will put parents back in charge of their children’s education, instead of bureaucrats and union bosses. A governor who will rein in the wasteful government spending and provide real tax cuts to New Mexicans to help kickstart our economy and ease the pain caused by inflation. And finally, a governor who will fight to secure our borders by ending our sanctuary policies, deploying the national guard to the border, and going after the fentanyl-trafficking rings. Our campaign has tremendous momentum because New Mexicans aren’t being fooled by the Governor. But we can’t let up. Thank you. Mark Ronchetti PS: Let’s answer MLG’s State of the State and show her New Mexicans aren’t buying her excuses and political rhetoric. | | | Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer. subject: Why the Left is Working Against Election Integrity!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
The main reason Schumer wants to eliminate the filibuster is to clear the way for a complete federal takeover of elections... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/01-18-2022?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=ca5eafab9d&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | Dear Friends,
---
| America dodged a major threat this week when Sens. Joe Manchin (D-W.Va.) and Kyrsten Sinema (D-Ariz.) broke with Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.) and rejected his proposal to abolish the filibuster, which would allow a simple majority to pass legislation, effectively stripping the minority party of any participation in the process. As conservatives are fond of saying, the United States of America are a republic, not a democracy, and our system was not designed to allow a simple majority to just roll over the minority without any compromise or consultation. The main reason Schumer wants to eliminate the filibuster is to clear the way for a complete federal takeover of elections, dishonestly masquerading as a so-called "voting rights" bill. The truth is that every adult American, save some convicted felons, already has the right to vote. What the left really wants is to tear down existing election security measures and prevent new ones from being enacted in order to make it easier for non-citizens to vote and other forms of election fraud to occur. If the left were honest, they would call this corrupt legislation the "pro-election fraud bill" because that is what it would cause in our country. If you thought the 2020 election was bad, just wait until you see what an election would look like once the left has eliminated all vestiges of election security. In 2020, we saw election laws changed and broken all over the country, and because of this, we saw a breakdown of election security and an increase in corruption. We need to be strengthening our election security measures and getting back to paper ballots and Election Day voting rather than election month voting, ballot dropboxes, and other procedures ripe for fraud. The establishment doesn't want to talk about election integrity. Brad Little wants you to forget that he was out there — just like the democrats — changing Idaho's election laws and making our elections less secure. There is a pattern here. Remember at the end of 2020, when I, along with a number of Idaho lawmakers, filed an Amicus Brief in support of every state's obligation to maintain a republican form of government as called for in the U.S. Constitution? Brad failed to join the lawsuit. Remember when I called for a comprehensive 50-state audit of the 2020 election, so that Americans can know, once and for all, what _really_ happened? Once again, silence from Brad. One of the reasons I decided to run for Governor was the corruption apparent in the 2020 election. We all saw it, even if some people choose not to acknowledge it. We now have **_less than four months_** until the Primary Election! Our message of conservative values and individual liberty is resonating well, but we need to make sure that every Idahoan hears and understands it. The choice could not be more critical. Will Idaho choose lockdowns, mandates, and unsound elections or will we Make Idaho Free Again by choosing personal freedom and election integrity? The future of our state is on the line! If you care about election integrity and conservative values, please consider donating [**$25**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=9fbd279a93&e=823fa8e224), [**$50**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=82b2816c4a&e=823fa8e224), [**$100**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=5d1267e9bf&e=823fa8e224), or even [**$500**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=afcd4204d8&e=823fa8e224) today, so that we can reach more Idahoans with our message of freedom!
---
| [DONATE Today!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=6d2c06ba01&e=823fa8e224 "DONATE Today!")
---
|
## Lincoln Day Events
Across the state, Republicans are hosting Lincoln Day events to celebrate the principles and values of the Republican Party, and I have been fortunate to attend several of them already. It's always good to get out and spend time with conservative Idahoans.
---
|
---
|
---
| Sincerely,

Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor
---
| **P.S.** Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=715369d218&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=8e07c37224&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=1536126313&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=0981f9c88f&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=f9f724057f&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.

name: Team AOC
subject: It happened. I got COVID.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
I got COVID, probably omicron. As of today I am thankfully recovered and wrapping up quarantine, but COVID was no joke.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220118-2740-header&t=1&akid=2740%2E2526796%2ELIyiGP)
So it happened.
I got COVID, probably omicron. As of today I am thankfully recovered and wrapping up quarantine, but COVID was no joke. For a while I’ve noted the term “mild” is misleading when the bar is hospitalization and death. Even “mild” cases can result in long COVID, which includes a range of conditions like cognitive impairment, postural-orthostatic tachycardia syndrome (POTS), and chronic fatigue.
This isn’t to be a downer or induce fear, just a reminder that we need to be careful — wear N95s in crowded indoor spaces like stores — and if you do get it, it’s key to care for yourself and REST. The idea of forcing people to work just five days after symptoms start is sociopathic and 100 percent informed by a culture that accepts sacrificing human lives for profit margins as a fair trade. The good news is that we have an antidote: community.
If you’ve noticed, much of the emphasis of media conversations on COVID are individualistic: wear a mask, get vaccinated to protect _yourself_ , go back to work even with symptoms because _you’re_ fine — and even if you’re not. And while some of these recommendations are good — like getting a vaccine and wearing masks where appropriate, the motivations for them shouldn’t just be selfish. It should also be because we actually give a damn about other people, like our disabled neighbors or our coworkers who haven’t said (and shouldn’t feel obligated to say) that they’re immunocompromised.
It’s truly bizarre to me that caring about other people is a polarizing political stance, but my dad used to say that life makes you repeat lessons until you learn them. And if there’s one lesson I think we as a country are repeating until we learn, it’s that community and collective good is our best shot through our greatest challenges — way more than discorded acts of “rugged individualism” and the bootstrap propaganda we’ve been spoon-fed since birth.
Individualism is inadequate for planetary forces like climate change or global pandemics, and even less for societal ones like healthcare, economic inequity and racism. But WE, as a collective, can confront them. In a world of MEs, let’s build team WE. 💙
Anyways that’s enough for today, stay healthy and blessed and let’s keep building.
Love & solidarity,
AOC
P.S. You can help ensure your health and safety, as well as that of others, by getting yourself tested frequently. [You can order four free COVID rapid antigen tests per household to be delivered to your home from the USPS here (while supplies last).](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10372?t=2&akid=2740%2E2526796%2ELIyiGP)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20220118-2740-P_OTH_ANO_HDL&t=3&refcode2=2740_2526796_LIyiGP&akid=2740%2E2526796%2ELIyiGP)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220118-2740-P_OTH_ANO_HDL&t=4&akid=2740%2E2526796%2ELIyiGP)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=5&akid=2740%2E2526796%2ELIyiGP) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=6&akid=2740%2E2526796%2ELIyiGP) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=7&akid=2740%2E2526796%2ELIyiGP)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=8&akid=2740%2E2526796%2ELIyiGP)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=2740%2E2526796%2ELIyiGP)

clean_body: | | | | A fentanyl overdose is the number one cause of death for Americans. Dear Peter, Did you know that a fentanyl overdose is the number one cause of death for Americans between the age of 18 and 45? This UNMITIGATED DISASTER is directly tied to the federal government's incompetence in blocking the flow of illicit drugs from coming into our southern border. Here is what's happening right now: At this moment, China is shipping a massive quantity of raw ingredients and fentanyl precursors to Mexico. Thereafter, these ingredients are transformed by the Mexican drug cartels into illicit "finished" fentanyl, and smuggled into the United States. This insane system is killing many, many thousands of Americans. In fact, in West Virginia alone, three out of every four drug-related deaths are due to a fentanyl overdose. That's why Attorney General Patrick Morrisey is leading a lawsuit against this GRAVE AND RISING THREAT against the American people. If Biden's incompetence at the border remains unfixed, many more Americans will die. We must not allow that to happen to America or West Virginia. But we need your help. The far-left wants to keep our borders open and porous , and will fight back against us to stop our efforts to SHUT THIS DOWN. | | | | | Sincerely, George Team Morrisey | Follow us on Social Media ****|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. name: Morgan Harper
subject: We can’t afford any more moderates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
The next Senator from Ohio has to be willing to do what’s right
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220118-519-footer-ak&t=2&akid=519%2E90090%2EEkvved)
This weekend, I marched with members of the community in Columbus to both honor the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. and demand federal legislation to protect our freedom to vote.
**We need federal legislation to protect voting rights, period.** And we need a Senator from Ohio who’s willing to fight the good fight and do what’s right to end the filibuster, to protect the vote, and abolish gerrymandering.
**[If you agree, contribute $5 to our grassroots-powered campaign today to send the first Black woman from Ohio to the U.S. Senate.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/21167?t=3&akid=519%2E90090%2EEkvved)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/21173?refcode=em20220118-519&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=519%2E90090%2EEkvved)**
Democrats and people of color can’t afford any more of the sort of moderates that Dr. King warned us about.
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/21176?t=23&akid=519%2E90090%2EEkvved)
My Democratic opponent has flip-flopped on crucial issues, from abortion rights to gun regulations. We can’t risk another Manchin or Sinema when the stakes are so high. And the Republicans in this race are dangerous, far-right extremists — we can’t afford to let them win.
We need unbought, principled, community-driven progressive candidates in office. That’s why I’m running for the Senate. **[If you’re tired of self-serving moderate politicians blocking progress for our communities, can you chip in to help fuel our campaign?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/21167?t=24&akid=519%2E90090%2EEkvved)**
Thank you,
Morgan Harper
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/21167?t=25&akid=519%2E90090%2EEkvved)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220118-519-footer&t=26&refcode2=519_90090_Ekvved&akid=519%2E90090%2EEkvved)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=519%2E90090%2EEkvved)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
